# 产物目录

本文从“看到一个文件后怎么理解它”的角度列出关键 artifact。`docs/system_flow.md` 仍是工程事实源；本文是阅读索引，帮助使用者判断 artifact 的生成者、上游输入、下游用途、production 影响和常见误解。

如果需要理解输入数据如何计算成输出数据，先读 `docs/calculation_logic.md`；字段级含义见 `docs/schema/fields.yaml`，也可以用 `aits explain <field|gate|artifact>` 做只读反查。该 YAML 先覆盖 `scores_daily.csv`、decision snapshot、trace bundle、prediction ledger 和 shadow parameter search 的核心字段。

## ENG-VAL-001 Validation Runtime Profiling and Xdist Benchmark

|产物|生成命令|上游输入|Schema / 安全契约|用途|production 影响|常见误解|
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
|`outputs/validation_runtime/<tier>_<timestamp>/test_runtime_summary.json`<br/>`outputs/validation_runtime/<tier>_<timestamp>/test_runtime_reader_brief.md`<br/>`outputs/validation_runtime/<tier>_<timestamp>/pytest_output.log`|`python scripts/run_validation_tier.py <tier> --write-runtime-artifact`|选定 validation tier、pytest-xdist worker/dist 参数、pytest 输出|Schema contract：`report_type=test_runtime_summary`；记录 tier、command、workers、dist、elapsed_seconds、exit_code、safety boundary、slow-duration rows、最慢 nodeid、output tail 和 pytest output log path；完整 pytest output 只写 log，不内嵌 summary|给本地验证门禁留下可审计 runtime、慢项和失败上下文|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action_allowed=false`|Runtime PASS 只证明测试门禁通过；slow durations 是工程优化输入，不是投资研究证据或 promotion gate。|
|`outputs/validation_runtime/<tier>_<timestamp>/validation_benchmark_summary.json`<br/>`outputs/validation_runtime/<tier>_<timestamp>/pytest_output_<workers>_<dist>.log`|`python scripts/run_validation_tier.py <tier> --benchmark-dist <dist> [--benchmark-worker <n>] --write-runtime-artifact`|同一 tier 的多组显式 xdist distribution / worker 组合|Schema contract：`benchmark_mode=true`；每个变体记录 workers、dist、command、status、exit_code、elapsed_seconds、slow-duration rows 和 output log path；默认 `DEFAULT_DIST=loadfile` / `DEFAULT_WORKERS=16` 不因 benchmark 自动改变|量化不同 xdist 策略耗时差异，为后续是否调整默认验证策略提供证据|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action_allowed=false`|Benchmark 最快不等于默认策略应立即切换；任何默认变更仍需单独任务、稳定性验证和任务登记。|

## TRADING-1506～1526 Expanded QQQ / SGOV / TQQQ Allocation Search

|产物|生成命令|上游输入|Schema / 安全契约|用途|production 影响|常见误解|
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
|`docs/research/expanded_qqq_sgov_tqqq_universe_scope.md`|`aits research strategies expanded-universe scope-review`|`config/research/expanded_allocation_universe.yaml`、market regime policy、TQQQ research-only policy|Schema contract：status=`EXPANDED_UNIVERSE_SCOPE_READY`；必须披露 `market_regime=ai_after_chatgpt`、default backtest start、asset universe、TQQQ role、`paper_shadow_allowed=false`、`production_allowed=false`、`broker_action=none`、dynamic promotion `BLOCKED`|定义 expanded QQQ / SGOV / TQQQ universe 的研究范围和禁止晋升边界|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|scope ready 不是加入 promotion universe，也不是允许 TQQQ paper-shadow、production 或 broker。|
|`docs/research/tqqq_data_quality_blocking_review.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/tqqq_data_quality_blocking_review.yaml`|`aits research strategies expanded-universe tqqq-data-quality-review`|Validated QQQ/SGOV/TQQQ prices and rates through the same cached-data quality gate as `aits validate-data`、TQQQ adjustment warning evidence、expanded universe config|Schema contract：status=`TQQQ_RESEARCH_ONLY_APPROVED`；输出 data quality status、TQQQ issue count、adjusted-close source、research universe status、promotion universe blocker 和 fixed safety fields|把 TQQQ 2025 adjustment warning 从非阻断 watchlist 升级为 formal review，并明确只允许 research-only 使用|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|`TQQQ_RESEARCH_ONLY_APPROVED` 只批准研究宇宙，不解除 TQQQ promotion blocker，也不允许用 `3 * QQQ daily return` 合成 TQQQ。|
|`outputs/research_strategies/expanded_universe/static_simplex_grid/static_simplex_grid_index.json/md`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/expanded_universe/static_simplex_grid/static_simplex_grid_metrics.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/expanded_universe/static_simplex_grid/static_simplex_grid_pareto_frontier.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/expanded_universe/static_simplex_grid/static_simplex_grid_risk_bucket_summary.csv`|`aits research strategies expanded-universe static-simplex-grid --step 0.05`|Expanded universe config、validated QQQ/SGOV/TQQQ adjusted-close price cache、validated rates cache、monthly rebalance policy、risk bucket policy|Schema contract：status=`STATIC_SIMPLEX_GRID_READY`；rows include weights、QQQ-equivalent exposure、return / drawdown / Sharpe / Calmar / volatility / turnover / cost / TQQQ contribution fields、risk bucket、data quality status and fixed no-promotion safety fields|生成三资产静态 simplex frontier、risk bucket summary 和后续代表组合输入|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|frontier high rank 不是交易建议；static grid 用 monthly static rebalance，不等同 dynamic actual-path 执行。|
|`docs/research/expanded_universe_static_frontier_review.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/expanded_universe_static_frontier_matrix.yaml`|`aits research strategies expanded-universe static-frontier-review`|Static simplex grid metrics/frontier、expanded universe config、data quality status、risk bucket policy|Schema contract：status=`STATIC_FRONTIER_REVIEW_READY`；记录 grid size、frontier row count、best static candidate、config hash、market regime、date range and fixed safety fields|把 ignored runtime grid 总结为 tracked frontier review/matrix，供 owner 理解同风险静态基准|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|best static candidate 只是当前 risk policy 下的研究结论，不是 production target weight。|
|`outputs/research_strategies/expanded_universe/risk_bucket_representatives.csv`|`aits research strategies expanded-universe risk-bucket-representatives`|Static simplex grid metrics、risk bucket selector policy、QQQ-equivalent exposure buckets|Schema contract：status=`RISK_BUCKET_REPRESENTATIVES_READY`；每个 bucket 输出 highest-return、highest-Sharpe、lowest-drawdown 等代表组合及 metric provenance|从静态 frontier 中抽取可解释代表组合，作为 state-to-portfolio candidate 的候选池|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|representative 不是仓位指令，也不是 dynamic strategy 通过 survival gate。|
|`outputs/research_strategies/expanded_universe/state_portfolio_candidates.json`|`aits research strategies expanded-universe state-portfolio-candidates`|Risk bucket representatives、state mapping policy、trend-state policy、monotonic risk classifier policy|Schema contract：status=`STATE_PORTFOLIO_CANDIDATES_READY`；记录 state weights、source representative、monotonic exposure ordering、violations、config hash and fixed safety fields|构造不局限于 65/35 和 45/55 的 expanded state-to-portfolio candidates|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|monotonic pass 只是形状约束通过，不代表 actual-path edge、overfit guardrail 或 owner approval。|
|`outputs/research_strategies/expanded_universe/actual_path_rebacktest/leaderboard_actual_path.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/expanded_universe/actual_path_rebacktest/leaderboard_target_path_diagnostic.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/expanded_universe/actual_path_rebacktest/target_vs_actual_gap_summary.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/expanded_universe/actual_path_rebacktest/tqqq_risk_summary.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/expanded_universe/actual_path_rebacktest/expanded_universe_promotion_readiness.json`|`aits research strategies expanded-universe actual-path-rebacktest`|State candidates、static frontier candidates、limited-adjustment baseline policy、validated QQQ/SGOV/TQQQ/rates cache、actual-path execution lag and transaction-cost policy|Schema contract：status=`EXPANDED_UNIVERSE_RESEARCH_READY_PROMOTION_BLOCKED`；leaderboard ranking uses actual-path metrics only；target path is diagnostic-only；outputs include TQQQ risk summary、same data quality status、promotion readiness blockers and fixed safety fields|对 expanded static/dynamic candidates 运行 actual-path-only rebacktest，并保留 target-vs-actual gap diagnostic|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|actual-path leaderboard 第一名也不是 promotion；target-path diagnostic 不允许用于 ranking、readiness 或 owner decision 正向依据。|
|`outputs/research_strategies/expanded_universe/actual_path_rebacktest/candidate_failure_matrix.csv`<br/>`docs/research/expanded_actual_path_candidate_failure_matrix.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/expanded_actual_path_candidate_failure_matrix.yaml`|`aits research strategies expanded-universe candidate-failure-matrix`|Actual-path leaderboard、static simplex metrics、state portfolio candidates、TQQQ risk summary、same-risk/survival/walk-forward/net-cost/stress policies in `config/research/expanded_allocation_universe.yaml`|Schema contract：status=`CANDIDATE_FAILURE_MATRIX_READY_PROMOTION_BLOCKED`；每行输出 candidate_id、weights_by_state、tqqq_weight_profile、qqq_equivalent_exposure、actual_return、max_dd、Sharpe、Calmar、same_risk_baseline、delta_vs_same_risk_baseline、verdict、dominating static frontier baseline、TQQQ beta-only、same-risk underperformance、walk-forward/stress/net-cost blockers、failure_reason、next_action 和 fixed safety fields|把 11 个 actual-path candidates 的失败原因拆成候选级矩阵，供 owner 复核为什么没有 surviving candidate|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|failure matrix 是解释性 artifact，不是重新排名或晋升；`next_action` 只描述 research follow-up，不批准 paper-shadow、production、broker 或真实交易。|
|`docs/research/expanded_qqq_sgov_tqqq_allocation_owner_review_pack.md`<br/>`docs/research/tqqq_risk_attribution_review.md`<br/>`docs/research/expanded_dynamic_candidate_survival_review.md`<br/>`docs/research/expanded_universe_walk_forward_review.md`<br/>`docs/research/expanded_universe_net_of_cost_review.md`<br/>`docs/research/expanded_universe_stress_risk_review.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/tqqq_risk_attribution_matrix.yaml`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/expanded_universe_same_risk_baseline_comparison.yaml`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/expanded_dynamic_candidate_survival_matrix.yaml`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/expanded_universe_walk_forward_matrix.yaml`|`aits research strategies expanded-universe owner-review-pack`|Actual-path rebacktest outputs、TQQQ data-quality review、static frontier review, same-risk baseline policy、survival policy、walk-forward/net-cost/stress policies|Schema contract：status=`EXPANDED_OWNER_REVIEW_PACK_READY_PROMOTION_BLOCKED`；must answer owner questions, include TQQQ attribution, same-risk comparison, survival matrix, overfit/walk-forward/cost/stress blockers and fixed no paper-shadow/no production/no broker fields|给 owner 汇总 expanded universe 研究证据、survival conclusion 和后续 blocker|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|owner pack 是人工复核输入，不是 owner approval；surviving candidate count 为 0 时不得把 best dynamic candidate 解释为可推广策略。|

## TRADING-1527～1546 Defensive Overlay Gate and No-Survivor Diagnosis

|产物|生成命令|上游输入|Schema / 安全契约|用途|production 影响|常见误解|
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
|`config/research/defensive_overlay_gate.yaml`|人工治理配置；由 `aits research strategies defensive-overlay full-pack` 读取|Owner 附件、expanded candidate failure matrix、heuristic governance policy|Schema contract：`schema_version=defensive_overlay_gate.v1`；必须包含 owner/status/rationale/intended_effect/validation_evidence/review_condition；所有阈值只为 `pilot_baseline` defensive overlay watch-only gate|把 full allocation gate 与 defensive overlay gate 分开，治理 drawdown/cost/stress/walk-forward/TQQQ pilot 阈值|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|配置存在不等于正式策略门槛；它不允许 promotion、paper-shadow、production 或 broker。|
|`docs/research/expanded_universe_no_survivor_diagnosis.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/expanded_universe_no_survivor_diagnosis.yaml`|`aits research strategies defensive-overlay full-pack`|`candidate_failure_matrix.csv`、defensive overlay gate config、同源 cached data quality gate|Schema contract：status=`EXPANDED_UNIVERSE_NO_SURVIVOR_DIAGNOSIS_READY`；披露 candidate count、full allocation survivor count、static frontier dominance、walk-forward、stress、net-cost blockers 和 fixed safety fields|解释 expanded universe 为什么 no survivor，并作为 overlay reclassification 输入|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|No-survivor diagnosis 不是重新开放 full allocation；它只说明下一层 overlay 诊断的输入边界。|
|`outputs/research_strategies/defensive_overlay/overlay_metrics.csv`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/expanded_candidate_reclassification_matrix.yaml`|`aits research strategies defensive-overlay full-pack`|Failure matrix、candidate actual daily positions、same-risk static baseline weights、validated QQQ/SGOV/TQQQ price cache|Schema contract：reclassification status=`EXPANDED_CANDIDATE_RECLASSIFICATION_READY_PROMOTION_BLOCKED`；metrics row status is expressed by `overlay_classification` / `overlay_gate_passed` and fixed safety fields；每行包含 candidate_id、full_allocation_verdict、same_risk_baseline、actual-path defensive metrics、risk-off attribution、re-risk delay、downside capture、TQQQ exposure、allowed_use 和 blockers|把 full-allocation failure rows 重分类为 primary watch、drawdown-control diagnostic、TQQQ diagnostic、static reference 或 archive|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|`watch_pending` 不是 gate pass；CSV 是 runtime research evidence，不是 broker universe 或 target weights。|
|`inputs/research_reviews/defensive_overlay_candidate_set.yaml`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/defensive_overlay_survival_matrix.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/defensive_overlay_survival_review.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/defensive_overlay_stress_gate.yaml`|`aits research strategies defensive-overlay full-pack`|Overlay metrics、policy thresholds、walk-forward/stress fields from failure matrix|Schema contract：status 包含 `PROMOTION_BLOCKED`；当前 primary watch=`limited_adjustment`，drawdown-control diagnostics 为 expanded state drawdown candidates，high-risk TQQQ candidate 为 research-only diagnostic；overlay_gate_pass_count 当前为 0|定义 defensive overlay candidate set 与 survival/stress gate 结果|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Primary watch 只是 split-evidence pending 的 research-only watch，不是 paper-shadow readiness。|
|`docs/research/defensive_overlay_risk_off_attribution_review.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/defensive_overlay_risk_off_attribution.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/defensive_overlay_re_risk_timing_review.md`<br/>`docs/research/defensive_overlay_downside_stress_review.md`<br/>`docs/research/static_frontier_domination_overlay_interpretation.md`<br/>`docs/research/tqqq_overlay_safety_review.md`<br/>`docs/research/defensive_overlay_net_of_cost_review.md`<br/>`docs/research/expanded_universe_walk_forward_split_evidence_review.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/expanded_universe_walk_forward_split_evidence.yaml`|`aits research strategies defensive-overlay full-pack`|Overlay metrics、candidate set、failure matrix blocker fields|Schema contract：所有 review 输出 `research_only=true`、`promotion_allowed=false`、`paper_shadow_allowed=false`、`production_allowed=false`、`broker_action=none`；target-path metrics 不允许过 gate|分面解释 risk-off attribution、re-risk delay、downside/stress、static frontier domination、TQQQ safety、net-of-cost 和 split-evidence blocker|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|分面 review 不能单独覆盖 survival gate；TQQQ safety review 不是 TQQQ 使用批准。|
|`docs/research/defensive_overlay_owner_review_pack.md`<br/>`docs/research/defensive_overlay_forward_watch_plan.md`|`aits research strategies defensive-overlay full-pack`|No-survivor diagnosis、candidate set、survival matrix、risk-off/stress/net-cost/walk-forward reviews|Schema contract：status=`DEFENSIVE_OVERLAY_OWNER_REVIEW_PACK_READY_PROMOTION_BLOCKED`；owner recommendation 固定为 research-only watch pending split evidence；forward watch plan 只列 required evidence|给 owner 一页式复核 defensive overlay 是否继续观察、需要哪些后续证据|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Owner pack 不是 owner approval；forward watch plan 不是 scheduler activation 或 observation write。|

## TRADING-1547～1586 Policy-Aware First-Layer Trend Calibration

|产物|生成命令|上游输入|Schema / 安全契约|用途|production 影响|常见误解|
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
|`config/research/first_layer_calibration_scope.yaml`<br/>`config/research/dynamic_second_layer_probe_registry.yaml`<br/>`config/research/action_value_score_policy.yaml`<br/>`config/research/first_layer_trend_scorecard_v1.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/first_layer_policy_aware_calibration_scope.md`|`aits research trends full-pack`|Defensive overlay no-survivor 结论、owner 附件、heuristic governance policy、AI-after-ChatGPT regime policy|Schema contract：配置必须包含 owner/status/rationale/intended_effect/validation_evidence/review_condition；second-layer probes 必须 frozen、dynamic、trend-sensitive；static baseline 不得生成 trend labels；第一层输出只能是 trend state / confidence / validity / decay|定义第一层 trend calibration 的 research scope、probe set、label policy 和 scorecard policy|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|scope/config ready 不是恢复 dynamic promotion，也不是允许第一层直接输出 portfolio weights。|
|`outputs/research_trends/action_value_matrix/action_value_matrix.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/action_value_matrix/action_value_summary.json`|`aits research trends full-pack`|Frozen dynamic probes、validated QQQ/SGOV/TQQQ adjusted-close price cache、rates cache、action-value score policy|Schema contract：status=`ACTION_VALUE_MATRIX_READY_PROMOTION_BLOCKED`；future outcome 只用于 ex-post label 生成；输出 probe/date/state action-value、data quality status 和 fixed safety fields|用冻结 dynamic probes 的未来 outcome 构造 action-value matrix，作为 trend label 输入|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Action-value 高分不是交易信号；它只用于校准第一层 label，不允许直接排名仓位。|
|`outputs/research_trends/trend_labels/single_probe_trend_labels.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/trend_labels/consensus_trend_labels.csv`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/consensus_trend_label_summary.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/consensus_trend_label_quality_review.md`|`aits research trends full-pack`|Action-value matrix、consensus label policy、probe validation result|Schema contract：status=`CONSENSUS_TREND_LABELS_READY_PROMOTION_BLOCKED`；记录 label_distribution、agreement、conflict/coverage caveats、probe count 和 fixed safety fields|从 single-probe labels 形成 consensus trend labels，并审计 label 质量|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Consensus label 是训练/评估目标，不是 owner approval 或正式 market regime label。|
|`outputs/research_trends/pit_feature_matrix/pit_feature_matrix.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/pit_feature_matrix/feature_availability_report.json`<br/>`docs/research/first_layer_feature_pit_audit.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/first_layer_feature_pit_audit.yaml`|`aits research trends full-pack`|Validated QQQ prices、rates cache、PIT feature rules、feature availability policy|Schema contract：每行必须带 `known_at`、`available_at`、`decision_at`；non-PIT features 必须 blocked；status=`FIRST_LAYER_FEATURE_PIT_AUDIT_READY`；data-quality status 必须披露|构造第一层模型可用的 PIT feature matrix 并审计未来函数边界|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Feature matrix 不允许从 future action-value 或未来收益反推 features。|
|`outputs/research_trends/models/first_layer_trend_scorecard_v1_predictions.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/models/first_layer_logistic_v1/model_coefficients.json`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/models/first_layer_logistic_v1/walk_forward_predictions.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/walk_forward/first_layer_walk_forward_metrics.json`<br/>`docs/research/first_layer_trend_model_walk_forward_review.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/first_layer_trend_model_walk_forward_matrix.yaml`|`aits research trends full-pack`|PIT feature matrix、consensus labels、scorecard policy、walk-forward split policy|Schema contract：status=`FIRST_LAYER_WALK_FORWARD_REVIEW_READY_PROMOTION_BLOCKED`；模型输出只含 trend_state/confidence/validity_days/decay_profile；walk-forward metrics 和 split evidence 必须披露|评估低复杂度第一层 trend calibration 是否在 walk-forward 中有稳定 edge|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Walk-forward 分数即使改善也不是 paper-shadow readiness；它还必须通过 probe actual-path diagnostics 和 owner review。|
|`outputs/research_trends/probe_backtest/old_first_layer_vs_new_first_layer_actual_path.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/probe_backtest/probe_level_metrics.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/calibrated_first_layer_actual_path_rebacktest/probe_level_metrics.csv`<br/>`docs/research/calibrated_first_layer_defensive_overlay_review.md`<br/>`docs/research/calibrated_first_layer_risk_on_tqqq_diagnostic_review.md`<br/>`docs/research/single_probe_vs_consensus_trend_label_review.md`|`aits research trends full-pack`|Frozen dynamic probes、scorecard/logistic first-layer predictions、validated price cache、probe actual-path execution policy|Schema contract：status=`CALIBRATED_FIRST_LAYER_PROBE_BACKTEST_READY_PROMOTION_BLOCKED`；actual-path diagnostics only；TQQQ risk-on probe remains research-only；target-path diagnostic-only；fixed safety fields|把校准后的第一层 trend state 插回冻结 dynamic probes，比较 overlay、TQQQ 和 consensus label 诊断结果|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Probe backtest 不是新策略 promotion；TQQQ row 只诊断 risk-on behavior，不批准 TQQQ 使用。|
|`docs/research/first_layer_policy_aware_calibration_owner_review_pack.md`<br/>`docs/research/calibrated_first_layer_forward_watch_plan.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/first_layer_policy_aware_calibration_final_matrix.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/first_layer_policy_aware_calibration_closeout.md`|`aits research trends full-pack`|Label quality、PIT audit、walk-forward review、probe backtest、overlay/TQQQ/consensus reviews|Schema contract：final status 当前为 `FIRST_LAYER_CALIBRATION_NO_MATERIAL_IMPROVEMENT_PROMOTION_BLOCKED`；promotion/paper-shadow/production/broker 全部 false/none；forward watch plan 只列 research evidence requirements|给 owner 汇总第一层 trend calibration 的证据、失败/缺口和后续观察条件|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Owner pack 和 watch plan 不是 owner approval、scheduler activation 或 production change。|

## TRADING-1616～1645 First-Layer Up-State Learning Repair

|产物|生成命令|上游输入|Schema / 安全契约|用途|production 影响|常见误解|
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
|`docs/research/first_layer_up_state_failure_diagnosis.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/first_layer_up_state_failure_diagnosis.yaml`|`aits research trends up-state-repair`|上一批 consensus labels、flat walk-forward predictions、flat probe backtest、dynamic probe registry|Schema contract：status=`FIRST_LAYER_UP_STATE_FAILURE_DIAGNOSIS_READY_PROMOTION_BLOCKED`；披露 probe roles、QQQ-equivalent exposure、label/prediction distribution、upper-state gap、actual-path deterioration 和 fixed safety fields|正式固化 first-layer five-class collapse 失败原因|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Failure diagnosis 不是重启 promotion；它只定义 repair input。|
|`outputs/research_trends/trend_labels/hierarchical_trend_labels.csv`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/hierarchical_trend_label_summary.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/upper_state_label_audit.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/upper_state_label_audit.yaml`|`aits research trends up-state-repair`|Consensus labels、walk-forward split policy、upper-state label policy|Schema contract：label summary status=`HIERARCHICAL_TREND_LABELS_READY_PROMOTION_BLOCKED`，audit status=`UPPER_STATE_LABEL_AUDIT_READY_PROMOTION_BLOCKED`；labels include risk_off_binary_label、upper_state_binary_label、three_zone_label、risk_on_severity_label；split audit 必须披露 train/validation upper-state counts 和 collapse risk|把 constructive+risk_on 合并为 upper_state，并审计 split 覆盖|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Upper-state label 存在不代表上行可交易；它仍需 walk-forward 和 actual-path 证明。|

## TRADING-1766～1785 First-Layer Walk-Forward Coverage Rebuild

|产物|生成命令|上游输入|Schema / 安全契约|用途|production 影响|常见误解|
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
|`config/research/first_layer_walk_forward_coverage_policy_v2.yaml`<br/>`config/research/first_layer_feature_optionalization_policy.yaml`<br/>`config/research/first_layer_v2_coverage_aware_selection_rule.yaml`|`aits research trends first-layer-coverage-rebuild`|TRADING-1736～1765 coverage blocker、frozen `dynamic_second_layer_probe_registry_v2`、primary research window policy|Schema contract：`schema_version` / `status=pilot_baseline` configs; coverage variants 必须包含 `wf_504d_baseline`、`wf_378d_initial`、`wf_252d_initial`、`wf_expanding_initial`、`wf_warm_start_diagnostic`；coverage pass 要求 first prediction <= `2022-03-01`；feature optionalization 禁止 future data fill；selection rule 要求 coverage、actual-path、defensive probe、net-of-cost、2022 slice 和 same-risk reporting|把 2023-02-22 prediction start blocker 改写成可审计的 coverage policy and selection rule|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Coverage policy 存在不代表 promotion；warm-start 只可 diagnostic，不可 owner review 或 promotion。|
|`docs/research/first_layer_v2_coverage_blocker_diagnosis.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/first_layer_v2_coverage_blocker_diagnosis.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/first_layer_walk_forward_coverage_simulation.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/first_layer_walk_forward_coverage_simulation_matrix.yaml`|`aits research trends first-layer-coverage-rebuild`|Threshold policy v2、action-value horizon、PIT feature matrix v3、primary labels、coverage policy v2|Schema contract：`report_type=first_layer_v2_coverage_blocker_diagnosis` / `report_type=first_layer_walk_forward_coverage_simulation_matrix`；status 分别为 `FIRST_LAYER_V2_COVERAGE_BLOCKER_DIAGNOSIS_READY_PROMOTION_BLOCKED` / `FIRST_LAYER_WALK_FORWARD_COVERAGE_SIMULATION_READY_PROMOTION_BLOCKED`；必须解释 baseline first prediction=`2023-02-22`；每个 coverage policy row 输出 first train/validation/prediction date、2022 coverage、risk-off/recovery coverage、coverage pass 和 block reason|拆清楚旧 504d rolling window 为什么错过 2022，并模拟较短初始窗口/expanding window 是否补齐 coverage|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|`wf_252d_initial` 和 `wf_expanding_initial` 覆盖通过只说明可评价 2022，不说明 actual-path 仍占优。|
|`docs/research/first_layer_v2_early_feature_coverage_audit.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/first_layer_v2_early_feature_coverage_audit.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/first_layer_v2_coverage_rebuild_model_review.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/first_layer_v2_coverage_rebuild_model_matrix.yaml`|`aits research trends first-layer-coverage-rebuild`|PIT feature matrix/report、feature optionalization policy、upper-state labels v2、coverage variants、composer v2 config|Schema contract：`report_type=first_layer_v2_early_feature_coverage_audit` / `report_type=first_layer_v2_coverage_rebuild_model_matrix`；status 分别为 `EARLY_FEATURE_COVERAGE_PASS` / `FIRST_LAYER_V2_COVERAGE_REBUILD_MODEL_MATRIX_READY_PROMOTION_BLOCKED`；core features cannot be optionalized; optional fills must be neutral PIT fills with missing indicator; model rows disclose first_prediction_date、prediction count、coverage pass and safety boundary|确认 early 2021/2022 features 不是 blocker，并训练 coverage-aware first-layer model variants|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Feature optionalization pass 不是新增外部数据源批准，也不允许 future fill 或目标路径调参。|
|`docs/research/first_layer_v2_coverage_policy_actual_path_review.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/first_layer_v2_coverage_policy_actual_path_matrix.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/first_layer_v2_2022_stress_recovery_slice_review.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/first_layer_v2_2022_slice_matrix.yaml`|`aits research trends first-layer-coverage-rebuild`|Coverage policy composer predictions、validated QQQ/SGOV/TQQQ prices、frozen probe registry v2、same-risk frontier matrix、2022 risk-off/recovery slice policy|Schema contract：`report_type=first_layer_v2_coverage_policy_actual_path_matrix` / `report_type=first_layer_v2_2022_slice_matrix`；status 分别为 `FIRST_LAYER_V2_COVERAGE_POLICY_ACTUAL_PATH_READY_PROMOTION_BLOCKED` / `FIRST_LAYER_V2_2022_STRESS_RECOVERY_SLICE_READY_PROMOTION_BLOCKED`；actual-path rows include probe_count=8, improved probe count, defensive regression, net-of-cost proxy, same-risk reporting, 2022 slice gate and selection pass; target-path metrics cannot pass|把 coverage variants 接回 frozen probes，检查覆盖 2022 后 actual-path 是否仍可 owner review|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|旧 baseline 8/8 improvement 因 coverage late 不能用；覆盖通过的 `wf_252d_initial` / `wf_expanding_initial` 当前被 defensive probe regression 阻断。|
|`docs/research/first_layer_v2_coverage_rebuild_failure_attribution.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/first_layer_v2_coverage_rebuild_failure_attribution.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/first_layer_v2_coverage_rebuild_owner_pack.md`<br/>`docs/research/first_layer_v2_walk_forward_coverage_rebuild_closeout.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/first_layer_v2_walk_forward_coverage_rebuild_final_matrix.yaml`|`aits research trends first-layer-coverage-rebuild`|Coverage blocker, simulation, early feature audit, actual-path review and 2022 slice review|Schema contract：failure attribution must output policy-level reasons; current primary reason=`DEFENSIVE_PROBE_REGRESSION`; final status=`COVERAGE_REBUILD_SUCCESS_ACTION_PATH_NO_LONGER_IMPROVES`; owner review remains false and promotion blocked|形成 coverage rebuild 的 owner-facing closeout，说明 coverage blocker 已解决但 actual-path edge 未保留|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Coverage rebuild success 不等于 first-layer v2 promotion；当前 next action 是保持 blocked，而不是 owner approval、paper-shadow 或 production。|

|产物|生成命令|上游输入|Schema / 安全契约|用途|production 影响|常见误解|
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
|`config/research/return_seeking_diagnostic_lane_policy.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/return_seeking_diagnostic_lane_scope.md`|`aits research trends return-seeking-diagnostic-lane`|TRADING-1806～1840 lane policy / defensive lane closeout、frozen `dynamic_second_layer_probe_registry_v2`、heuristic governance policy|Schema contract：policy status=`pilot_baseline`; allowed signals limited to `stay_constructive` / `add_risk` / `high_confidence_risk_on`; blocked downstream usage includes defensive overlay、full allocation、gated integration、promotion、paper-shadow、production、broker; safety fields fixed false/none|定义 return-seeking diagnostic-only scope、reference model、beta/TQQQ attribution and 2023+ dependence thresholds|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Diagnostic policy ready 不是允许 add-risk 接 defensive overlay，也不是 gated integration pre-approval。|
|`docs/research/return_seeking_signal_audit.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/return_seeking_signal_audit.yaml`|`aits research trends return-seeking-diagnostic-lane`|First-layer composer v2 predictions、return-seeking diagnostic policy、frozen return-seeking probe list|Schema contract：status=`RETURN_SEEKING_SIGNAL_AUDIT_READY_PROMOTION_BLOCKED`; records prediction count、constructive/risk-on state counts、stay_constructive/add_risk/high-confidence risk-on counts; every signal row allows only `return_seeking_diagnostic` and blocks defensive overlay/promotion|审计上行信号存在性和允许/禁止用途，防止 signal 被误接到防御或晋升路径|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Positive add-risk count 只是样本分布，不是仓位建议或 allocation approval。|
|`docs/research/return_seeking_actual_path_review.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/return_seeking_actual_path_matrix.yaml`|`aits research trends return-seeking-diagnostic-lane`|Composer v2 predictions、`no_return_seeking_reference`、validated prices、frozen return-seeking probes|Schema contract：status=`RETURN_SEEKING_ACTUAL_PATH_UPSIDE_WITH_DRAWDOWN_REGRESSION_PROMOTION_BLOCKED`; 7/7 probes have positive return delta but 7/7 have drawdown regression, diagnostic value count=0; all downstream safety fields false/none|判断上行信号接回 return-seeking probes 后是否有 actual-path diagnostic edge|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Return upside 不等于可保留策略；drawdown regression blocks diagnostic value and promotion。|
|`docs/research/return_seeking_beta_tqqq_attribution.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/return_seeking_beta_tqqq_attribution.yaml`|`aits research trends return-seeking-diagnostic-lane`|Return-seeking actual-path rows、probe weights、QQQ/SGOV/TQQQ returns、policy attribution thresholds|Schema contract：status=`RETURN_SEEKING_BETA_TQQQ_ATTRIBUTION_DEPENDENT_PROMOTION_BLOCKED`; rows expose avg QQQ-equivalent exposure、TQQQ beta share、component contribution proxy and dependency flags; TQQQ-dependent count currently >0|拆解 return upside 是否来自 QQQ-equivalent beta / TQQQ beta，而不是独立 timing edge|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|TQQQ beta attribution 不批准 TQQQ 使用；它是阻断/解释证据。|
|`docs/research/return_seeking_2022_vs_2023_contrast.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/return_seeking_2022_vs_2023_contrast.yaml`|`aits research trends return-seeking-diagnostic-lane`|Return-seeking predictions、frozen probes、2022 stress/recovery slice、2023+ AI trend slice|Schema contract：status=`RETURN_SEEKING_2022_VS_2023_CONTRAST_READY_PROMOTION_BLOCKED`; positive delta count 2022=`0`, positive delta count 2023+=`7`, `depends_on_2023_plus=true`|区分上行信号是否主要依赖 2023+ AI/tech trend，而非跨窗口稳定 edge|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|2023+ positive delta 不是 validation pass；它提示 regime dependence and overfit risk。|
|`docs/research/return_seeking_diagnostic_lane_closeout.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/return_seeking_diagnostic_lane_final_matrix.yaml`|`aits research trends return-seeking-diagnostic-lane`|Signal audit、actual-path review、beta/TQQQ attribution、2022 vs 2023+ contrast、same cached data quality gate|Schema contract：final status=`RETURN_SEEKING_DIAGNOSTIC_UPSIDE_DEPENDENT_DRAWDOWN_REGRESSED_PROMOTION_BLOCKED`; positive return delta count=7, drawdown regression count=7, diagnostic value count=0, beta/TQQQ dependency and 2023+ dependence true, gated integration false|收口 Phase 3：上行信号只能作为依赖性诊断解释，不进入 defensive overlay、full allocation、gated integration 或 promotion|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Final matrix 不是 Phase 4 解锁条件；Phase 2 无 material defensive improvement 且 Phase 3 无 risk-adjusted diagnostic value。|

## TRADING-1806～1885 Two-Lane Optimization Master Closeout

|产物|生成命令|上游输入|Schema / 安全契约|用途|production 影响|常见误解|
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
|`docs/research/two_lane_optimization_master_closeout.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/two_lane_optimization_master_final_matrix.yaml`|Manual tracked closeout review for TRADING-1806_to_1885|Phase 1 lane separation final matrix、Phase 2 defensive lane final matrix、Phase 3 return-seeking final matrix、Phase 4/5 roadmap blocked state、task register|Schema contract：final status=`TWO_LANE_OPTIMIZATION_DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY_INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE_PROMOTION_BLOCKED`; Phase 4=`BLOCKED_OWNER_INPUT`; Phase 5=`BLOCKED_OWNER_INPUT`; candidate_count=0; gated integration and candidate validation disabled; promotion/paper-shadow/production/broker false/none|收口 owner 附件完整范围，证明 Phase 4/5 是 gate-defined stop state，并固定暂停 automatic first-layer trend strategy、只保留 diagnostic-only / owner-reviewed future evidence|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Master closeout 不是 Phase 4/5 实现，也不是候选验证；blocked state 表示不能继续 gated overlay 或 validation，除非 owner 重开 policy 或新增证据改变 Phase 2/3 gate 结论。|
|`config/research/two_layer_strategy_boundary_contract.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/two_layer_strategy_boundary_contract.md`|Manual governed boundary contract for TRADING-1906|TRADING-1806～1885 master closeout、two-lane signal policy、research audit metadata policy|Schema contract：status=`BOUNDARY_CONTRACT_READY`; 包含 `first_layer_contract`、`second_layer_contract`、`evaluation_contract`、`probe_vs_candidate_boundary` 和 `diagnostic_vs_allocation_boundary`; first layer `can_emit_weights=false`; second layer raw indicators blocked|建立 boundary-aware first-layer / second-layer 职责边界，阻断 universal first-layer 和未授权 allocation usage|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Boundary contract ready 不是 strategy ready，也不是允许 return-seeking signal 进入 allocation。|
|`inputs/research_reviews/first_layer_signal_usage_matrix_v2.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/first_layer_signal_usage_matrix_v2.md`|Manual tracked signal usage matrix v2 for TRADING-1907|Boundary contract、channel policy、first-layer v2 diagnostic-only closeout|Schema contract：status=`SIGNAL_USAGE_MATRIX_V2_READY_PROMOTION_BLOCKED`; 9 个 signals 均包含 `channel`、`allowed_usage`、`blocked_usage`、`required_veto`、`diagnostic_only` 和 `can_emit_weights=false`; `add_risk` blocked from defensive overlay/growth overlay/allocation|逐 signal 固化 defensive、return-seeking diagnostic、risk-veto 三类 channel 的下游用途边界|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|`add_risk` 在 matrix 中存在只表示可做 diagnostic attribution，不是可加仓信号。|
|`config/research/first_layer_channel_policy.yaml`|Manual governed channel policy for TRADING-1908|Boundary contract、signal usage matrix v2|Schema contract：status=`CHANNEL_POLICY_READY`; defensive channel cannot emit add-risk/risk-on/TQQQ; return-seeking channel `DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY`; risk-veto priority=`highest`; promotion blocked|定义 defensive、return-seeking diagnostic 和 risk-veto channel 的职责、禁止输出和 veto priority|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Channel policy ready 不代表任何 channel 已获得 owner-review candidate 资格。|
|`config/research/base_overlay_veto_policy_schema.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/base_overlay_veto_policy_design.md`|Manual governed base overlay veto schema for TRADING-1910|Boundary contract、signal usage matrix v2、channel policy|Schema contract：status=`BASE_OVERLAY_VETO_FRAMEWORK_READY`; base weights QQQ/SGOV/TQQQ=0.60/0.40/0.00; defensive/growth overlay deltas; veto rules; TQQQ cap; QQQ-equivalent cap; raw indicators blocked; output long-only/sum-to-one/audit trace|给 `two_layer_policy_compiler` 提供 research-only base + overlay + veto schema|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Growth overlay deltas 存在不等于当前启用；diagnostic-only signals 仍会被 compiler 阻断。|
|`config/research/indicator_family_registry.yaml`<br/>`config/research/indicator_family_ablation_selection_rule.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/indicator_family_ablation_review.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/indicator_family_ablation_matrix.yaml`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/indicator_family_ablation_final_matrix.yaml`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/indicator_family_ablation/action_value_by_family.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/indicator_family_ablation/action_value_by_family_summary.json`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/indicator_family_ablation/family_only_models/*.json`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/indicator_family_ablation/indicator_family_ablation_summary.yaml`|`aits research trends indicator-family-ablation`|Indicator family registry、selection rule、PIT feature matrix v3、upper-state labels v2、action-value matrix v2|Schema contract：registry status=`INDICATOR_FAMILY_REGISTRY_READY`; ablation status=`INDICATOR_FAMILY_ABLATION_EVIDENCE_READY`; action-value dataset status=`INDICATOR_FAMILY_ACTION_VALUE_DATASET_READY`; final matrix flags include `DO_NOT_DERISK_FAMILY_FOUND`、`RISK_ON_VETO_FAMILY_FOUND`、`ADD_RISK_FAMILY_DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY`、`PIT_BLOCKERS_REMAIN`; candidate_count=0; data_quality_contract=`PREVIOUS_VALIDATED_RESEARCH_ARTIFACTS`; all YAML outputs carry `research_audit_metadata`|把 registry-only diagnostic 推进到 family-level PIT / coverage / action-value evidence，并给下一轮 channel-specific first-layer model 形成 research-only family eligibility|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Evidence ready 不是 strategy ready；selected family 只允许进入下一轮 research-only channel model，不允许直接生成 weights、promotion、paper-shadow、production 或 broker action。|
|`docs/research/indicator_family_pit_coverage_audit.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/indicator_family_pit_coverage_matrix.yaml`|`aits research trends indicator-family-ablation`|Indicator family registry、PIT feature matrix v3、selection rule coverage thresholds|Schema contract：status=`INDICATOR_FAMILY_PIT_COVERAGE_AUDIT_READY`; seven family rows; allowed coverage statuses include `PIT_COVERAGE_PASS`、`PIT_COVERAGE_WARNING`、`PIT_BLOCKED`、`INSUFFICIENT_PRIMARY_WINDOW_COVERAGE`; current pass=5、blocked=2|审计每个 family 的 actual PIT columns、missing columns、primary/legacy/sensitivity coverage、earliest usable date 和 2022 slice coverage|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|PIT coverage pass 只说明已有 feature evidence 可审计；不代表 channel usefulness 或 allocation approval。|
|`docs/research/indicator_family_do_not_de_risk_review.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/indicator_family_do_not_de_risk_matrix.yaml`|`aits research trends indicator-family-ablation`|Action-value by family dataset、PIT coverage matrix、selection rule `do_not_de_risk` gate|Schema contract：status=`INDICATOR_FAMILY_DO_NOT_DE_RISK_REVIEW_READY`; rows include false risk-off cost、missed upside、selected_for_channel、verdict and blocked usage; all rows `diagnostic_only=true`|判断 family 是否能减少 false risk-off / missed upside 并进入 do_not_de_risk research channel|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|do_not_de_risk family found 不等于防御策略已通过；仍需下一轮 channel model 和 owner review。|
|`docs/research/indicator_family_add_risk_review.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/indicator_family_add_risk_matrix.yaml`|`aits research trends indicator-family-ablation`|Action-value by family dataset、2023+ dependence matrix、beta/TQQQ dependency matrix、selection rule `add_risk` gate|Schema contract：status=`INDICATOR_FAMILY_ADD_RISK_REVIEW_READY`; add-risk selected family count currently 0; beta/TQQQ dependent and 2023+ dependent rows cannot pass add-risk selection|审计 family 是否能在 same-risk 条件下降低 false add-risk cost；当前结论为 add-risk diagnostic-only|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Add-risk review 不是加仓信号；没有 family 获准进入 allocation 或 TQQQ increase。|
|`docs/research/indicator_family_risk_on_veto_review.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/indicator_family_risk_on_veto_matrix.yaml`|`aits research trends indicator-family-ablation`|Action-value by family dataset、PIT coverage matrix、selection rule `risk_on_veto` gate|Schema contract：status=`INDICATOR_FAMILY_RISK_ON_VETO_REVIEW_READY`; rows include false add-risk cost、captured upside tradeoff、veto_effect、selected_for_channel and blocked usage|判断 family 是否适合作为 risk-on veto，用于阻断 false add-risk / growth overlay，而不是增强 risk-on|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Risk-on veto family found 不是 risk-on strategy approval；veto 优先级是 blocker，不是 return boost。|
|`docs/research/indicator_family_selection_review.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/indicator_family_selection_matrix.yaml`|`aits research trends indicator-family-ablation`|PIT coverage audit、channel reviews、2022 slice、2023+ dependence、beta/TQQQ dependence|Schema contract：status=`INDICATOR_FAMILY_SELECTION_READY`; rows contain allowed_channels、blocked_channels、diagnostic_only、selected_for_next_model、required_veto、rejected_reason; candidate_count=0|汇总每个 family 的 channel eligibility、diagnostic-only/rejection 结论和下一轮 channel-specific first-layer model 输入边界|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|`selected_for_next_model=true` 只表示下一轮 research-only feature eligibility，不是候选策略、仓位或 owner approval。|
|`config/research/channel_specific_feature_set_v1.yaml`|`aits research trends indicator-family-ablation`|Indicator family selection matrix、boundary contract、first-layer signal usage matrix v2|Schema contract：status=`CHANNEL_SPECIFIC_FEATURE_SET_READY_RESEARCH_ONLY`; do_not_de_risk allowed=`drawdown_recovery`; risk_on_veto allowed=`volatility_compression`/`rates_liquidity`; add_risk allowed=[]; return_seeking_diagnostic allowed=`trend_persistence`/`relative_strength`; `can_emit_weights=false`|给后续 channel-specific first-layer model v3 提供 research-only feature family whitelist 和 blocked family list|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Feature set ready 不是训练完成或上线许可；它只是下一轮研究的输入白名单。|

schema、signal usage matrix v2、frozen `dynamic_second_layer_probe_registry_v2`、validated QQQ/SGOV/TQQQ price cache and rates cache|Schema contract：scope/lock/label/model/dry-run/actual-path/selection/final outputs carry `research_audit_metadata.modified_channel=channel_specific_first_layer_v3`; selected families limited to `drawdown_recovery` for do_not_de_risk and `volatility_compression`/`rates_liquidity` for risk_on_veto; composer fields exclude portfolio weights and trade actions; dry-run blocks growth overlay when veto active; actual-path matrix discloses data_quality_status; final status currently `CHANNEL_V3_RISK_ON_VETO_ONLY`; candidate_count=0|构建 channel-specific first-layer v3 diagnostics，验证 risk-on veto |`config/research/risk_on_veto_policy.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/risk_on_veto_optimization_track.md`|Manual governed risk-on veto policy for TRADING-1916|Return-seeking diagnostic lane closeout、boundary contract、base overlay veto schema|Schema contract：status=`RISK_ON_VETO_TRACK_READY`; veto types include risk_off/volatility/event/trend_break/tqqq; selection_rule `pre_registered=true`; active veto sets growth_overlay=0, TQQQ_delta=0 and add_risk blocked|预注册 risk-on veto track，用于减少 false add-risk 和 defensive probe regression|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Risk-on veto track 不是 risk-on strategy；它优先研究 blocker，而不是 return boost。|
|`config/research/return_seeking_diagnostic_forward_log.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/return_seeking_diagnostic_forward_log_spec.md`|Manual governed return-seeking diagnostic forward log for TRADING-1917|Return-seeking diagnostic lane closeout、signal usage matrix v2|Schema contract：status=`RETURN_SEEKING_DIAGNOSTIC_LOG_READY`; allowed fields limited to signal/confidence/diagnostic flag/future realized outcomes; blocked fields include target_weights/trade_advice/paper_shadow_action/broker_action; `can_emit_weights=false`|定义 return-seeking diagnostic forward logging 字段，保证 forward watch 只记录诊断结果和未来实现 outcome|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Forward log 不是 paper-shadow action list，也不是交易建议。|
|`docs/research/boundary_aware_two_layer_owner_review_template.md`<br/>`docs/research/boundary_aware_two_layer_optimization_framework_closeout.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/boundary_aware_two_layer_optimization_framework_final_matrix.yaml`|Manual tracked closeout review for TRADING-1906_to_1945|Boundary contract、usage matrix v2、channel policy、base/overlay/veto schema、ablation matrix、selection rules、forward log|Schema contract：final status=`BASE_OVERLAY_VETO_FRAMEWORK_READY`; status_flags include `BOUNDARY_CONTRACT_READY`, `CHANNEL_POLICY_READY`, `INDICATOR_FAMILY_ABLATION_READY`, `DO_NOT_DERISK_TRACK_READY`, `RISK_ON_VETO_TRACK_READY`; candidate_count=0; promotion/paper-shadow/production/broker false/none|收口 boundary-aware two-layer framework，给 owner review 模板和最终 matrix，明确这是 framework ready 而不是 strategy ready|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Closeout 不是恢复 gated integration；所有结果仍 research-only / diagnostic-only。|

## TRADING-2006～2025 Risk-On Veto Observe-Only Diagnostic

|产物|生成命令|上游输入|Schema / 安全契约|用途|production 影响|常见误解|
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
|`config/research/risk_on_veto_diagnostic_contract.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/risk_on_veto_diagnostic_contract.md`<br/>`config/research/risk_on_veto_metric_policy.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/risk_on_veto_metric_definitions.md`<br/>`config/research/risk_on_veto_forward_log.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/risk_on_veto_forward_log_spec.md`|Manual governed observe-only policies for TRADING-2006_to_2025|TRADING-1976～2005 final matrix、risk-on veto v3 selection rule、boundary contract、signal usage matrix v2|Schema contract：`risk_on_veto` status=`observe_only`; signal_type=`veto`; `can_emit_weights=false`; `can_emit_trade_advice=false`; growth overlay、TQQQ、owner review、promotion、paper-shadow、production、broker 全部 disabled；metric policy 必须区分 raw active/inactive cost、avoided cost、captured-upside lost 和 net benefit；forward log blocked fields 包含 target_weights/trade_action/recommended_allocation/QQQ/SGOV/TQQQ 等|把 risk-on veto 固化为 blocker / diagnostic contract，并治理后续 forward diagnostic log 字段|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Observe-only contract 不是 promotion contract；active raw cost 高低不能单独解释 veto 有效性。|
|`outputs/research_trends/risk_on_veto_diagnostic/risk_on_veto_episodes.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/risk_on_veto_diagnostic/summary.json`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/risk_on_veto_observe_only_diagnostic.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/risk_on_veto_observe_only_diagnostic_review.md`|`aits research trends risk-on-veto-diagnostic`|Channel-specific v3 risk-on veto labels、channel composer v3 predictions、baseline first-layer composer v2 predictions、channel PIT matrix、validated QQQ/SGOV/TQQQ price cache and rates cache、diagnostic contract、metric policy|Schema contract：runner 先调用同源 cached data quality gate；episode CSV 字段只含 date、veto state、feature snapshots、reference add-risk blocker、future outcomes、captured-upside lost、avoided cost 和 net benefit；不含 target_weights、trade_action、recommended_allocation、broker action 或 asset weight columns；summary 披露 data_quality_status 和 fixed safety fields|生成 risk-on veto observe-only episode log 与 summary，供 owner 理解 veto active/inactive、blocked reference、avoided false-add-risk cost、lost upside 和 net benefit|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Episode log 是每日 diagnostic observation，不是交易日志、paper-shadow action 或 allocation output。|
|`inputs/research_reviews/channel_specific_v3_closeout_reclassification.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/channel_specific_v3_closeout_reclassification.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/do_not_de_risk_v3_archive.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/do_not_de_risk_v3_archive_review.md`|`aits research trends risk-on-veto-diagnostic`|Channel-specific v3 final matrix、selection rule result、false risk-off review、2022 slice、actual-path matrix|Schema contract：closeout status=`CHANNEL_V3_NO_ALLOCATION_CANDIDATE`; do-not archive status=`DO_NOT_DERISK_V3_ARCHIVED_NO_MATERIAL_IMPROVEMENT`; owner review / promotion / paper-shadow / production / broker 全部 false/blocked/none|把 TRADING-1976～2005 结论重新分类：risk-on veto 仅 observe-only，do-not-de-risk v3 归档为 no-material-improvement|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|`risk_on_veto_pass=true` 不是 allocation candidate；`do_not_de_risk` 归档不表示该 family 永久无效，只表示本批 v3 无 material improvement。|
|`inputs/research_reviews/risk_on_veto_2022_2023_behavior.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/risk_on_veto_2022_2023_behavior_review.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/risk_on_veto_tradeoff_matrix.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/risk_on_veto_tradeoff_review.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/risk_on_veto_return_seeking_diagnostic_compatibility.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/risk_on_veto_return_seeking_diagnostic_compatibility.md`<br/>`docs/research/risk_on_veto_observe_only_owner_brief.md`|`aits research trends risk-on-veto-diagnostic`|Episode log、summary JSON、2022 slice matrix、2023+ dependence matrix、actual-path matrix、false add-risk reduction matrix|Schema contract：behavior review 比较 2022 drawdown/transition、2023+ AI/tech trend 和 primary full window；tradeoff matrix 回答 false add-risk reduction、lost upside、net veto benefit、defensive regression reduction 和 return-seeking over-conservatism；compatibility 允许状态仅为 `VETO_COMPATIBLE_WITH_RETURN_SEEKING_DIAGNOSTIC` / `VETO_TOO_STRICT_FOR_RETURN_SEEKING_DIAGNOSTIC` / `VETO_DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY_NO_INTEGRATION`，且始终 `can_emit_allocation=false`|把 risk-on veto 的保留价值和代价写成 owner 可读的诊断结论|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|兼容或不兼容都不允许输出 allocation；当前 tradeoff 为 observe-only 证据，不是继续调参或接 broker 的理由。|

## TRADING-2026～2045 First-Layer Channel Closeout and Reopen Criteria

|产物|生成命令|上游输入|Schema / 安全契约|用途|production 影响|常见误解|
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
|`config/research/first_layer_channel_archive_policy.yaml`<br/>`config/research/first_layer_forward_diagnostic_minimal_plan.yaml`|Manual governed archive and disabled forward diagnostic policies for TRADING-2026_to_2045|TRADING-2006～2025 observe-only diagnostic、TRADING-1976～2005 channel-specific v3 closeout、boundary contract、signal usage matrix v2|Schema contract：archive policy status=`FIRST_LAYER_CHANNEL_ARCHIVE_POLICY_READY`; forward diagnostic plan `enabled=false`; allowed outputs limited to signal_name / diagnostic_flag / confidence / future_realized_outcome; blocked outputs include weights、trade_advice、target_allocation、broker_action|治理当前 first-layer channel archive status、reopen trigger 和未来最小 forward diagnostic 边界|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|配置存在不等于启动 forward watch；owner approval 之前不能记录正式 forward diagnostic，也不能输出 allocation。|
|`inputs/research_reviews/first_layer_channel_master_closeout.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/first_layer_channel_master_closeout.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/first_layer_channel_status_matrix.yaml`|`aits research trends first-layer-channel-closeout`|Do-not-de-risk v3 archive、risk-on veto observe-only diagnostic/tradeoff/compatibility、indicator family selection matrix、return-seeking and defensive lane final matrices、channel-specific v3 final matrix|Schema contract：status=`FIRST_LAYER_CHANNEL_RESEARCH_CLOSED_NO_CANDIDATE`; rows cover do_not_de_risk_v3、risk_on_veto_v3、add_risk、return_seeking_diagnostic、defensive_channel、risk_veto_channel、breadth_participation and event_risk; candidate_count=0; owner review、promotion、paper-shadow、production、broker all blocked/false/none|正式收口当前 first-layer channel 研究，并把每个 channel 的 allowed/blocked usage、blockers、reopen conditions 和 evidence artifacts 固化为审计矩阵|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Closeout 不是永久否定所有 future research；它只说明当前证据无候选，重开必须满足预注册 reopen criteria。|
|`inputs/research_reviews/first_layer_diagnostic_evidence_labeling.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/first_layer_diagnostic_evidence_labeling_review.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/first_layer_channel_reopen_criteria.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/first_layer_channel_reopen_criteria.md`|`aits research trends first-layer-channel-closeout`|Master closeout、archive policy、risk-on veto compatibility、indicator family selection blockers|Schema contract：diagnostic labels include `ARCHIVED_RESEARCH_EVIDENCE`、`HISTORICAL_DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY`、`NOT_OWNER_REVIEWABLE`、`NOT_PROMOTION_EVIDENCE`、`NO_ALLOCATION_OUTPUT`; reopen criteria require PIT-approved source, pre-registered selection rule, primary 2021 window, same-risk static frontier pass, non-beta/TQQQ-only evidence, not 2023+ only, net-of-cost effectiveness and manual owner approval|把历史诊断证据和重开条件分开，防止后续把归档证据误当 owner review 或 promotion evidence|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|单次历史 rerun、2023+ only 改善、target-path only、缺 PIT metadata 或缺 owner approval 都不能重开 channel。|
|`inputs/research_reviews/first_layer_pit_data_gap_roadmap.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/first_layer_pit_data_gap_roadmap.md`<br/>`docs/research/first_layer_forward_diagnostic_minimal_plan.md`<br/>`docs/research/first_layer_channel_closeout_owner_brief.md`|`aits research trends first-layer-channel-closeout`|PIT-blocked family rows、reopen criteria、forward diagnostic minimal plan config|Schema contract：PIT roadmap rows include family_name、why_it_matters、current_status=`PIT_BLOCKED`、needed_source、minimum_required_fields、expected_usage、blocked_until; owner brief answers closeout、archive、risk_on_veto、add-risk、historical diagnostics、data gaps and blocked promotion questions|给 owner 提供后续数据源补齐路线、禁用的 minimal forward plan 和中文 closeout brief|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|PIT roadmap 是解除 blocker 的条件清单，不是用公开 convenience source 或非 PIT 数据补模型的许可。|

## TRADING-1666～1705 Upper-State Label / Feature Reset

|产物|生成命令|上游输入|Schema / 安全契约|用途|production 影响|常见误解|
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
|`config/research/alternating_two_layer_research_protocol.yaml`<br/>`config/research/upper_state_label_taxonomy_v2.yaml`<br/>`config/research/action_value_score_policy_v2.yaml`<br/>`config/research/first_layer_threshold_policy_v2.yaml`<br/>`config/research/first_layer_composer_v2.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/up_state_repair_result_review.md`<br/>`docs/research/alternating_two_layer_research_protocol.md`<br/>`docs/research/upper_state_label_taxonomy_reset.md`<br/>`docs/research/window_aware_upper_state_label_regeneration_plan.md`|`aits research trends upper-state-reset`|TRADING-1616～1645 up-state repair failure evidence、TRADING-1646～1665 research window registry、frozen second-layer probe registry、heuristic governance policy|Schema contract：configs 必须含 owner/status/rationale/intended_effect/validation_evidence/review_condition；protocol 要求 first-layer round freeze second-layer、second-layer round freeze first-layer、validation round freeze both；target-path metrics cannot pass first-layer gate；所有 safety fields false/none|把 `upper_state_detector_v1` 失败结论固化，并把上行研究重置为 do_not_de_risk / stay_constructive / add_risk / high_confidence_risk_on 四个 action-value 标签|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Taxonomy/config ready 不是继续微调旧 detector，也不是允许第一层直接输出 portfolio weights。|
|`outputs/research_trends/action_value_matrix_v2/action_value_matrix_v2.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/action_value_matrix_v2/action_value_summary_v2.json`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/trend_labels/upper_state_labels_v2.csv`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/upper_state_label_v2_summary.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/upper_state_label_quality_review_v2.md`|`aits research trends upper-state-reset`|Validated QQQ/SGOV/TQQQ price cache、rates cache、research window registry、frozen second-layer probes、action-value score policy v2、taxonomy v2|Schema contract：`report_type=upper_state_label_v2_summary`、`status=UPPER_STATE_LABELS_V2_READY_PROMOTION_BLOCKED`；每行包含 `research_window_id`、requested/actual start、actual portfolio start、window role、data_quality_contract；future outcome 只用于 label generation；target-path metrics not used for pass；真实 run action-value rows=57,312、label rows=14,328、primary horizon-20 label rows=1,282|为四个上行 action questions 生成 multi-window action-value matrix 和 v2 labels，并披露 high-confidence share、disagreement、positive sample count|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Label positive count 或 high-confidence risk-on sample PASS 不是 risk-on promotion evidence；risk-on 仍是 research-only diagnostic。|
|`inputs/research_reviews/up_state_feature_inventory_v2.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/up_state_feature_inventory_review.md`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/pit_feature_matrix/pit_feature_matrix_v3.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/pit_feature_matrix/pit_feature_matrix_v3_report.json`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/first_layer_feature_pit_audit_v3.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/first_layer_feature_pit_audit_v3.md`|`aits research trends upper-state-reset`|Primary validated window prices/rates、PIT feature inventory v2、blocked unavailable feature list|Schema contract：features include `known_at`、`available_at`、`decision_at`、`feature_cutoff_passed` and `pit_status`；non-PIT or unavailable SMH/SOXX/VIX/AI-event features remain blocked；真实 run PIT feature rows=1,343|扩展趋势持续性、恢复强度、波动压缩、相对确认和 macro context 特征，供第一层低复杂度模型使用|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Feature inventory 不是批准新增外部数据源；blocked features 不能被模型暗中使用。|
|`outputs/research_trends/models/do_not_de_risk_model_v1/*`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/models/stay_constructive_model_v1/*`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/models/add_risk_model_v1/*`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/models/high_confidence_risk_on_model_v1/*`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/models/first_layer_composer_v2_predictions.csv`<br/>`docs/research/do_not_de_risk_model_review.md`<br/>`docs/research/stay_constructive_model_review.md`<br/>`docs/research/add_risk_model_review.md`<br/>`docs/research/high_confidence_risk_on_model_review.md`<br/>`docs/research/first_layer_threshold_calibration_review_v2.md`|`aits research trends upper-state-reset`|Labels v2、PIT feature matrix v3、threshold policy v2、composer v2 config|Schema contract：submodels are train-window quantile scorecards；composer output only has trend_state/confidence/validity/decay metadata and explicitly forbids QQQ/SGOV/TQQQ/weight columns；真实 run composer predictions=2,205；all submodels currently `MODEL_EDGE_WEAK`|训练四个 research-only first-layer submodels，并合成 first-layer composer v2 predictions 供 frozen probes actual-path validation|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Actual-path 改善不能掩盖 submodel precision weak；composer predictions 不是 target weights。|
|`inputs/research_reviews/first_layer_walk_forward_matrix_v3.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/first_layer_walk_forward_review_v3.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/first_layer_v2_frozen_probe_actual_path_matrix.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/first_layer_v2_frozen_probe_actual_path_review.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/first_layer_v2_failure_attribution.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/first_layer_v2_failure_attribution.md`<br/>`docs/research/upper_state_label_feature_reset_owner_review_pack.md`<br/>`docs/research/first_layer_v2_forward_watch_plan.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/upper_state_label_feature_reset_final_matrix.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/upper_state_label_feature_reset_closeout.md`|`aits research trends upper-state-reset`|Submodel predictions、composer v2 predictions、frozen second-layer probes、prior flat/hierarchical actual-path reference rows、research window metadata|Schema contract：status=`UPPER_STATE_LABEL_RESET_IMPROVES_ACTUAL_PATH` 但 dynamic promotion remains `BLOCKED`；actual-path comparison marks prior rows as `PRIOR_ROWS_LEGACY_REFERENCE_ONLY`；failure attribution primary reason=`SUBMODEL_PRECISION_WEAK`；target-path metrics not used for pass|把 v2 first-layer predictions 接回 frozen probes，生成 owner review 和 forward-watch disposition|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|4/4 probe relative improvement is a research-only owner-review signal, not paper-shadow/production readiness；comparison uses legacy references and must not be treated as same-window promotion leaderboard。|

actual path；leaderboard 只按 actual-path metrics 排序|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|`metrics_target_path.json` 只用于 diagnostic，不能用于 ranking 或 promotion；`owner_review_pack.md` --enable-staleness-filter --include-repaired-watch-only --emit-staleness-decomposition --emit-lag-decomposition --output-root outputs/research_strategies/execution_semantics`|TRADING-1201～1285 actual-path runtime artifacts、`inputs/research_reviews/dynamic_actual_path_owner_review_decision.yaml`、`inputs/research_reviews/dynamic_actual_path_policy_sensitivity_matrix.yaml`、`config/research/strategy_execution_policy_registry.yaml`、validated QQQ/TQQQ/SGOV cached data|Schema contract：taxonomy 使用 `signal_validity_taxonomy_v1`，包含 fast/medium/slow/persistent regime classes、strategy profile、stale action 和 fixed safety boundary；actual-path rows 和 `staleness_filter_suppressed`；decomposition 输出 `signal_staleness_decomposition.v1`、`execution_lag_decomposition.v1`；matrix 使用 `staleness_repair_matrix.v1`，只允许 watch-only verdicts，dynamic promotion |`outputs/research_trends/dynamic_strategy_execution_cadence_bias_audit/execution_cadence_bias_audit.json`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/dynamic_strategy_execution_cadence_bias_audit/execution_cadence_comparison_matrix.json`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/dynamic_strategy_execution_cadence_bias_audit/dynamic_strategy_retest_next_steps.json`<br/>`docs/research/dynamic_strategy_execution_cadence_bias_audit.md`<br/>`docs/research/dynamic_strategy_execution_cadence_comparison_matrix.md`<br/>`docs/research/dynamic_strategy_retest_next_steps.md`|`aits research strategies dynamic-strategy-execution-cadence-bias-audit`|Validated QQQ/TQQQ/SGOV cached prices and rates through the same data quality gate as `aits validate-data`、`config/research/strategy_execution_policy_registry.yaml`、existing execution semantics target/actual position path builder|Schema contract：`schema_version=dynamic_strategy_execution_cadence_bias_audit.v1`、status=`DYNAMIC_STRATEGY_EXECUTION_CADENCE_BIAS_AUDIT_READY`；覆盖 `static_baseline`、`monthly_rebalance`、`weekly_rebalance`、`daily_rebalance`、`signal_event_driven`、`valid_until_window`、`cooldown_limited_event_driven`；输出 performance、turnover、holding days、signal lag、missed/stale/cooldown/constraint counts、dynamic-vs-static and monthly-vs-event gaps、cost-adjusted/turnover-adjusted improvement、data-quality status、date range 和固定 safety fields|在 TRADING-2363 scheduler pause 之后恢复 strategy research，审计旧 monthly rebalance / fixed cadence 是否扭曲 dynamic strategy 结论，并给出 TRADING-2365 event-driven retest / candidate ranking route|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Event-driven / valid-until / cooldown rows 只是 research-only actual-path sensitivity；即使优于 monthly，也不批准 scheduler、event append、outcome binding、paper-shadow、production、broker/order 或真实调仓建议。|

research strategies growth-tilt-top3-candidate-pit-replay-recheck-after-runtime-remediation`|TRADING-2438K runtime remediation result、executable replay readiness handoff、runtime materialization contract：`schema_version=growth_tilt_top3_candidate_pit_replay_recheck_after_runtime_remediation.v1`；读取 2438K status=`GROWTH_TILT_PERSISTENT_CANDIDATE_PIT_REPLAY_BLOCKER_ROOT_CAUSE_REMEDIATION_READY` 且 route 到 2438L、runtime_blocker_count_after=0、candidate_replay_runtime_executable_count=3、executable handoff ready、candidate output records complete、data-quality gate passed 后，为每个 candidate 输出 runtime decision。若任一 candidate metric values、baseline comparison、threshold evaluation、traceability、as-of、valid-until、outcome linkage 或 handoff evidence 缺失，则该 candidate 为 `BLOCKED` 并写入 post_runtime_candidate_replay_blockers。若 blocked_count>0，则 status=`GROWTH_TILT_TOP3_CANDIDATE_PIT_REPLAY_RECHECK_AFTER_RUNTIME_REMEDIATION_BLOCKED`、next route=`TRADING-2438M_Growth_Tilt_Post_Runtime_Candidate_PIT_Replay_Blocker_Resolution`；若 blocked_count=0 且 pass_count>0，则 status=`GROWTH_TILT_TOP3_CANDIDATE_PIT_REPLAY_RECHECK_AFTER_RUNTIME_REMEDIATION_READY`、forward_aging_handoff_ready=true、next route=`TRADING-2439A_Growth_Tilt_Forward_Aging_Candidate_Pack_Rebuild_After_PIT_Replay_Recheck`；若 pass/fail/blocked=`0/3/0`，则 status=`GROWTH_TILT_TOP3_CANDIDATE_PIT_REPLAY_RECHECK_AFTER_RUNTIME_REMEDIATION_NO_PASSING_CANDIDATE`、next route=`TRADING-2439A_Growth_Tilt_No_Passing_PIT_Candidate_Evidence_Review`。|在 2438K runtime executable 后独立重判 3 个 top-3 candidate 的 PASS / FAIL / BLOCKED；真实 metric values 仍为 null 时必须继续 BLOCKED，不得误标为 FAIL、NO_PASSING_CANDIDATE、forward-aging ready、paper-shadow candidate 或 2440 no-candidate|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|2438L 不继续修 runtime、不补 output completeness、不生成 forward-aging pack、不跳过 2439A gate、不重跑 2440、不启用 paper-shadow/schedule/production/broker，不生成交易建议，不修改组合权重。|

metric/threshold 值|`schema_version=growth_tilt_post_runtime_candidate_pit_replay_blocker_resolution.v1`；每个 candidate 必须包含 13-stage trace、first failed stage、required metric finite value 或精确 blocker、threshold PASS/FAIL/BLOCKED runtime evaluation、source path/hash/schema 和 safety fields。READY 仅表示 blocked=0、null metrics=0、missing threshold output=0；PARTIAL 表示部分 candidate 已可评估；BLOCKED 表示全部 candidate 或 shared dependency 仍被阻断。source `runtime_executable=true` 与通用 engine readiness shell 不能让 runtime contract stage PASS；engine contract 必须显式声明 compute-plane role、runner interface、runtime execution support、output schema 和 callable entrypoint，且 candidate executor id/version/input contract 必须与 engine id 绑定。当前 2438B 仍是 control-plane builder，candidate executor fields、parameters 和 threshold values 也均缺失，因而真实 run 必须以 `CANDIDATE_RUNTIME_ENGINE_CONTRACT_UNRESOLVED` / `CANDIDATE_RUNTIME_EXECUTOR_MAPPING_MISSING` / `CANDIDATE_RUNTIME_INPUT_CONTRACT_MISSING` / `CANDIDATE_RUNTIME_THRESHOLD_SPEC_MISSING` 精确 fail-closed，并先 route 到 `TRADING-2438M1_Growth_Tilt_Candidate_Runtime_Spec_And_Threshold_Policy_Approval`；owner input 完整后若只剩 engine/binding blocker，则 route 到 `TRADING-2438M2_Growth_Tilt_Candidate_Runtime_Compute_Plane_Binding`。|把 source readiness claim、control-plane shell、callable compute-plane contract、candidate executor binding、runtime input hydration、runner invocation、raw output、metric computation/normalization、threshold evaluation 和 outcome resolution 分层审计；primary resolution rollup 用于 owner 决策，stage/metric/threshold/blocker/provenance artifacts 为 SUPPORTING/DEBUG|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|BLOCKED 不是 FAIL 或 no-candidate；readiness shell、control-plane builder、static threshold contract、fixture、旧 run 和 `null -> 0` 均不得解除 blocker；即使 READY/PASS 也不允许跳过 2438N、forward-aging、manual review 或启用 paper-shadow/production/broker。|

|`config/research/experiments/growth_tilt_candidate_family_closure.yaml`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/growth_tilt_candidate_family_closure/growth_tilt_candidate_family_closure.json`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/growth_tilt_candidate_family_closure/growth_tilt_candidate_negative_result_ledger.json`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/growth_tilt_candidate_family_closure/growth_tilt_candidate_family_closure.envelope.json`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/growth_tilt_candidate_family_closure/growth_tilt_candidate_family_closure.run_ledger.json`<br/>`docs/research/growth_tilt_candidate_family_closure.md`|`aits research strategies growth-tilt-candidate-family-close --source-m1e <artifact> --strict`（legacy alias -> generic experiment runner）|typed ExperimentSpec、M1E replacement contract、M1D2 adapter readiness、D1A owner resolution、2433 candidate-set config、TRADING-2438N requirement、registry/catalog/system flow|旧 primary/negative-ledger/Markdown 继续使用 `growth_tilt_candidate_family_closure.v1` 和原 status/path/schema/bytes；ARCH-004D additive sidecar 使用 `artifact_envelope.v1`、`run_ledger.v1`，explicit status map 将 terminal closure映射为 PASS、source-contract blocked映射为 BLOCKED。该 governance-only slice `data_quality_required=false`，不伪造 DQ PASS；spec/config、input path/hash/size、production effect 和 plugin version可审计。|作为 `ExperimentSpec -> generic runner -> evidence/envelope/ledger -> report plugin` reference slice；同 calculator/report plugin 的 variant 只需新 spec，不新增 task-id module/CLI/report family|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|sidecar PASS只表示既有 closure artifact成功复现，不表示 candidate/replay/promotion ready；family closed不等于三个 candidate FAIL，也不是实现失败；不运行 replay/metrics、不补 baseline contract、不恢复 top-3、不启用 promotion/paper-shadow/production/broker。|
|`config/research/growth_tilt_baseline_capability_graph.yaml`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/growth_tilt_baseline_capability_graph/growth_tilt_baseline_capability_graph.json`<br/>`docs/research/growth_tilt_baseline_capability_graph.md`|`aits research strategies growth-tilt-baseline-capability-graph --as-of 2026-07-10 --strict`|N1 closure、M1C signal inventory、M1D2 adapter readiness、base overlay/veto config与 compiler code、metric/screening contracts、typed overlay executor code、TRADING-2438N requirement、registry/catalog/system flow|`schema_version=growth_tilt_baseline_capability_graph.v1`；node schema覆盖 SIGNAL/DECISION_REQUEST/PERSISTENCE_RULE/HARD_VETO/REGIME_TRANSITION/EXPOSURE_SCALAR/EXPOSURE_CAP/RAMP_RULE/COOLDOWN_RULE/EXPIRY_RULE/METRIC/REPLAY_RUNNER，edge refs必须解析。Capability READY与 mutation-ready严格分离；callable-but-unconsumed、invalid PIT、unapproved semantics、missing runner/mutable dimension或 blocked dependency均不得 mutation-ready。真实 status=`GROWTH_TILT_BASELINE_CAPABILITY_GRAPH_READY_NO_MUTATION_READY_CAPABILITY`、mutation-ready capability=0、N3=`NOT_STARTED`。|给 contract-first discovery提供 actual capability inventory和 N3 conditional gate|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|现有 cap、单项 veto、callable signal或 executor存在不等于 candidate可生成；N2只读，不新增 transition/persistence/veto/exposure unit/threshold/candidate/replay。|

dynamic-strategy-closeout-decision-pack`、`manual tracked closeout review dynamic-full-allocation-reopen-criteria`、`manual tracked closeout review dynamic-strategy-closeout-reader-brief`|TRADING-1326～1485 tracked actual-path edge/gate、owner review、policy sensitivity、staleness repair、event override survival、PIT/walk-forward、event taxonomy/timing、cost/cash、stress、regime 和 artifact governance snapshots；`config/research/dynamic_strategy_closeout_policy.yaml`|Schema contract：closeout YAML 均包含 `schema_version`、`report_type`、`status`、`review_id` 或 `run_id`、`source_commit`、`config_hash`、`policy_hash`、`metric_namespace=actual_path_only`、`actual_path_only=true`、`owner_review_status`、`promotion_status=BLOCKED`、source artifact path/hash 或 closeout artifact reference。Final status 固定 `FULL_ALLOCATION_RESEARCH_PAUSED`、`DEFENSIVE_OVERLAY_RESEARCH_ACTIVE`、`ADVISORY_DIAGNOSTIC_ACTIVE`、`PAPER_SHADOW_NOT_READY`、`PROMOTION_BLOCKED`、`PRODUCTION_DISABLED`、`BROKER_DISABLED`；reopen criteria defensive overlay / advisory diagnostic，以及重启 full allocation research 的条件|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|推荐 `APPROVE_DOWNGRADE_TO_DEFENSIVE_OVERLAY` 不是交易批准；defensive overlay active 也不是 paper-shadow、production、broker 或 automatic risk-on。Closeout label 只保留历史 evidence，不允许 target-path metrics 或 legacy dynamic result 恢复 promotion。|

|`outputs/research_strategies/layer1_meta_policy/layer1_selector_restart_condition_contract.json/md`|`aits research strategies layer1-selector-restart-condition-contract`|Layer-2 component pool config、simple baseline registry forward-aging policy、equal-risk forward-aging scoreboard 最新状态|Schema contract：status 为 `RESTART_CONTRACT_READY` / `RESTART_NOT_ALLOWED_NOW` / `RESTART_CONTRACT_BLOCKED`；输出 `restart_allowed_now`、`restart_blockers`、`restart_conditions`、`minimum_required_evidence`、`owner_approval_required`；禁止降低 switch-count 标准、直接启用 ML、自动加入 QQQ-plus growth selectable、turnover 未解决前 forward-aging|定义未来重启 Layer-1 selector 的证据门槛，防止反复搜参|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|restart condition contract 不是重启批准；当前默认 `restart_allowed_now=false`，owner approval 仍是硬条件。|
|`outputs/research_strategies/simple_baselines/equal_risk_forward_aging_daily_run_health_check.json/md`|`aits research strategies equal-risk-forward-aging-daily-run-health-check`|`simple_baseline_forward_aging_observation_*.json/md`、simple baseline registry、cached QQQ/TQQQ/SGOV prices and rates through the same validation path as `aits validate-data`|Schema contract：status 为 `EQUAL_RISK_FORWARD_AGING_HEALTHY` / `EQUAL_RISK_FORWARD_AGING_WARN` / `EQUAL_RISK_FORWARD_AGING_BLOCKED`；输出 latest observation date、observation count、duplicate count、missing trading day count、data quality status、health warnings/blockers；必须披露 observation 仍为 research-only、paper-shadow false、production false、broker none|检查 equal-risk forward-aging 每日 observation 链路、duplicate guard、交易日缺口和安全边界|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|health check 不是 scheduler 执行入口，不补写 observation，不接入 broker，也不批准 paper-shadow。|
|`outputs/research_strategies/simple_baselines/equal_risk_forward_aging_maturity_update_check.json/md`|`aits research strategies equal-risk-forward-aging-maturity-update-check`|同上，外加既有 `simple_baseline_forward_aging_update_maturity` updater|Schema contract：status 为 `MATURITY_UPDATE_HEALTHY` / `MATURITY_UPDATE_PENDING` / `MATURITY_UPDATE_WARN` / `MATURITY_UPDATE_BLOCKED`；输出 5d/10d/20d/60d/120d matured counts、pending count、data missing count、maturity timestamp，并审计 original target weights、signal inputs 和 definition hash 是否被改写|包装检查 maturity updater 是否只追加 matured windows，而不改变原始 decision-time observation 核心字段|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|maturity check 不是成熟投资结论；pending/insufficient 状态不能被解释为 promotion readiness。|
|`outputs/research_strategies/simple_baselines/equal_risk_forward_aging_scoreboard_first_window_review.json/md`|`aits research strategies equal-risk-forward-aging-scoreboard-first-window-review`|`simple_baseline_forward_aging_scoreboard.json/md`、forward-aging maturity observations、simple baseline registry maturity floors|Schema contract：status 为 `EQUAL_RISK_SCOREBOARD_PENDING` / `EQUAL_RISK_SCOREBOARD_INSUFFICIENT` / `EQUAL_RISK_SCOREBOARD_READY_FOR_RESEARCH_ONLY` / `EQUAL_RISK_SCOREBOARD_BLOCKED`；输出 matured counts、avg forward return/drawdown by window、win rate vs 100 QQQ / 50-50 / 60-40 和 `scoreboard_status`；当 20d/60d/120d 样本不足时不得输出 ready、paper-shadow readiness 或强结论|确保 first-window scoreboard 保持 pending/insufficient，避免过度解释早期 forward-aging 样本|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|scoreboard review 即使 ready 也只可能是 research-only，不是 paper-shadow 或 production gate。|
|`outputs/research_strategies/layer2_components/layer2_growth_component_gap_review.json/md`|`aits research strategies layer2-growth-component-gap-review`|`config/research/layer2_strategy_component_pool_v1.yaml`、QQQ-plus growth owner decision、excluded component list|Schema contract：status 为 `GROWTH_COMPONENT_GAP_CONFIRMED` / `GROWTH_COMPONENT_RESEARCH_NEEDED` / `NO_GROWTH_COMPONENT_NEEDED` / `GROWTH_COMPONENT_REVIEW_BLOCKED`；输出 growth gap status、current growth candidates、why not component-ready、required next research、recommended next direction；最低条件包括成本后 edge、回撤/Sharpe/Calmar、非纯 beta、非 AI rally-only、turnover 可控、definition hash、data quality gate 和 owner review|确认后续增长方向回到 Layer-2 growth component，而不是继续硬优化 Layer-1 selector|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|gap review 不恢复 QQQ-plus growth selectable，也不重启 TQQQ-heavy、LEAPS、Wheel 或 tail-risk fallback。|
|`outputs/research_strategies/research_roadmap_master_review.json/md`<br/>`docs/research/research_roadmap_master_review.md`|`aits research strategies research-roadmap-master-review`|1024～1029 artifacts、Layer-1 final gate、equal-risk forward-aging health/maturity/scoreboard、Layer-2 growth gap review|Schema contract：status / final conclusions 包括 `CONTINUE_EQUAL_RISK_FORWARD_AGING`、`PAUSE_LAYER1_SELECTOR`、`RESTART_LAYER2_GROWTH_RESEARCH`、`KEEP_ALL_RESEARCH_ONLY` 或 `BLOCKED`；必须回答 Layer-1 是否暂停、equal-risk 是否主线、selector candidate 是否存在、是否继续优化 200DMA、是否回到 Layer-2、是否寻找 growth component、tail-risk/LEAPS/Wheel 状态、下一阶段最小任务和 no paper-shadow/no production/no broker|生成当前研究路线 master review，作为 owner 选择下一阶段任务的入口|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|roadmap master review 不接入正式 Reader Brief、不生成交易建议、不批准生产或 paper-shadow。|

|`outputs/research_strategies/growth_components/best_growth_tilt_candidate_deep_dive.json/md`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/growth_components/vol_target_growth_tilt_local_sensitivity.json/md`|`aits research strategies best-growth-tilt-candidate-deep-dive`、`vol-target-growth-tilt-local-sensitivity`|TRADING-1100～1109 real-run artifacts、focused candidate `equal_risk_growth_tilt_vol_target_v1_tv4_w120_q7_s1`、validated QQQ/TQQQ/SGOV prices/rates through the same cached-data quality gate|Schema contract：deep dive 输出 candidate family、policy definition hash、target vol config、vol lookback、QQQ/SGOV/TQQQ weight-path summary、annual return/gap/drawdown/Sharpe/Calmar/turnover/switch count、data-quality status 和 required answers；local sensitivity 只围绕 target vol ±2pp/±1pp/base、60/90/120/180d lookback、QQQ cap ±10pp、SGOV floor ±10pp 和 monthly/threshold rebalance 输出 `variant_strategy_id`、parameter delta、return/gap/drawdown、effective beta、beta-adjusted edge、rank stability 和 local robustness score|解释最佳候选为什么达到 raw `COMPONENT_READY_GROWTH`，并判断它是否是孤立参数点|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|local sensitivity 不是新策略族搜索，也不放宽 beta-adjusted edge 标准；邻近版本即使更好也只是 research-only finalist evidence。|
|`outputs/research_strategies/growth_components/beta_adjusted_edge_methodology_audit.json/md`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/growth_components/growth_tilt_balanced_core_role_review.json/md`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/growth_components/growth_tilt_vs_equal_risk_missed_upside_review.json/md`|`aits research strategies beta-adjusted-edge-methodology-audit`、`growth-tilt-balanced-core-role-review`、`growth-tilt-vs-equal-risk-missed-upside-review`|focused candidate deep dive、candidate summary、benchmark metrics、period replay/cost sensitivity lineage and cached-data quality gate|Schema contract：status 覆盖 `BETA_METHOD_CONFIRMS_WEAK_EDGE` / `BETA_METHOD_SHOWS_TIMING_EDGE` / `BETA_METHOD_INCONCLUSIVE` / `BETA_METHOD_BLOCKED`、`BALANCED_CORE_REVIEWABLE` / `GROWTH_COMPONENT_NOT_SUPPORTED` / `DEFENSIVE_ONLY_BETTER` / `ROLE_INCONCLUSIVE` / `ROLE_REVIEW_BLOCKED`、`MISSED_UPSIDE_REDUCTION_MATERIAL` / `MISSED_UPSIDE_REDUCTION_MODEST` / `MISSED_UPSIDE_REDUCTION_NOT_WORTH_RISK` / `MISSED_UPSIDE_REVIEW_BLOCKED`；methodology audit 对比 static beta、rolling 60d/120d beta、regime conditional beta、QQQ-equivalent exposure 和 risk-budget attribution，拆分 raw edge、beta-adjusted edge、timing edge、rebalance edge、SGOV carry 和 vol-targeting contribution；role review 比较 `equal_risk_qqq_sgov`、candidate、`100_qqq`、`qqq_50_sgov_50` 和 `qqq_60_sgov_40`；missed-upside review 覆盖 2023 recovery、2024 AI rally、2025-to-latest、strong trend、low-vol trend 和 high-rate SGOV carry period|回答收益是否主要来自 beta、是否更像 balanced core、是否有效减少 equal-risk missed upside|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|`BALANCED_CORE_REVIEWABLE` 不是生产角色变更，也不是 portfolio allocation 建议；missed-upside 改善不等于应调仓。|
|`outputs/research_strategies/growth_components/growth_tilt_parameter_neighbor_finalist_review.json/md`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/growth_components/growth_tilt_watchlist_reconsideration_gate.json/md`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/growth_components/growth_tilt_owner_diagnosis_pack.json/md`<br/>`docs/research/growth_tilt_owner_diagnosis_pack.md`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/growth_components/growth_tilt_focused_diagnosis_master_review.json/md`<br/>`docs/research/growth_tilt_focused_diagnosis_master_review.md`|`aits
