|Artifact|生成命令|上游输入|关键字段 / schema|下游|Production effect|常见误解|
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
|`outputs/research_strategies/external_validation/external_validation_scope_contract.json/md`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/external_validation/static_baseline_external_reconciliation.json/md`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/external_validation/metric_definition_reconciliation.json/md`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/external_validation/sgov_total_return_external_check.json/md`|`aits research strategies external-validation-scope-contract`、`static-baseline-external-reconciliation`、`metric-definition-reconciliation`、`sgov-total-return-external-check`|TRADING-1119～1128 balanced-core launch state、P0 static baselines `100_qqq` / `qqq_50_sgov_50` / `qqq_60_sgov_40`、validated QQQ/TQQQ/SGOV prices/rates、manual external static baseline records when supplied|Schema contract：scope 固定 `strategy_ids`、validation lanes、metric tolerances、AI regime and requested date range；static reconciliation 输出 internal/external annual return、max drawdown、Sharpe、Calmar、monthly correlation、`external_record_status` and tolerance rows；metric reconciliation records annual return, max drawdown, Sharpe, Calmar, rebalance and monthly return definitions；SGOV check reports close-vs-adjusted-close return gap and strategy-level annual-return impact；所有 payload 固定 `paper_shadow_allowed=false`、`production_allowed=false`、`broker_action=none`、`manual_review_required=true`|建立外部验证范围、静态基准人工外部记录需求、指标定义和 SGOV total-return 处理边界|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|外部记录缺失时状态只能是 pending/warnings，不能把 internal metrics 当成外部证据；SGOV adjusted close proxy warning 不是可忽略误差，也不是交易许可。|
|`outputs/research_strategies/external_validation/strategy_weight_path_export.json/md`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/external_validation/weight_paths/equal_risk_qqq_sgov_weight_path.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/external_validation/weight_paths/equal_risk_growth_tilt_vol_target_v1_tv4_w120_q7_s1_weight_path.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/external_validation/external_independent_return_replay.json/md`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/external_validation/external_platform_feasibility_review.json/md`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/external_validation/quantconnect_replication_dry_run_plan.json/md`|`aits research strategies strategy-weight-path-export`、`external-independent-return-replay`、`external-platform-feasibility-review`、`quantconnect-replication-dry-run-plan`|`config/research/simple_baseline_strategy_registry.yaml`、`config/research/equal_risk_growth_tilt_candidate_registry.yaml`、definition lock、validated prices/rates、weight path CSVs generated by the same export step|Schema contract：weight CSV fields include `date`、`strategy_id`、`definition_hash`、`target_weight_qqq`、`target_weight_tqqq`、`target_weight_sgov`、`rebalance_flag`、`signal_time`、`execution_assumption`、`data_quality_status`；independent replay uses shifted exported weights and adjusted close returns, then compares annual return、max drawdown、Sharpe、Calmar、turnover and monthly correlation against internal metrics；feasibility and QuantConnect dry-run plan list required external data handling, unsupported assumptions, manual confirmations and no-broker dry-run steps|为 P1/P2 dynamic strategies 提供可导出、可复算、可外部平台手工复核的权重与回报链路|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|导出的 target weights 是 backtest/replay 输入，不是 official target weights 或实盘仓位；QuantConnect plan 是 dry-run checklist，不连接 broker、不提交订单、不批准 paper-shadow。|
|`outputs/research_strategies/external_validation/external_validation_difference_attribution.json/md`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/external_validation/external_validation_owner_report.json`<br/>`docs/research/external_validation_owner_report.md`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/external_validation/external_validation_master_review.json`<br/>`docs/research/external_validation_master_review.md`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/external_validation/external_validation_reader_brief_safe_preview.json/md`|`aits research strategies external-validation-difference-attribution`、`external-validation-owner-report`、`external-validation-master-review`、`external-validation-reader-brief-safe-preview`|scope/static reconciliation、weight export、independent replay、metric reconciliation、SGOV check、platform feasibility and QuantConnect dry-run plan|Schema contract：difference attribution separates static manual-record gaps, independent replay tolerance results, metric definition warnings, SGOV impact, platform feasibility blockers and required owner actions；owner/master reports output recommendation/status such as `EXTERNAL_VALIDATION_ACCEPTED_WITH_WARNINGS` / `EXTERNAL_VALIDATION_PASS_WITH_WARNINGS` / blocked states, source artifact paths, hard blockers, warnings and next review actions；Reader Brief safe preview scans prohibited trading/paper-shadow/production phrases and stays preview-only|形成外部验证 owner handoff、master status 和可安全展示文字预览|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|`EXTERNAL_VALIDATION_PASS` 也只说明 research-only 外部验证链路完成，不是 paper-shadow/production approval；Reader Brief preview 不自动进入正式日报，也不输出买卖或调仓建议。|

`RECONCILED` / explained warning / mismatch reason|把真实外部平台记录、metric convention 和 SGOV convention 转成可审计结构化对账|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|缺少 signoff 时状态保持 unknown/missing；SGOV 或 |`outputs/research_strategies/external_validation/dynamic_weight_path_external_support_check.json/md`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/external_validation/quantconnect_weight_path_replay_preflight.json/md`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/external_validation/external_validation_manual_evidence_owner_signoff.json`<br/>`docs/research/external_validation_manual_evidence_owner_signoff.md`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/external_validation/external_validation_manual_evidence_master_review.json`<br/>`docs/research/external_validation_manual_evidence_master_review.md`|`aits research strategies dynamic-weight-path-external-support-check`、`quantconnect-weight-path-replay-preflight`、`external-validation-manual-evidence-owner-signoff`、`external-validation-manual-evidence-master-review`|manual ingestion, metric signoff, SGOV signoff, final reconciliation, platform support matrix and QC preflight|Schema contract：status 覆盖 `DYNAMIC_EXTERNAL_SUPPORT_CONFIRMED` / `DYNAMIC_EXTERNAL_SUPPORT_LIMITED` / `DYNAMIC_EXTERNAL_SUPPORT_REQUIRES_CUSTOM_ENGINE` / `DYNAMIC_EXTERNAL_SUPPORT_BLOCKED`、`QC_WEIGHT_PATH_PREFLIGHT_READY` / `QC_WEIGHT_PATH_PREFLIGHT_NEEDS_MANUAL_IMPLEMENTATION` / `QC_WEIGHT_PATH_PREFLIGHT_BLOCKED`、owner recommendation `ACCEPT_EXTERNAL_VALIDATION_WITH_WARNINGS` / `ACCEPT_EXTERNAL_VALIDATION` / `NEED_MORE_MANUAL_EVIDENCE` / `NEED_DYNAMIC_PLATFORM_REPLAY` / `INTERNAL_FIX_REQUIRED` / `BLOCKED`、master status `EXTERNAL_MANUAL_EVIDENCE_ACCEPTED` / `EXTERNAL_MANUAL_EVIDENCE_ACCEPTED_WITH_WARNINGS` / `EXTERNAL_MANUAL_EVIDENCE_NEEDS_MORE_INPUT` / `EXTERNAL_MANUAL_EVIDENCE_BLOCKED`；platform rows cover Portfolio Visualizer, testfol.io, QuantConnect, TradingView and local notebook support for dynamic path import, custom rebalance dates, custom weights by date, SGOV/cash handling, replay/export and custom code；QC preflight defines weight path schema, custom data schema, symbol mapping, rebalance/execution/cost/output metrics and blockers；owner/master answer manual evidence, static reconciliation, SGOV/metric confirmation, dynamic replay need, accepted-with-warnings state and safety boundary|形成 external validation manual evidence owner signoff 和 master review|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|`ACCEPT_EXTERNAL_VALIDATION_WITH_WARNINGS` 仍是 research-only 外部验证结论，不是 Reader Brief 正式接入、paper-shadow、production、broker 或交易建议许可。|

## Research Campaign Control Plane

TRADING-605～630 的 Campaign 控制面 artifact 位于 `data/research_campaigns/<campaign_id>/` 和 `outputs/research_campaigns/<campaign_id>/`。`data/research_campaigns/<campaign_id>/spec.json` 是初始化后规范化的 Campaign Spec；`state.json` 是 canonical campaign status；`evidence.jsonl` 是统一 Evidence Record store；`transitions.jsonl` 是状态机 audit log；`runs.jsonl` 是 stage runner / adapter 审计；`reproducibility_manifest.json` 记录 commit、spec/config checksums、windows、outputs 和 data quality status；`outputs/research_campaigns/<campaign_id>/owner_packet_<campaign_id>.json/md` 是 Campaign Reader Brief / owner packet。生成入口是 `aits research campaign init|validate|validate-adapters|plan|run|diagnose|gate|status|packet|archive|validation-pack`，上游配置为 `config/research/module_capability_registry.yaml`、`config/research/research_window_policy.yaml`、`config/research/research_gate_policies.yaml`、`config/research/campaign_migrations.yaml`、`config/research/campaign_stage_adapters.yaml` 和 sample specs。TRADING-623～630 新增 `outputs/research_campaigns/<campaign_id>/b2_campaign_adapter_run_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md`、`b3_campaign_signal_precheck_run.json/md` 以及 `outputs/research_campaigns/control_plane_v1_validation/b2_campaign_adapter_parity_map.json/md`、`b2_campaign_parity_validation.json/md`、`evidence_budget_enforcement_report.json/md`、`campaign_next_action_parity_review.json/md`、`campaign_control_plane_v1_validation_pack.json/md`。该 artifact family 只控制研究工作流、adapter 输入校验、预算、holdout policy、module boundary、gate 和 next actions；不刷新市场数据、不运行 broker/order、不写 official target weights、不 append owner decision、不创建 paper-shadow、不修改 production。B2/B3 迁移 evidence 与 audited-artifact adapter evidence 是 historical/audited research input，不代表批准 current-form 研究结论。

TRADING-631～640 在同一 artifact family 中新增 execution adapter rc2 产物。`outputs/research_campaigns/<campaign_id>/b2_compute/` 保存 B2 control-window compute adapter 生成的 rerun JSON/Markdown 与 component CSV；`outputs/research_campaigns/<campaign_id>/b3_signal_compute/` 保存 B3 signal-only compute adapter 生成的 taxonomy/precheck JSON/Markdown；adapter run JSON/Markdown 明确 `run_mode`、`compute_performed`、`imported_evidence`、`parity_source`、`failure_mode` 和 `holdout_touched=false`。`outputs/research_campaigns/control_plane_v1_rc2_validation/` 新增 `b2_compute_adapter_smoke.*`、`b2_compute_parity_validation.*`、`campaign_run_next_stage_smoke.*`、`evidence_budget_forced_transition_report.*`、`b3_signal_compute_adapter_smoke.*`、`campaign_status_plan_ux_report.*` 和 `case_specific_runner_deprecation_plan.*`。这些 rc2 artifacts 只证明 Campaign 至少能执行一个 B2 safe diagnostic compute path 和一个 B3 signal-only smoke path；不表示 B2 current-form 已可推广，不替代所有旧 runner，不批准 B4/B5/B6/v3、paper-shadow/live、official target weights、broker/order 或 production mutation。

TRADING-641～648 新增 execution adapter rc3 产物。`outputs/research_campaigns/<campaign_id>/b2_targeted_compute/` 保存 B2 targeted-evidence compute JSON/Markdown 与其 control-window 子目录；`outputs/research_campaigns/<campaign_id>/b2_full_compute/` 保存 B2 full diagnostic compute JSON/Markdown 与 control-window 子目录；GATE adapter run artifact 记录 constrained B2 decision、budget status 和 owner-override reason codes。`outputs/research_campaigns/control_plane_v1_rc3_validation/` 新增 `b2_targeted_evidence_compute_adapter.*`、`b2_targeted_evidence_compute_parity.*`、`b2_full_diagnostic_compute_adapter.*`、`b2_gate_compute_adapter.*`、`b2_campaign_e2e_compute.*`、`b2_campaign_full_parity_validation.*`、`campaign_evidence_budget_final_decision_drill.*` 和 `legacy_b2_runner_deprecation_readiness.*`。这些 rc3 artifacts 证明 B2 targeted/full/gate 可经 Campaign compute path 运行或给出 owner-override limitation；仍不批准 B4/B5/B6/v3、paper-shadow/live、official target weights、broker/order、untouched holdout access 或 production mutation，也不删除 legacy B2 task-specific runners。

TRADING-649～653 新增 B2 finalization rc4 产物。`outputs/research_campaigns/control_plane_v1_rc4_validation/` 新增 `campaign_b2_next_action_freeze.*`、`campaign_managed_b2_final_repeatability_run.*`、`campaign_b2_final_gate.*`、`campaign_b2_owner_review_packet.*` 和 `campaign_b2_branch_finalization.*`。这些 artifacts 冻结 B2 当前 Campaign 状态、通过 Campaign `run --stage next` 执行最后 targeted repeatability、用 gate policy 输出 final taxonomy、生成 owner review packet，并固定 B4/B5/B6/v3/paper-shadow 继续关闭。它们不 append owner decision、不访问 untouched holdout、不调参数、不写 official target weights、不触发 broker/order、不修改 production。

TRADING-654～660 新增 B2 post-campaign rc5 产物。`data/research_campaigns/b2-risk-overlay-current-form/owner_decisions.jsonl` 是 B2 owner decision audit log；canonical `state.json` 在 owner `return_to_design` 后进入 `ARCHIVED + RETURNED_TO_DESIGN`，但 `evidence.jsonl`、`transitions.jsonl` 和 source lineage 保留。`outputs/research_campaigns/control_plane_v1_rc5_validation/` 新增 `campaign_b2_owner_decision_record.*`、`b2_current_form_campaign_archive.*`、`campaign_b2_reusable_evidence_report.*`、`slow_drawdown_defensive_overlay_rfc.*`、`reentry_policy_design_contract.*`、`fast_shock_trigger_feasibility_rfc.*` 和 `post_b2_campaign_program_snapshot.*`。这些 artifacts 只记录 current B2 form returned-to-design、归档 lineage、可复用/不可复用 evidence 分类和后续窄化 redesign planning；三个 RFC/contract 不实现 module 行为、不运行 backfill、不生成 weights。归档后的 Campaign next-stage runner 只返回 archived no-op；B4/B5/B6/v3、paper-shadow/extended/live、official target weights、broker/order、untouched holdout 和 production mutation 全部继续禁止。

## Indicator-to-Signal Research Framework

TRADING-665～692 的 indicator research artifact family 位于 `outputs/research_indicators/`，validation pack 位于 `outputs/research_indicators/control_plane_v1_validation/`。Source configuration 是 `config/research/indicator_research_registry.yaml`，它登记日报评分模块、估值拥挤、风险事件、confidence/data-quality/thesis/portfolio/execution guardrails 的 ontology、role、mapping version、data/PIT gate、coverage status、expected impact、dependency edge 和 research stage。生成入口是 `aits research indicators ontology|inventory|coverage|coverage-gap|graph|trace-contract|diagnose|mapping-plan|masking|gate|valuation-crowding-pilot|masking-casebook|ablation-validation|masking-effectiveness-review|masking-robustness-review|validation-rollup|outcome-availability-audit|historical-trace-validation|gate-availability-audit|component-historical-trace|backtest-trace-bridge|lineage-manifest-repair|validation-pack|validation-pack-stability`；核心 artifacts 包括 `daily_indicator_inventory.json/md`、`indicator_research_coverage_audit.json/md`、`daily_indicator_coverage_gap_report.json/md`、`indicator_dependency_graph.json/md`、`multi_stage_weight_trace_contract.json/md`、`constraint_attribution_report.json/md`、`indicator_signal_mapping_registry.json/md`、`mapping_free_indicator_diagnostics_<indicator_id>.json/md`、`indicator_mapping_candidate_plan_<indicator_id>.json/md`、`indicator_masking_and_dominance_audit_<indicator_id>.json/md`、`indicator_to_signal_research_gate_<indicator_id>.json/md`、`valuation_crowding_pilot_audit.json/md`、`valuation_crowding_outcome_availability_audit.json/md`、`valuation_crowding_masking_effectiveness_review.json/md`、`valuation_crowding_masking_robustness_review.json/md`、`indicator_research_validation_rollup.json/md`、`historical_trace_gate_availability_audit.json/md`、`component_level_historical_trace.json/md`、`backtest_trace_bridge.json/md`、`lineage_manifest_repair_report.json/md`、`indicator_to_signal_research_framework_v1_validation_pack.json/md` 和 `indicator_validation_pack_rerun_stability_report.json/md`。这些 artifacts 的用途是先确认“指标存在、是否进入日报、是否影响 signal/weight、是否是 hard constraint、是否高影响未验证、是否遮蔽下游信号”，而不是证明指标已经有效。

`aits score-daily` 现在在既有评分报告生成后额外写出 `outputs/reports/daily_indicator_weight_trace_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md`（可用 `--daily-indicator-weight-trace-path` 重定向）。该 trace 从已计算完成的 `DailyScoreReport` 派生，记录 raw indicator value、normalized indicator score、mapped signal contribution、pre-constraint signal weight、post-constraint signal weight、final advisory/portfolio-facing weight，以及每个 position gate 的 before/after/delta 和 valuation/crowding -> trend masking fields；它不重新计算 score、不修改 weights/gates、不写 official target weights、不触发 paper-shadow/live/broker/order，固定 `production_effect=none`。Indicator research artifacts 可读取该 trace 来计算 dominance、constraint attribution 和 masking ratio；未提供 trace 时必须显示 `TRACE_DATA_REQUIRED`，并把 valuation/crowding pilot 输出为 `VALUATION_CROWDING_UNTESTED_HIGH_IMPACT`，不得补造 hit rate、weight suppression、constraint drag 或 masking ratio。`daily_indicator_coverage_gap_report` 列出 registered indicators、未登记但日报中出现的 component、已登记但缺 source/constraint/mapping/dependency/trace_contract 的指标和 HIGH_IMPACT_UNVALIDATED 指标。`config/research/module_capability_registry.yaml` 和 `config/research/campaign_stage_adapters.yaml` 登记了 `indicator-research-framework-v1` 与 validation-only adapter contract，说明该框架可进入 Research Campaign 控制面的审计/契约层；当前 adapter 不运行大规模 backfill 或 indicator search。所有 indicator artifacts 固定 `research_only=true`、`manual_review_only=true`、`official_target_weights=false`、`paper_shadow_activation=false`、`broker_effect=none`、`order_effect=none`、`production_effect=none`，不得修改日报实际权重逻辑、估值拥挤 cap、production 参数、paper-shadow/live/broker/order 或 owner decision。

TRADING-665～692 后续 VALIDATING 诊断新增 `valuation_crowding_pilot_validation_report.json/md`、`indicator_masking_casebook_valuation_crowding_trend.json/md`、`valuation_crowding_ablation_validation.json/md`、`valuation_crowding_outcome_availability_audit.json/md`、`valuation_crowding_masking_effectiveness_review.json/md`、`valuation_crowding_masking_robustness_review.json/md`、`indicator_research_validation_rollup.json/md`、`historical_multi_stage_weight_trace_validation.json/md`、`historical_trace_gate_availability_audit.json/md`、`component_level_historical_trace.json/md`、`backtest_trace_bridge.json/md` 和 `lineage_manifest_repair_report.json/md`。Pilot validation report 记录 valuation/crowding 指标定义、raw value 来源、normalization、mapping 方向、生效阈值、与 trend 的 MASKS 关系、为何仍是 `HIGH_IMPACT_UNVALIDATED` 以及为何当前 trace 产生 `HIGH_MASKING`。Masking casebook 列出具体日期/样本、trend 与 valuation/crowding 原始方向、pre/post-mask signal、final advisory-facing weight、1d/5d/10d/20d outcome、drawdown_reduced、missed_upside 和 false_risk_off。Outcome availability audit 统一 casebook、ablation scenario 和 backtest bridge 的 realized outcome join key：`as_of_date`、`decision_time`、`asset`、`scenario`、`trace_source`、`trace_contract_version`；signal generation 继续保持 PIT/as-of，realized outcome 只在 evaluation 阶段读取 decision_time 之后的价格，1d/5d/10d/20d 使用交易日窗口，且每个 horizon 独立执行 evaluation cutoff：只有 `as_of_date + horizon trading days <= latest_available_price_date` 才计入 mature，否则标记 `outcome_not_mature` 且不计入 hard missing。Outcome audit 还输出 horizon-specific mature/not-mature counts、mature outcome sample quality、by-asset/by-date/by-regime/by-event-window availability，以及 full_advisory/component_only/backtest_bridge mature counts by horizon。Ablation validation 和 masking effectiveness review 只读比较 baseline、no valuation/crowding masking 和 capped masking，不写 production 权重，并按 full_advisory_only、component_only、backtest_bridge、date、asset、regime、event window、correlated asset cluster 和 horizon 分层输出 avg return、median return、hit rate、downside capture、horizon-level max drawdown、drawdown preservation、turnover、constraint hit、date_count、asset_count、case_count、unique_regime_count 和 correlated_asset_cluster_count；同时输出 scenario × horizon conclusion matrix，逐行记录 sample quality、return profile、risk profile、false risk-off、missed upside 和 recommendation contribution。Robustness review 在该 matrix 上只读输出 scenario delta matrix、equal-weight by date/asset/correlated cluster aggregation、full_advisory_only 与 all_validation_sources 一致性、case diagnostics、10d baseline support attribution、1d/5d neutral/incomplete explanation、20d pending maturity tracker 和 conservative evidence gate；只有 1d/5d/10d 至少两个 horizon 一致、full advisory/date/cluster 聚合不冲突且 missed_upside/false_risk_off 未恶化时，才允许从 preliminary 升级为更强 validation recommendation。Validation rollup 汇总 framework readiness、coverage status、trace status、gate/lineage status、outcome maturity status、valuation/crowding masking current recommendation、remaining limitations、pending maturity tracker、next recommended rerun date 和 rerun criteria；它明确 `valuation_crowding_indicator` 保持 `HIGH_IMPACT_UNVALIDATED`、`PRELIMINARY_SHORT_HORIZON_ONLY`、`NO_PROMOTION_ALLOWED`。20d 样本不足时必须标记 `insufficient_long_horizon_evidence`，不得用当前少量 20d full-advisory mature cases 推导正式结论；20d 未成熟或不足不得让 1d/5d/10d 已成熟 outcome 从 review 中消失。Recommendation 只能是 validation recommendation，不能进入 promotion gate；当 1d/5d/10d 结论冲突或不完整时输出 `preliminary_short_horizon_only`。Historical trace validation 可读取由 PIT sliced `score-daily` replay 合并的多日期 trace，用于让 masking/dominance 不只依赖当前日报样本；如果日期数不足、gate audit 不能确认 full advisory eligibility 或 forward outcome 不完整，必须以 `PASS_WITH_WARNINGS` 和 issue 明示，不得补造稳定性结论。Gate availability audit 按 date+asset 输出 `full_advisory_trace_eligible`、`component_validation_trace_eligible`、`reason_if_not_full_eligible`、`blocked_gate`、`missing_or_late_feature`、`feature_available_time`、`decision_time`、`reason_class` 和 `can_be_repaired_without_relaxing_production_gate`，并只在 explicit historical replay/lineage manifest 完整且 `production_equivalent=true` 时确认 full advisory equivalence。`lineage_manifest_repair_report` 针对 missing lineage root-cause 输出 affected artifact 的 `source_artifact_path`、`generated_at`、`as_of_date`、`decision_time`、`config_hash`、`input_snapshot_hash`、`trace_contract_version`、`production_equivalent` 和 `manifest_validation_status`；它只能验证或要求重新生成 replay/manifest，不能放宽 production data quality 或 feature gates。Component-level historical trace 只给 valuation/crowding -> trend masking diagnostics 使用；backtest trace bridge 从已有 backtest / historical simulation / advisory outcome artifacts 导出只读桥接记录和 source lineage fields。所有非 full advisory trace 必须带 `trace_source`、`confidence`、`promotion_gate_allowed=false` 和 `allowed_uses=[diagnostic, ablation, sensitivity_analysis]`，不得进入 promotion gate。Validation-pack-stability 现在还检查 trace fields 完整、coverage gap 无新增 unregistered、`HIGH_IMPACT_UNVALIDATED` 清单稳定、masking diagnostics、casebook、outcome availability、effectiveness review、robustness review、validation rollup、gate availability、sample quality、component trace、bridge 和 lineage repair repeatable。

TRADING-693/695/696/697 新增 threshold registry / calibration audit artifact。`config/research/threshold_registry.yaml` 是 validation-only threshold governance registry，覆盖 config、indicator research、validation pack、masking diagnostics、outcome maturity、promotion/robustness gates、backtest/replay/allocation constraints 和 tests 中固化阈值；每条记录包含 value/unit/where_used/purpose/impact/safety/calibration fields、A/B/C 分级和 A 类未校准阈值的 promotion review block 标记。TRADING-696 只新增顶层 `calibration_followup_summary`，记录 `sensitivity_tested_count=5`、`validated_boundary_count=0`、`still_uncalibrated_high_impact_count=31`、`thresholds_still_blocking_promotion_count=36` 和 no-change safety flags，不修改任何 threshold current value；TRADING-697 只新增顶层 `second_batch_calibration_prep_summary`，记录 3 个 dynamic/trend second-batch 阈值已 prepared、`validated_boundary_count=0`、`thresholds_changed_count=0` 和 no-change safety flags。`threshold_registry_audit.json/md` 汇总 `total_threshold_count`、`high_impact_threshold_count`、`uncalibrated_high_impact_count`、`heuristic_guardrail_count`、`calibrated_count`、`thresholds_blocking_promotion`、promotion dependency review blockers 和 calibration backlog。`threshold_prioritization_report.json/md` 基于同一 registry 对 36 个 uncalibrated high-impact thresholds 排序；validation pack summary 同步暴露 `threshold_prioritization_summary`。`threshold_calibration_report.json/md` 只覆盖第一批中的 5 个 indicator research evidence gate 阈值；validation pack summary 同步暴露 `threshold_calibration_summary`。`threshold_calibration_followup_plan.json/md` 从 calibration report 抽取 5 个阈值结果并输出 data gap plan；`recommendation_changed` 只表示 sensitivity 场景下 recommendation 是否变化，不表示 threshold current value 已改变。`dynamic_trend_threshold_calibration_prep_report.json/md` 只覆盖 `dynamic_allocation.risk_off_score_thresholds`、`dynamic_allocation.risk_on_confirmation_thresholds` 和 `trend_calibration.score_bands`，输出 current_value、where_used、decision_affecting_path、tested_values、sensitivity impact、recommendation_by_value、false risk-off/risk-on impact、turnover/constraint-hit impact 和 drawdown/missed-upside impact；所有 recommendation 都是 `collect_evidence_only`，不改 current value，不升级 `VALIDATED_BOUNDARY`，最多允许后续 `SENSITIVITY_TESTED`。`long_horizon_evidence_floor_calibration_audit.json/md` 只读读取 expanded historical trace、outcome availability、masking robustness、gate audit 和 bridge artifacts，对 20/30/50/80/100 full-advisory mature-case floors 重跑 recommendation sensitivity。相关 artifacts 只能用于 diagnostic / ablation / sensitivity / prep analysis，`promotion_gate_allowed=false`，不改变 production / paper-shadow / official weights。

TRADING-698 在同一 threshold governance family 中新增 `dynamic_trend_threshold_sensitivity_review.json/md`，入口是 `aits research indicators dynamic-trend-threshold-sensitivity-review`，并由 `aits research indicators validation-pack` 写入 `outputs/research_indicators/control_plane_v1_validation/dynamic_trend_threshold_sensitivity_review.json/md`。该 artifact 只覆盖 `dynamic_allocation.risk_off_score_thresholds`、`dynamic_allocation.risk_on_confirmation_thresholds` 和 `trend_calibration.score_bands`，输出 current/stricter/relaxed/capped-or-smoothed/no-change variants 的 1d/5d/10d/20d avg return、hit rate、max drawdown、drawdown preservation、turnover、constraint hit、risk-off/risk-on trigger、false risk-off/false risk-on 和 missed-upside metrics，并按 horizon、asset、date、regime、event window、full_advisory_only、component/backtest bridge 和 correlated asset cluster 分层。它必须披露 mature date/case count、full advisory case count、cluster/regime count 和 sample quality breakdown；recommendation 只能是 validation recommendation，不能修改 threshold current value，不能升级 `VALIDATED_BOUNDARY`，不能改变 production / paper-shadow / official weights。

TRADING-699 将 `dynamic_trend_threshold_sensitivity_review.json/md` 扩展为可显式传入 `--coverage-extension-root`。该输入读取 research campaign control-window risk signal 和 cached price evidence，生成 `trace_source=backtest_trace_bridge` 的 coverage-extension cases，用于扩大 by asset、correlated asset cluster、realized coverage regime 和 event window 分层；这些 cases 只能提高 validation coverage diagnostics，不会提高 `full_advisory_case_count`，也不能被当作 production-equivalent replay。artifact summary 额外披露 TRADING-698 baseline coverage、coverage targets、coverage target status、case origin counts、trace source counts、coverage extension case count、independent signal date count 和 pending maturity tracker；所有 recommendation 仍是 validation recommendation，不能修改 threshold current value、不能升级 `VALIDATED_BOUNDARY`、不能改变 production / paper-shadow / official weights。

TRADING-702 新增 `config/research/pit_feature_availability_contracts.yaml` 和 `pit_source_readiness_audit.json/md`。该 registry 按 feature 记录 source、raw/release/accepted/available/ingestion/decision time、revision policy、snapshot/source manifest policy、risk flags、fail-closed rule 和 repair strategy；audit 读取 historical gate audit / trace lineage，把粗粒度 PIT blockers 细分为 `true_not_available_before_decision_time`、`available_time_missing`、`timestamp_model_too_conservative`、`source_snapshot_missing`、`feature_reconstruction_gap`、`lineage_manifest_missing`、`replay_config_issue`、`calendar_mapping_issue`、`asset_mapping_issue`、`price_window_not_mature`、`vendor_current_view_only` 和 `unknown_requires_manual_review`。validation pack summary 同步暴露 `pit_source_readiness_summary`，并固定 `lookahead_violation_count=0`、`production_effect=none`、`promotion_gate_allowed=false`、`paper_shadow_change_allowed=false`、`production_weight_change_allowed=false`。

TRADING-700 在同一 threshold governance family 中新增 `dynamic_trend_bridge_consistency_audit.json/md`，入口是 `aits research indicators dynamic-trend-bridge-consistency-audit`，也由 `aits research indicators validation-pack` 写入 `outputs/research_indicators/control_plane_v1_validation/dynamic_trend_bridge_consistency_audit.json/md`。该 artifact 读取 TRADING-699 sensitivity review，对 3 个 dynamic/trend threshold 分别比较 `full_advisory_only` 和 `backtest_trace_bridge` source layer，输出 source-layer recommendations、direction agreement、metric deltas、false risk-off/on delta、missed-upside delta、drawdown-preservation delta、turnover delta、constraint-hit delta 和 bridge reliability label。若 full-advisory 样本不足，必须保持 `evidence_strength=low`、`recommendation=sensitivity_tested_only`、`validated_boundary=false`；`backtest_trace_bridge` 不能单独作为 promotion gate evidence，不能修改 threshold current value，不能改变 production / paper-shadow / official weights。

TRADING-701 在同一 threshold governance family 中新增 `dynamic_trend_full_advisory_expansion_report.json/md`，入口是 `aits research indicators dynamic-trend-full-advisory-expansion`，也由 `aits research indicators validation-pack` 写入 `outputs/research_indicators/control_plane_v1_validation/dynamic_trend_full_advisory_expansion_report.json/md`。该 artifact 审计 dynamic/trend threshold calibration 为什么 full-advisory equivalent trace 样本有限，并只在 data quality、PIT feature availability、lineage manifest 和 production-equivalent proof gate 全部满足时，把 historical `score-daily` traces 纳入 rebuilt expanded trace；summary 暴露 requested/eligible/blocked date counts、full_advisory_case_count before/after、blocked_by_reason、repairable_without_relaxing_gate、expected PIT limitation、lineage missing 和 replay config issue。after-expansion consistency audit 仍必须遵守 TRADING-700 reliability floor；full-advisory 不足时保持 `insufficient_full_advisory_to_assess`、`evidence_strength=low`、`recommendation=sensitivity_tested_only` 和 `validated_boundary=false`。该 artifact 只用于 validation-only coverage audit，不修改 threshold current value，不放宽 production gate，不批准 promotion、paper-shadow、production weight 或 official weights。

## ETF Portfolio runtime artifact policy

`data/etf_portfolio/`、`data/simulation/` 和 `reports/` 是本地运行产物目录，默认由 ETF daily run、simulation、backtest、P1/P2 observe-only reports 或 report integration 命令生成，并通过 `.gitignore` 排除在源码提交之外。它们可以作为本机审计证据和人工复核输入，但不是 source artifacts。

ETF deterministic test fixtures 只能提交到 `tests/fixtures/etf_portfolio/`。不要把测试 fixture 放进 `data/` 或 `reports/`，也不要把 daily run 生成的 report 复制成源码 fixture，除非另行建立明确的最小化、脱敏、确定性 fixture。

`config/report_registry.yaml` 中的 report entry 默认按 as-of 选择 artifact。显式标记 `artifact_selection_policy=latest_available` 的 ad-hoc research entry 只用于 Reader Brief/report index 的 latest 研究下钻，例如 Dynamic v3 parameter sweep leaderboard；这类记录会在 report index JSON/HTML 中披露 `artifact_temporal_relation=AFTER_AS_OF` 和 `artifact_after_as_of=true`，表示它是最新研究 evidence，不是 daily decision snapshot 的历史输入，也不允许补跑上游或生成 production action。

`config/report_registry.yaml` 的 `visibility_policy` 是 TRADING-487_to_504 Stage C 后 report index 的长期可见性分类：`current` 为默认当前证据，`legacy_optional` / `deprecated_optional` / `archived_optional` 用于历史或可选导航面；非 current 的 missing/stale artifact 会显示为 `LEGACY_*` / `DEPRECATED_*` 等审计状态并计入 `non_current_visibility_count`，不再制造当前 missing/stale warning。`config/report_index_visibility_waivers.yaml` 是 TRADING-352A/TRADING-375 report index visibility waiver source policy，当前保留治理入口但 `waivers: []`。未来若确需临时 waiver，该文件仍必须按 `waiver_id`、affected report registry entry / artifact family、`issue_status`、`report_id(s)`、owner、reason、accepted impact、validation coverage、exit condition、`created_at`、`expires_at`、`review_status` 和 `linked_task_id` 记录；expired 或 inactive waiver 不改变 artifact 的 `freshness_status`，不补造 report，不运行上游，也不能 waiver required daily missing 或 production-effect risk；`aits reports waiver-inventory` / `validate-waiver-inventory` 会 fail closed 暴露过期或缺 registry entry 的 waiver。

TRADING-421 exact blocker/warning inventory 是只读恢复治理 artifact，位于 `outputs/reports/exact_blocker_warning_inventory_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md` 和 `exact_blocker_warning_inventory_validation_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md`。`aits reports exact-blocker-warning-inventory --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` 读取 recovery blocker triage、post-recovery governance pack、source depth audit、report-index warning triage、normal paper-shadow observation clock 和 recovery owner action map，逐条输出当前 post-recovery source counts 下的 blocker、recovery warning 和 report-index unwaived warning 的 source artifact、upstream dependency、repair type、waiver eligibility、next action、normal/extended/live boundary 与 Reader Brief section。该 report 不运行上游、不刷新数据、不补造 signal/snapshot/metrics、不创建 waiver、不写 owner decision、不修改 paper-shadow/production state、不触发 broker/order；存在 blocker 时只把 `EXACT_INVENTORY_BLOCKED` 暴露给 owner review。

TRADING-429～438 decision-stage review 是只读 owner-decision 前置治理 artifact family，位于 `outputs/reports/eight_blocker_decision_review_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md`、`normal_shadow_gate_gap_analysis_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md`、`promotion_blocker_after_metrics_review_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md`、`candidate_research_return_assessment_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md`、`owner_decision_options_packet_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md`、`owner_decision_dry_run_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md`、`observation_clock_readiness_plan_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md`、`post_decision_rerun_plan_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md`、`report_quality_warning_drilldown_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md`、`governance_status_snapshot_after_decision_review_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md` 和 `eight_blocker_decision_review_validation_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md`。`aits reports decision-stage-review --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` 读取 current report index、research governance recovery pack、report quality gate、owner audit log 和 recovery pack source artifacts；`owner_decision_dry_run` 只验证 proposed record shape，必须保持 `would_append=false` / `real_entry_written=false`。这些 artifacts 不 append owner decision、不生成 signoff、不启动 observation clock、不恢复 normal shadow、不批准 extended shadow/live trading、不写 official target weights、不修改 candidate/paper-shadow/production state、不触发 broker/order。

TRADING-439～448 return-to-research reset 是 decision-stage 后的 research reset artifact family。`aits reports return-to-research-reset --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` 会记录显式 owner `return_to_research` decision（append-only JSONL；同 decision id 已存在时复用），并生成 `owner_return_to_research_decision_record`、`candidate_return_to_research_transition_pack`、`candidate_failure_mode_attribution`、`reusable_evidence_extraction`、`return_to_research_hypothesis_backlog`、`next_candidate_spec_draft`、`research_backfill_plan_for_next_candidate`、`archived_candidate_status_update`、`research_cycle_reset_pack`、`return_to_research_governance_snapshot` 和 `return_to_research_governance_snapshot_validation`。这些 artifacts 把 candidate 状态置为可审计的 `RETURNED_TO_RESEARCH`，但不 reject、不恢复 normal shadow、不批准 extended/live、不写 official target weights、不修改 production 或 broker/order。

TRADING-449～459 next research cycle 是 return-to-research 之后的 research-only artifact family。`aits reports next-research-cycle-intake`、`next-candidate-spec-freeze`、`next-candidate-backfill`、`next-candidate-stress-review`、`next-candidate-cost-benchmark-review`、`next-candidate-vs-returned-candidate-comparison`、`next-candidate-signal-robustness-review`、`next-candidate-overfit-window-sensitivity`、`next-candidate-research-gate`、`next-candidate-owner-research-review-packet` 和 `next-candidate-research-cycle-snapshot` 依次生成 `next_research_cycle_intake`、`next_candidate_spec_frozen`、`next_candidate_backfill`、`next_candidate_stress_review`、`next_candidate_cost_benchmark_review`、`next_candidate_vs_returned_candidate_comparison`、`next_candidate_signal_robustness_review`、`next_candidate_overfit_window_sensitivity`、`next_candidate_research_gate`、`next_candidate_owner_research_review_packet` 和 `next_candidate_research_cycle_snapshot`；对应 `validate-next-*` 命令可生成 validation artifacts，其中 final snapshot validation 为 `next_candidate_research_cycle_snapshot_validation`。这些 artifacts 不创建 paper-shadow candidate、不恢复 normal shadow、不批准 extended/live、不写 official target weights、不触发 broker/order、不 append owner decision、不修改 production；TRADING-451 在解释 backfill 前运行同一 validate-data code path，并在缺 executable next-candidate signal/weight binding 时 fail closed 为 more-evidence 状态。

TRADING-460 executable binding contract 是 TRADING-449～459 之后的 contract-only research artifact。`aits reports next-candidate-executable-binding-contract --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` 读取 frozen spec、final next research-cycle snapshot、backfill plan 和 research gate output，生成 `next_candidate_executable_binding_contract`；`aits reports validate-next-candidate-executable-binding-contract --latest` 生成 `next_candidate_executable_binding_contract_validation`。该 contract 只定义 required signal/feature inputs、allowed research-only state outputs、allowed hypothetical allocation output schema 和 forbidden outputs，不实现 signal behavior、不产生 hypothetical weights、不创建 paper-shadow、不写 official target weights、不触发 broker/order、不修改 production。

TRADING-461 executable signal binding 是 contract 后的 research-only signal state layer。`aits reports next-candidate-signal-binding --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` 先运行同一路径的 cached-data quality gate，然后读取 contract validation、frozen spec、signal input completeness policy、ETF signal series 和 feature matrix，生成 `next_candidate_signal_binding`；`aits reports validate-next-candidate-signal-binding --latest` 生成 validation。该 layer 只输出 candidate signal series、latest signal state、confidence/uncertainty 和 blocking reason；不输出 hypothetical research weights、official target weights、paper-shadow activation、broker/order、owner decision 或 backfill metrics。

TRADING-462 executable research weight binding 是 signal binding 后的 hypothetical-only allocation layer。`aits reports next-candidate-research-weight-binding --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` 先运行同一路径的 cached-data quality gate，然后读取 `next_candidate_signal_binding` 和 validation，按 governed research weight policy 输出 `next_candidate_research_weight_binding`；`aits reports validate-next-candidate-research-weight-binding --latest` 生成 validation。该 layer 只输出 hypothetical research weights、previous hypothetical weights、rotation delta、turnover proxy、risk state、constraint hits 和 blocking reason；不输出 official target weights、paper-shadow activation、broker/order、owner decision、production mutation 或 backfill return/drawdown/cost/benchmark metrics。

TRADING-463 executable binding safety audit 是 TRADING-464 backfill 前的 hard-stop safety gate。`aits reports executable-binding-safety-audit --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` 读取 signal binding、research weight binding 及其 validation artifacts，并扫描 binding module、research policy 和生成 artifacts 是否出现 official target weights、broker/order、live allocation、production mutation、account/API key、paper-shadow activation 或 owner decision append 语义；`aits reports validate-executable-binding-safety-audit --latest` 生成 validation。只有 `EXECUTABLE_BINDING_SAFETY_PASS` 或 acceptable `EXECUTABLE_BINDING_SAFETY_WARNING` 才允许继续 rerun backfill；`EXECUTABLE_BINDING_SAFETY_BLOCKED` 必须停止。

TRADING-464 binding-backed next candidate backfill 在 safety audit pass/acceptable warning 后运行。`aits reports next-candidate-backfill --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` 先运行同一路径的 validate-data quality gate，然后读取 executable signal binding、research-only weight binding、safety audit、frozen spec、backfill windows 和价格 cache，输出真实 return/drawdown/turnover/rotation/false-risk-off/constraint/signal-completeness proxy metrics；`aits reports validate-next-candidate-backfill --latest` 生成 validation。当前 binding 只有单点 signal/weight row 时，artifact 必须标为 `CANDIDATE_BACKFILL_PARTIAL` 和 static research-weight proxy，不得声明完整动态策略 backfill。

TRADING-465 stress/cost/benchmark rerun 使用 TRADING-464 的 complete 或 partial real metrics 重新生成 `next_candidate_stress_review`、`next_candidate_stress_review_validation`、`next_candidate_cost_benchmark_review` 和 `next_candidate_cost_benchmark_review_validation`。`aits reports next-candidate-stress-review --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` 从 backfill window metrics 输出 stress result、major blockers/warnings、worst return/drawdown proxy 和 scenario rows；`aits reports next-candidate-cost-benchmark-review --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` 用 aggregate return proxy 和 turnover proxy 计算 cost drag、net proxy、cost survival 和 candidate-vs-baseline delta。2026-06-17 真实 run 基于 `CANDIDATE_BACKFILL_PARTIAL` static proxy，stress 为 `WEAK`，cost/benchmark 为 `COST_BENCHMARK_REVIEW_WEAK`，validation 均 PASS；这些 artifacts 只支持继续 research comparison，不优化候选、不创建 paper-shadow、不写 official target weights、不触发 broker/order、不 append owner decision、不修改 production。

TRADING-466 vs-returned comparison 使用 returned candidate failure attribution、reusable/invalidated evidence、TRADING-464 real backfill、TRADING-465 stress review 和 TRADING-465 cost/benchmark review 生成 `next_candidate_vs_returned_candidate_comparison` 与 validation artifact。Comparison rows 覆盖 drawdown mismatch、flip/rotation、turnover、cost survival、benchmark-relative behavior、signal robustness 和 governance blockers，并明确标记 repeated failure mode。2026-06-17 真实 run 输出 `MIXED_VS_RETURNED_CANDIDATE`，benchmark relative behavior 为 `REPEATS_FAILURE_MODE`，drawdown mismatch 为 `REGRESSED_VS_REUSABLE_EVIDENCE`，validation PASS；该 artifact 不声明 improved、不进入 paper-shadow、不写 official target weights、不触发 broker/order、不 append owner decision、不修改 production。

TRADING-467 signal/window rerun 使用 executable signal binding 和 TRADING-464 real backfill window metrics 生成 `next_candidate_signal_robustness_review`、`next_candidate_signal_robustness_review_validation`、`next_candidate_overfit_window_sensitivity` 和 `next_candidate_overfit_window_sensitivity_validation` artifacts。Signal review 对 missing feature columns、partial signal series、stale signal series、schema mismatch 和 market coverage gap fail closed；window review 对 early/middle/recent/stress-heavy/calm diagnostic splits 输出 real split metrics、fragility、overfit risk 和 blocking conditions。2026-06-17 真实 run 输出 `SIGNAL_ROBUSTNESS_BLOCKED`（blocking checks=3）与 `WINDOW_FRAGILE`（`overfit_risk=HIGH`、weak splits=2、partial static proxy splits=3），validations PASS；该 artifact 不推进 paper-shadow、不写 official target weights、不触发 broker/order、不 append owner decision、不修改 production。

TRADING-468 research gate rerun 使用 executable binding safety audit、TRADING-464 real backfill、TRADING-465 stress/cost/benchmark reviews、TRADING-466 vs-returned comparison 和 TRADING-467 signal/window reviews 生成 `next_candidate_research_gate` 与 validation artifact。Gate taxonomy 限定为 `RESEARCH_PROMISING|NEEDS_MORE_EVIDENCE|RETURN_TO_HYPOTHESIS_BACKLOG|REJECT_RESEARCH_CANDIDATE`，并必须披露 strongest positive/negative evidence、blockers 和 required next action。2026-06-17 真实 run 输出 `NEEDS_MORE_EVIDENCE`，blockers=5，validation PASS；该 gate 不激活 paper-shadow、不写 official target weights、不触发 broker/order、不 append owner decision、不修改 production。

TRADING-469 owner research review packet 使用 latest research gate 输出生成 `next_candidate_owner_research_review_packet` 与 validation artifact。Packet 必须列出 continue research validation、revise hypothesis、return to hypothesis backlog、reject research candidate 和 hold for more data 五个 owner options，每个 option 包含 evidence required、risks 和 next action。2026-06-17 真实 run 输出 `OWNER_RESEARCH_REVIEW_PACKET_READY`，options=5，validation PASS；该 packet 不 append owner decision、不激活 paper-shadow、不写 official target weights、不触发 broker/order、不修改 production。

TRADING-470 executable research-cycle snapshot 使用 executable binding contract、signal binding、research weight binding、safety audit、real backfill、stress/cost/benchmark、vs-returned comparison、signal/window reviews、research gate 和 owner packet 生成 `next_candidate_research_cycle_snapshot` 与 validation artifact。2026-06-17 真实 run 收集 14 个 artifacts，其中 executable artifacts=4，missing required artifacts=0，最终输出 `EXECUTABLE_RESEARCH_CYCLE_NEEDS_MORE_EVIDENCE`，并保留 gate `NEEDS_MORE_EVIDENCE`、partial backfill、weak stress/cost/benchmark、mixed vs-returned、blocked signal robustness 和 fragile window sensitivity 结论；该 snapshot 不伪造 metrics、不 append owner decision、不创建 paper-shadow、不写 official target weights、不触发 broker/order、不修改 production。

TRADING-505_to_520 Weight Research Program v1 source contracts 位于 `docs/research/`，包括 `weight_research_retrospective.json/md`、`weight_control_architecture_rfc.json/md`、`ablation_protocol.json`、`ablation_and_baseline_protocol.md`、`statistical_validation_policy.json`、`statistical_validation_and_holdout_policy.md`、`next_research_program_roadmap.json/md`、`research_program_control_plane.json/md`、`research_window_catalog.json/md`、`portfolio_utility_scorecard_contract.json/md`、`ablation_runner_contract.json/md`、`research_result_comparison_harness.json/md`、`b0_static_strategic_baseline_result.json/md`、`ablation_runner_scope_freeze.json/md`、`signal_robustness_entry_contract.json/md`、`untouched_holdout_final_gate_policy.json/md`、`b1_execution_control_result.json/md`、`b1_metric_semantics_and_comparator_audit.json/md`、`static_baseline_family_result.json/md`、`b1_isolated_attribution_result.json/md`、`research_layer_interface_contract.json/md`、`dependency_boundary_validation.json/md`、`signal_diagnostics_framework_contract.json/md`、`b2_risk_scaler_research_result.json/md`、`b3_relative_tilt_research_result.json/md`、`b4_risk_tilt_interaction_result.json/md`、`confidence_shrinkage_contract.json/md`、`confidence_interaction_review.json/md`、`regime_information_contract.json/md`、`regime_incremental_evaluation.json/md`、`main_interaction_effect_synthesis.json/md`、`candidate_v3_spec_from_proven_effects.json/md`、`candidate_v3_mini_gate_result.json/md`、`weight_research_program_v1_reader_brief.md` 和 `weight_research_program_v1_snapshot.json/md`。这些 artifacts 定义 failure taxonomy、权重控制分层、B0-B6 消融顺序、validation/holdout policy、H1-H3 roadmap、实验控制面、窗口用途、utility scorecard pilot lambda、runner contract、comparison taxonomy、B0 static control result、511A-C unblock contracts、历史 B1 execution-control result、511E metric/comparator audit、511F B0H/B0R baseline family、511G B1E attribution gate、512A interface/dependency boundary、512B signal diagnostics framework、512C-F B2 risk scaler、513A-D B3 relative tilt、514A-B B4 R×T interaction、515/516 blocked C/G review、517-519 synthesis/v3 gates 和 current program snapshot。`research_window_catalog` 把已使用窗口标为 development/diagnostic；`untouched_holdout_final_gate_policy` 将 final holdout 冻结为未来窗口并阻止 development/mini/full runs 提前使用；`b0_static_strategic_baseline_result` 记录 `B000/static_default_portfolio` 指标；`b1_execution_control_result` 记录历史 B1-only runner 的 mixed research-only evidence，但 `b1_metric_semantics_and_comparator_audit` 将其归因标记为 `B1_ATTRIBUTION_PARTIAL`；`static_baseline_family_result` 记录 B0H/B0R，`b1_isolated_attribution_result` 记录 B1E vs B0R 为 `B1_ATTRIBUTION_VALID_MIXED`；B2/B3/B4 均生成 signal、target path、E0/E1 mini-backfill 和 diagnostics artifacts，B4 interaction classification 为 `INCONCLUSIVE`；B5/B6/v3 artifacts 按 hard stop blocked，`weight_research_program_v1_snapshot` 当前仍为 `WEIGHT_RESEARCH_PROGRAM_NEEDS_MORE_EVIDENCE`。所有 source/result artifacts 固定 `research_only=true`、`manual_review_only=true`、`official_target_weights=false`、`broker_action_allowed=false`、`production_effect=none`；后续 runner 若输出 data-dependent metrics 必须先通过 `aits validate-data` 同一路径，并且 signal diagnostics PASS 不等于组合收益 PASS。

TRADING-521_to_524 B1-B4 diagnosis batch 是 TRADING-505_to_520 checkpoint 后的只读 research diagnosis artifact family。`aits etf weight-research diagnose-b1-b4 --write-source-alias` 读取 canonical B0/B1/B2/B3/B4 research artifacts，先执行同一路径 `aits validate-data` gate，再生成 `b1_b4_component_result_attribution.json/md`、`b4_interaction_inconclusive_drilldown.json/md`、`e0_e1_baseline_consistency_audit.json/md` 和 `b4_next_decision_checkpoint.json/md`。521 输出 B1/B2/B3/B4 vs B0、B4 vs B2/B3 的 return/drawdown/turnover/cost/benchmark-relative delta、stress/window/signal robustness 和 module usefulness；522 将 B4 root cause 归因为 sample window insufficient、utility score ambiguous、B3 weak、turnover/cost offsets benefit 和 B2 threshold activation not observed，状态为 `B4_REQUIRES_MORE_WINDOWS`；523 输出 E0/E1 baseline consistency `PASS_WITH_LIMITATIONS`；524 决策为 `RUN_MORE_B4_WINDOWS` 且 `b5_allowed=false`、`b6_allowed=false`。该批次不改 strategy logic、不重新跑 B2/B3/B4、不继续 B5/B6/v3、不访问 untouched holdout、不写 official target weights、不创建 paper-shadow、不触发 broker/order、不修改 production。

TRADING-525_to_529 B2/B3/B4 diagnostic expansion 是 TRADING-521_to_524 后的多窗口只读 diagnosis artifact family。`aits etf weight-research diagnose-b2-b4-expansion --write-source-alias` 读取 frozen research window catalog、B1 execution policy、B2/B3 module policy、cached prices 和 canonical research artifacts，先执行同一路径 `aits validate-data` gate，再生成 `b2_risk_scaler_trigger_coverage_audit.json/md`、`b3_slow_tilt_negative_contribution_attribution.json/md`、`b1_b4_multi_window_diagnostic_expansion.json/md`、`b4_interaction_evidence_synthesis.json/md` 和 `b5_admission_checkpoint.json/md`。525 当前输出 `B2_REQUIRES_RISK_HEAVY_WINDOWS`，说明 rapid_drawdown 当前窗口无触发但 slow_drawdown risk-heavy window 有触发；526 当前输出 `B3_NEGATIVE_DUE_TO_SIGNAL_DIRECTION`；527 覆盖 normal_uptrend、rapid_drawdown、slow_drawdown、high_volatility_sideways、v_shaped_recovery、semiconductor_correction 和 false_risk_off_cluster 七个 development/diagnostic windows，状态 `MULTI_WINDOW_DIAGNOSTIC_COMPLETE`；528 当前将 B4 判定为 `B4_REDUNDANT`，因为 B4 在多数窗口基本等同 B3；529 当前输出 `B5_ADMISSION_BLOCKED_MORE_EVIDENCE`，且 `b5_allowed=false`、`b6_allowed=false`、`v3_allowed=false`。该批次不改 B2/B3/B4 strategy logic、不访问 untouched holdout、不继续 B5/B6/v3、不写 official target weights、不创建 paper-shadow、不触发 broker/order、不修改 production。

TRADING-530_to_536 B2 risk-overlay path and B3 redesign branching 是 TRADING-525_to_529 后的只读 research branching artifact family。`aits etf weight-research branch-b2-b3 --write-source-alias` 读取 canonical 525~529 artifacts，先执行同一路径 `aits validate-data` gate，再生成 `b2_risk_heavy_window_evaluation.json/md`、`b3_slow_tilt_signal_direction_audit.json/md`、`b1_execution_control_adoption_review.json/md`、`ablation_path_branching_decision.json/md`、`b2_only_research_candidate_checkpoint.json/md`、`b3_redesign_hypothesis_pack.json/md` 和 `research_program_checkpoint_after_branching.json/md`。530 当前输出 `B2_RISK_OVERLAY_MIXED`，因为 slow_drawdown 有 drawdown benefit 但 return、turnover 和 cost 受损；531 当前输出 `B3_REDESIGN_REQUIRED`，因为 wrong-tilt dates 和 negative windows 指向 signal direction / lag / overreaction 问题；532 当前输出 `B1_OPTIONAL_WRAPPER`；533 选择 `CONTINUE_B2_ONLY_PATH` 并阻塞 `B3_CURRENT_FORM`、`B4_CURRENT_COMBO`、B5、B6 和 v3；534 当前输出 `B2_ONLY_NEEDS_MORE_EVIDENCE`；535 输出 `B3_REDESIGN_HYPOTHESES_READY`；536 当前输出 `CONTINUE_B2_ONLY_RESEARCH`，且 `b5_allowed=false`、`b6_allowed=false`、`v3_allowed=false`。该批次不调 B2/B3 参数、不改 strategy logic、不实现 redesigned B3、不访问 untouched holdout、不继续 B5/B6/v3、不写 official target weights、不创建 paper-shadow、不触发 broker/order、不修改 production。

TRADING-537_to_556 post-B2/B3 risk and redesign research 是 TRADING-530_to_536 后的只读 post-branch artifact family。`aits etf weight-research post-b2-b3-research --write-source-alias` 读取 canonical 525~536 artifacts 和 `research_window_catalog`，先执行同一路径 `aits validate-data` gate，再生成 20 个 JSON/Markdown artifacts：`b2_only_research_scope`、`b2_risk_heavy_window_catalog`、`b2_only_risk_heavy_diagnostic_backfill`、`b2_false_risk_off_reentry_attribution`、`b2_cost_benchmark_survival_review`、`b2_only_research_gate`、`b3_redesign_constraints`、`b3_redesign_hypothesis_ranking`、`b3_signal_direction_precheck`、`b3_redesigned_mini_backfill`、`b3_redesign_gate`、`b1_wrapper_compatibility_with_b2`、`b1_wrapper_compatibility_with_redesigned_b3`、`post_b2_b3_branch_synthesis`、`retest_b4_with_redesigned_b3`、`b5_readmission_after_redesigned_b4`、`research_cadence_controller`、`candidate_exploration_backlog_manager`、`monthly_research_program_review` 和 `final_branch_decision_snapshot`。537 冻结 B2-only scope；538 覆盖 rapid drawdown、slow drawdown、high-volatility sideways、semiconductor correction、V-shaped recovery、false risk-off cluster、risk-off quick recovery 和 risk-signal false positive；539~542 将 B2 判为 `B2_ONLY_NEEDS_MORE_EVIDENCE`；543~547 将 B3 redesign 停在 `B3_SIGNAL_DIRECTION_PRECHECK_MIXED` / `B3_REDESIGNED_MINI_BACKFILL_BLOCKED` / `B3_REDESIGN_RETURN_TO_HYPOTHESIS`；548~549 将 B1 wrapper 保持 optional/mixed 且 B1+B3 blocked；550~556 最终选择 `CONTINUE_B2_ONLY_PATH`，`b5_allowed=false`、`b6_allowed=false`、`v3_allowed=false`。该批次不生成 redesigned B3 weights、不重测 B4、不重新准入 B5、不触碰 holdout、不写 official target weights、不创建 paper-shadow、不触发 broker/order、不修改 production。

TRADING-557_to_564 B2 evidence expansion and B3 precheck v2 是 TRADING-537_to_556 后的只读 research artifact family。`aits etf weight-research b2-b3-v2-research --write-source-alias` 读取 B2-only gate、B2 risk-heavy catalog/backfill/re-entry/cost artifacts、B3 signal-direction precheck/audit/ranking artifacts 和 final branch snapshot，先执行同一路径 `aits validate-data` gate，再生成 8 个 JSON/Markdown artifacts：`b2_evidence_gap_ledger`、`b2_risk_heavy_window_expansion_v2`、`b2_risk_trigger_sensitivity_map`、`b2_reentry_opportunity_cost_review`、`b2_only_research_gate_v2`、`b3_signal_direction_failure_taxonomy`、`b3_redesign_candidate_precheck_v2` 和 `branch_decision_after_b2_v2_b3_precheck_v2`。557 输出 `B2_EVIDENCE_GAP_LEDGER_READY`；558 覆盖 rapid drawdown、slow drawdown、volatility spike、high-volatility sideways、semiconductor correction、V-shaped recovery、false risk-off cluster 和 shallow pullback false alarm；559 输出 `B2_TRIGGER_COVERAGE_TOO_LOW` 且不改变 threshold；560 输出 `B2_REENTRY_LAG_HIGH`；561 保持 `B2_ONLY_NEEDS_MORE_EVIDENCE`；562 输出 `B3_SIGNAL_DIRECTION_FAILURE_TAXONOMY_READY`；563 只做 signal-only precheck 并保持 `B3_PRECHECK_MIXED`；564 选择 `CONTINUE_B2_ONLY_TO_FULL_DIAGNOSTIC`，`B4_retest_allowed=false`、`b5_allowed=false`、`b6_allowed=false`、`v3_allowed=false`。该批次不访问 untouched holdout、不生成 B3 weights、不运行 B3 backfill、不重测 B4、不运行 B5/B6/v3、不写 official target weights、不创建 paper-shadow、不触发 broker/order、不修改 production，并继续披露 `ai_after_chatgpt` regime、requested date range、data quality status、source artifacts、Reader Brief 和 safety boundary。

TRADING-565_to_574 B2 full diagnostic and B3 signal resolution 是 TRADING-557_to_564 后的只读 research artifact family。`aits etf weight-research b2-full-diagnostic-research --write-source-alias` 读取 B2 v2 gate/windows/backfill/re-entry/cost/trigger artifacts、B3 taxonomy/precheck v2、B1 wrapper with B2 review、branch decision v2 和 `research_window_catalog`，先执行同一路径 `aits validate-data` gate，再生成 10 个 JSON/Markdown artifacts：`b2_full_diagnostic_scope`、`b2_full_diagnostic_windows`、`b2_full_diagnostic_backfill`、`b2_drawdown_protection_attribution`、`b2_false_risk_off_reentry_cost_review`、`b2_cost_benchmark_utility_review`、`b2_signal_robustness_trigger_stability`、`b2_only_full_diagnostic_gate`、`b3_signal_precheck_resolution_plan` 和 `b2_b3_branch_status_snapshot`。565 冻结 B2 full diagnostic 仅包含 B0 static baseline、fast asymmetric risk overlay、risk-off exposure scaler 和 re-entry logic；566 覆盖 rapid drawdown、slow drawdown、volatility spike、high-volatility sideways、semiconductor correction、V-shaped recovery、false risk-off cluster、shallow pullback false alarm、normal uptrend control 和 calm market control；567 输出 `B2_FULL_DIAGNOSTIC_PARTIAL`，因为 normal/calm controls 只有 normal-market no-trigger reference，尚无独立 B2 control-window signal rerun artifact；568~572 当前为 `B2_DRAWDOWN_PROTECTION_MIXED`、`B2_REENTRY_LAG_HIGH`、`B2_UTILITY_MIXED`、`B2_TRIGGER_STABILITY_WEAK` 和 `B2_ONLY_NEEDS_MORE_EVIDENCE`；573 输出 `B3_SIGNAL_PRECHECK_RESOLUTION_READY`，不生成 weights、不运行 mini-backfill；574 选择 `CONTINUE_B2_ONLY_RESEARCH`，且 `B4_retest_allowed=false`、`b5_allowed=false`、`b6_allowed=false`、`v3_allowed=false`。该批次不调 B2 threshold/参数、不访问 untouched holdout、不生成 B3 weights、不运行 B3 mini-backfill、不重测 B4、不运行 B5/B6/v3、不写 official target weights、不创建 paper-shadow、不触发 broker/order、不修改 production。

TRADING-575_to_580 B2 control-window evidence completion 是 TRADING-565_to_574 后的只读 research artifact family。`aits etf weight-research b2-control-window-research --write-source-alias` 读取 B2 full diagnostic source artifacts、B2 drawdown/re-entry/cost/signal reviews、B2/B3 branch snapshot、B3 signal resolution plan 和 `research_window_catalog`，先执行同一路径 `aits validate-data` gate，再生成 6 个 JSON/Markdown artifacts：`b2_control_window_rerun_contract`、`b2_control_window_rerun`、`b2_no_trigger_correctness_review`、`b2_full_diagnostic_with_control_windows`、`b2_only_research_gate_v3` 和 `b2_path_decision_snapshot`。575 定义 normal / calm control windows、expected B2 behavior、required outputs、independence requirement、validation 和 Reader Brief；576 对 normal uptrend control 与 calm market control 生成 independent B2 risk signal / target path rerun evidence，aggregate `window_count=2`、`trigger_count=0`、`false_risk_off_count=0`、`unnecessary_exposure_reduction_count=0`，per-window component CSV 带 checksum；577 输出 `B2_NO_TRIGGER_CORRECTNESS_PASS`；578 在 control evidence validated 后把 full diagnostic 从 partial 补齐为 `B2_FULL_DIAGNOSTIC_COMPLETE`；579 仍因 re-entry lag、drawdown/utility mixed 和 trigger stability weak 输出 `B2_ONLY_NEEDS_MORE_EVIDENCE`；580 选择 `CONTINUE_B2_ONLY_RESEARCH`，且 `B4_retest_allowed=false`、`b5_allowed=false`、`b6_allowed=false`、`v3_allowed=false`。该批次不调 B2 threshold/参数、不使用 B3 slow tilt、不访问 untouched holdout、不运行 B3/B4/B5/B6/v3、不写 official target weights、不创建 paper-shadow、不触发 broker/order、不修改 production；`B2_FULL_DIAGNOSTIC_COMPLETE` 只表示 B2 diagnostic evidence set 已含独立 control rerun evidence，不表示 B2 gate promising 或允许进入 B4/B5/B6/v3。

TRADING-582_to_587 B2 complete diagnostic follow-up 是 TRADING-575_to_580 后的只读 decision-plan artifact family。`aits etf weight-research b2-followup-research --write-source-alias` 读取 B2 full diagnostic with controls、B2 full diagnostic backfill、drawdown attribution、false risk-off / re-entry review、cost / benchmark utility review、signal robustness / trigger stability、control-window rerun、no-trigger correctness review、B2 gate v3、B2 path snapshot 和 B3 signal resolution plan，生成 `b2_needs_more_evidence_root_cause_drilldown`、`b2_per_window_utility_scorecard`、`b2_trigger_reentry_design_assessment`、`b2_next_evidence_plan`、`b2_gate_v4_decision` 和 `b2_research_branch_snapshot`。582 当前输出 `B2_NEEDS_MORE_EVIDENCE_BUT_NO_STRUCTURAL_BLOCKER`，说明问题不是 control evidence 缺失或 false risk-off，而是 positive evidence 集中、drawdown protection mixed、trigger coverage too low、re-entry lag high、utility mixed；583 输出 `B2_WINDOW_UTILITY_MIXED`，slow_drawdown 是 worst utility window，rapid_drawdown / volatility_spike 记录为 fails-to-trigger，controls pass；584 输出 `B2_DESIGN_ACCEPTABLE_NEEDS_MORE_EVIDENCE`，不调 threshold、不返回设计；585 输出 `RUN_MORE_B2_RISK_WINDOWS`，列出 additional risk-heavy windows、trigger/re-entry cases、V-shaped recovery、false-risk-off cases、metrics、kill criteria 和 promotion criteria；586 输出 `B2_ONLY_CONTINUE_WITH_DEFINED_EVIDENCE_PLAN`；587 输出 `CONTINUE_B2_ONLY_WITH_TARGETED_EVIDENCE`，且 `B4_retest_allowed=false`、`b5_allowed=false`、`b6_allowed=false`、`v3_allowed=false`、`paper_shadow_allowed=false`。该批次不刷新数据、不运行新 backfill、不调 B2 threshold/参数、不使用 B3/B4/B5/B6/v3、不访问 untouched holdout、不写 official target weights、不创建 paper-shadow、不触发 broker/order、不修改 production；`CONTINUE_B2_ONLY_WITH_TARGETED_EVIDENCE` 只允许继续 B2 evidence collection，不允许进入 promotion-style gate。

TRADING-588_to_596 B2 targeted evidence and role-scope clarification 是 TRADING-582_to_587 后的只读 research artifact family。`aits etf weight-research b2-targeted-evidence-research --write-source-alias` 读取 B2 next evidence plan、per-window scorecard、full diagnostic backfill、control rerun、no-trigger correctness、re-entry review、cost/benchmark utility、signal robustness、gate v4、branch snapshot、B3 signal resolution plan 和 `research_window_catalog`，先执行同一路径 `aits validate-data` gate，再生成 9 个 JSON/Markdown artifacts：`b2_targeted_evidence_window_lock`、`b2_fast_risk_no_trigger_audit`、`b2_slow_drawdown_repeatability_study`、`b2_reentry_lag_root_cause_review`、`b2_role_narrowing_assessment`、`b2_targeted_evidence_backfill_v2`、`b2_targeted_evidence_scorecard`、`b2_gate_v5` 和 `b2_research_branch_snapshot_v2`。588 当前输出 `B2_TARGETED_EVIDENCE_WINDOWS_INCOMPLETE`，因为 slow_drawdown repeatability 只有 1 个独立 available window；589 输出 `B2_FAST_RISK_NOT_SUPPORTED_BY_CURRENT_DESIGN`，rapid_drawdown / volatility_spike no-trigger audit 显示 signal 存在且无 binding issue，但 fast-risk behavior 当前不受支持；590 输出 `B2_SLOW_DRAWDOWN_EDGE_SINGLE_WINDOW_ONLY`；591 输出 `B2_REENTRY_LAG_SIGNAL_DRIVEN`，窗口内未观察到 normal exposure 恢复；592 输出 `B2_FAST_RISK_OVERLAY_NOT_SUPPORTED`，B2 最多是未验证的 candidate slow-drawdown overlay；593 输出 `B2_TARGETED_EVIDENCE_BACKFILL_PARTIAL`，metrics 来自 canonical non-holdout B2 diagnostic rows；594 输出 `B2_TARGETED_EVIDENCE_MIXED`；595 输出 `B2_ONLY_CONTINUE_WITH_MORE_TARGETED_EVIDENCE`；596 输出 `CONTINUE_B2_ONLY_RESEARCH`，且 `B4_retest_allowed=false`、`b5_allowed=false`、`b6_allowed=false`、`v3_allowed=false`、`paper_shadow_allowed=false`。该批次不调 B2 threshold/参数、不补造 repeatability window、不访问 untouched holdout、不运行 B3/B4/B5/B6/v3、不写 official target weights、不创建 paper-shadow、不触发 broker/order、不修改 production；不能将 single-window slow_drawdown evidence 解读为 promising。

TRADING-597_to_604 B2 final evidence and role decision 是 TRADING-588_to_596 后的只读 current-form decision artifact family。`aits etf weight-research b2-final-decision-research --write-source-alias` 读取 targeted evidence artifacts、B2 full diagnostic backfill、control/no-trigger/utility/robustness artifacts、B3 signal resolution plan 和 `research_window_catalog`，生成 8 个 JSON/Markdown artifacts：`b2_slow_drawdown_evidence_completion`、`b2_slow_drawdown_edge_validation`、`b2_fast_risk_role_deprecation_review`、`b2_reentry_lag_design_implication`、`b2_role_reclassification`、`b2_final_research_gate`、`b2_research_line_owner_packet` 和 `b2_branch_snapshot_final`。597 输出 `B2_SLOW_DRAWDOWN_NO_ADDITIONAL_WINDOW`，因为 catalog 中没有第二个独立非 holdout slow_drawdown diagnostic window；598 输出 `B2_SLOW_DRAWDOWN_EDGE_SINGLE_WINDOW_ONLY`，阻断 promising 和 narrow slow-drawdown module；599 输出 `B2_FAST_RISK_ROLE_DEPRECATED`，current B2 不再声称 fast-risk overlay capability；600 输出 `B2_REENTRY_LAG_REQUIRES_DESIGN_REWORK`；601 输出 `B2_RISK_OVERLAY_NEEDS_REDESIGN`；602 输出 `B2_CURRENT_FORM_RETURN_TO_DESIGN`；603 输出 `B2_RESEARCH_LINE_OWNER_PACKET_READY`，只给 owner options、不写 owner decision；604 输出 `RETURN_B2_TO_DESIGN`，且 `B4_retest_allowed=false`、`b5_allowed=false`、`b6_allowed=false`、`v3_allowed=false`、`paper_shadow_allowed=false`。该批次不调 B2 threshold/re-entry logic、不运行 B3/B4/B5/B6/v3、不访问 untouched holdout、不写 official target weights、不创建 paper-shadow、不触发 broker/order、不修改 production。

TRADING-471 executable research evidence gap ledger 是 TRADING-470 后的只读诊断 artifact。`aits reports executable-research-evidence-gap-ledger --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` 读取 executable binding contract、signal binding、research weight binding、safety audit、backfill、stress review、cost/benchmark review、vs-returned comparison、signal robustness review、window sensitivity review、research gate 和 final snapshot，生成 `executable_research_evidence_gap_ledger`；`aits reports validate-executable-research-evidence-gap-ledger --latest` 生成 validation artifact。Ledger 逐条记录 backfill coverage、signal robustness、window fragility、stress failure、cost/benchmark weakness 和 comparison weakness gap 的 current/expected value、root cause、fix type、blocking 和 candidate redesign requirement；不运行上游、不刷新数据、不补造 metrics、不调参、不 append owner decision、不创建 paper-shadow、不批准 extended/live、不写 official target weights、不触发 broker/order、不修改 production。

TRADING-472 backfill partial root-cause repair plan 是 TRADING-471 后的只读诊断 artifact。`aits reports backfill-partial-root-cause-repair-plan --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` 读取 latest `next_candidate_backfill` 和 evidence gap ledger，生成 `backfill_partial_root_cause_repair_plan`；`aits reports validate-backfill-partial-root-cause-repair-plan --latest` 生成 validation artifact。Repair plan 覆盖 normal market regime、rapid drawdown、slow drawdown、high-volatility sideways market、AI / semiconductor correction 和 false risk-off cluster 六个窗口，逐 incomplete window 记录 missing dates、missing feature inputs、missing signal outputs、schema issue、insufficient market coverage、binding execution issue、repairability 和 repair path。若 source artifact 只报告 window-level missing historical signal series，必须披露 missing dates 未枚举，不得补造逐日缺口；该 artifact 不重新运行 backfill、不刷新数据、不补造 metrics、不改变 candidate spec、不削弱 signal completeness rules、不 append owner decision、不创建 paper-shadow、不批准 extended/live、不写 official target weights、不触发 broker/order、不修改 production。

TRADING-473 signal robustness blocker drilldown 是 TRADING-472 后的只读诊断 artifact。`aits reports signal-robustness-blocker-drilldown --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` 读取 `next_candidate_signal_robustness_review`、executable signal binding、TRADING-472 repair plan 和 TRADING-471 evidence ledger，生成 `signal_robustness_blocker_drilldown`；`aits reports validate-signal-robustness-blocker-drilldown --latest` 生成 validation artifact。Drilldown 只对 blocking signal checks 输出 rows，逐项记录 exact input artifact、failed field、expected/actual value、blocker cause、fail-closed status、repair path、是否需要 candidate redesign，以及是否可在不放松 signal completeness rules 的前提下修复；不刷新 signal inputs、不补造 historical signal series、不放松 completeness rules、不改变 candidate spec、不 append owner decision、不创建 paper-shadow、不批准 extended/live、不写 official target weights、不触发 broker/order、不修改 production。

TRADING-474 window fragility attribution 是 TRADING-473 后的只读诊断 artifact。`aits reports window-fragility-attribution --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` 读取 `next_candidate_overfit_window_sensitivity`、TRADING-473 signal drilldown、TRADING-472 repair plan 和 TRADING-471 evidence ledger，生成 `window_fragility_attribution`；`aits reports validate-window-fragility-attribution --latest` 生成 validation artifact。Attribution 比较 early、middle、recent、stress-heavy 和 calm-market splits，输出 fragile/stable/under-observed windows、failure modes、fragility judgment 和是否可继续研究，并覆盖 regime dependence、overfit threshold、signal instability、turnover concentration、drawdown behavior、benchmark-relative weakness 和 cost sensitivity；不重新运行 backfill、不调参隐藏 fragility、不改变 candidate spec、不 append owner decision、不创建 paper-shadow、不批准 extended/live、不写 official target weights、不触发 broker/order、不修改 production。

TRADING-475 stress weakness attribution 是 TRADING-474 后的只读诊断 artifact。`aits reports stress-weakness-attribution --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` 读取 `next_candidate_stress_review`、TRADING-474 window attribution、TRADING-473 signal drilldown、TRADING-472 repair plan 和 TRADING-471 evidence ledger，生成 `stress_weakness_attribution`；`aits reports validate-stress-weakness-attribution --latest` 生成 validation artifact。Attribution 覆盖 rapid drawdown、slow drawdown、V-shaped recovery、high-volatility sideways market、false risk-off cluster 和 AI / semiconductor correction 六个 required scenarios，逐场景记录 candidate behavior、expected behavior、benchmark behavior、drawdown mismatch、rotation/flip issue、turnover impact、root cause、candidate design implication 和 redesign/reject 判断；source stress review 未提供的 required scenario 必须显式标记 `MISSING`，不得补造 behavior。该 artifact 不重新运行 stress/backfill、不调参隐藏 stress failure、不改变 candidate spec、不 append owner decision、不创建 paper-shadow、不批准 extended/live、不写 official target weights、不触发 broker/order、不修改 production。

TRADING-476 cost benchmark weakness attribution 是 TRADING-475 后的只读诊断 artifact。`aits reports cost-benchmark-weakness-attribution --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` 读取 `next_candidate_cost_benchmark_review`、其链接的 cost sensitivity source report、benchmark baseline control pack、TRADING-475 stress attribution、TRADING-474 window attribution、TRADING-472 repair plan 和 TRADING-471 evidence ledger，生成 `cost_benchmark_weakness_attribution`；`aits reports validate-cost-benchmark-weakness-attribution --latest` 生成 validation artifact。Attribution 覆盖 zero/low/medium/high cost scenarios 和 static allocation、no-trade、QQQ-only、SPY-only、equal-weight ETF required baselines，逐行记录 turnover、cost drag、gross/net proxy、baseline delta、cost weakness reason、benchmark weakness reason、defensive/recovery behavior assessment 和 redesign repairability；不重新运行 cost/benchmark/backfill、不调参隐藏 weakness、不改变 candidate spec、不 append owner decision、不创建 paper-shadow、不批准 extended/live、不写 official target weights、不触发 broker/order、不修改 production。

TRADING-477 candidate redesign hypothesis v2 是 TRADING-471~476 归因后的只读 planning artifact。`aits reports candidate-redesign-hypothesis-v2 --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` 读取 evidence gap ledger、backfill repair plan、signal robustness drilldown、window fragility attribution、stress weakness attribution 和 cost/benchmark weakness attribution，生成 `candidate_redesign_hypothesis_v2`；`aits reports validate-candidate-redesign-hypothesis-v2 --latest` 生成 validation artifact。Hypotheses 覆盖 signal robustness repair、lower turnover、window stability、stress handling、benchmark-relative behavior 和 cost survival，逐项记录 expected improvement、changed signal logic、changed regime logic、changed rotation rule、expected failure mode、validation method 和 stop condition；只生成 P0/P1/P2 research hypotheses，不选择最终 v2 spec、不实现 binding、不运行 backfill、不 append owner decision、不创建 paper-shadow、不批准 extended/live、不写 official target weights、不触发 broker/order、不修改 production。

TRADING-478 candidate v2 spec freeze 是 TRADING-477 后的只读 spec artifact。`aits reports candidate-v2-spec-freeze --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` 读取 candidate redesign hypotheses，选择最高覆盖的 P0 hypothesis，生成 `candidate_v2_spec_freeze`；`aits reports validate-candidate-v2-spec-freeze --latest` 生成 validation artifact。Spec freeze 固定 candidate id、signal inputs、feature inputs、regime assumptions、drawdown handling、rotation handling、turnover constraints、cost expectations、benchmark expectations、validation windows、stop conditions 和与 TRADING-470 candidate 的差异；该 artifact 不实现 binding、不运行 backfill、不生成 paper-shadow eligibility、不 append owner decision、不创建 paper-shadow、不批准 extended/live、不写 official target weights、不触发 broker/order、不修改 production。

TRADING-479 candidate v2 executable binding update 是 TRADING-478 后的 research-only binding artifact。`aits reports candidate-v2-executable-binding-update --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` 先运行同一 cached-data quality gate，再读取 frozen v2 spec、TRADING-464 backfill windows、ETF feature cache 和 research weight binding policy，生成 `candidate_v2_executable_binding_update`；`aits reports validate-candidate-v2-executable-binding-update --latest` 生成 validation artifact。Binding update 输出 v2 signal rows、hypothetical research weight rows、turnover-aware guard disclosure 和 executable binding safety audit summary；缺失、stale 或 invalid input fail closed，safety audit failed 时不得进入 mini backfill。该 artifact 不运行 backfill、不生成 return/drawdown/cost/benchmark metrics、不 append owner decision、不创建 paper-shadow、不批准 extended/live、不写 official target weights、不触发 broker/order、不修改 production。

TRADING-480 candidate v2 mini backfill 是 TRADING-479 后的 compact research-only mini-backfill artifact。`aits reports candidate-v2-mini-backfill --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` 先运行同一 cached-data quality gate，再读取 `candidate_v2_executable_binding_update` 和标准化日线价格 cache，生成 `candidate_v2_mini_backfill`；`aits reports validate-candidate-v2-mini-backfill --latest` 生成 validation artifact。Mini backfill 只覆盖 normal market regime、slow drawdown、high-volatility sideways market 和 false risk-off cluster 四个代表窗口，输出 return proxy、drawdown proxy、turnover、rotation count、false risk-off count、constraint hits、signal completeness 和 cost proxy inputs；source safety audit blocked 或 data-quality gate failed 时 fail closed。该 artifact 不是 full backfill，不生成 benchmark conclusion、不 append owner decision、不创建 paper-shadow、不批准 extended/live、不写 official target weights、不触发 broker/order、不修改 production。

TRADING-481 candidate v2 mini gate 是 TRADING-480 后的 full-backfill gate artifact。`aits reports candidate-v2-mini-gate --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` 先运行同一 cached-data quality gate，再读取 v2 spec、binding safety audit、mini backfill 与 validation、signal robustness quick check 和 turnover/cost quick check，生成 `candidate_v2_mini_gate`；`aits reports validate-candidate-v2-mini-gate --latest` 生成 validation artifact。Gate 只允许 `V2_PROCEED_TO_FULL_BACKFILL`、`V2_NEEDS_REDESIGN`、`V2_REJECT_RESEARCH_CANDIDATE` 或 `V2_BLOCKED`，必须输出 strongest positive / negative evidence；mini backfill weak 时必须阻止 full backfill。该 artifact 不运行 full backfill、不 append owner decision、不创建 paper-shadow、不批准 extended/live、不写 official target weights、不触发 broker/order、不修改 production。

TRADING-482 candidate v2 full backfill if approved 是 TRADING-481 后的 hard-stop artifact。`aits reports candidate-v2-full-backfill-if-approved --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` 读取 mini gate 与 validation；当 gate 不是 `V2_PROCEED_TO_FULL_BACKFILL` 时生成 blocked artifact，逐项披露 return proxy、drawdown proxy、turnover、rotation count、false risk-off count、cost inputs、benchmark inputs 和 signal completeness 未生成原因；`aits reports validate-candidate-v2-full-backfill-if-approved --latest` 生成 validation artifact。Blocked path 不运行 full backfill、不补造 metrics、不 append owner decision、不创建 paper-shadow、不批准 extended/live、不写 official target weights、不触发 broker/order、不修改 production。

TRADING-483 candidate v2 research gate 是 TRADING-482 后的 research decision gate artifact。`aits reports candidate-v2-research-gate --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` 读取 v2 full-backfill artifact、stress review、cost/benchmark review、signal robustness、window sensitivity 和 returned-candidate comparison，生成 `candidate_v2_research_gate`；`aits reports validate-candidate-v2-research-gate --latest` 生成 validation artifact。Gate 只允许 `V2_RESEARCH_PROMISING`、`V2_NEEDS_MORE_EVIDENCE`、`V2_RETURN_TO_HYPOTHESIS_BACKLOG` 或 `V2_REJECT_RESEARCH_CANDIDATE`；full backfill 未执行时不得输出 promising，即使 promising 也不激活 paper-shadow。该 artifact 不 append owner decision、不创建 paper-shadow、不批准 extended/live、不写 official target weights、不触发 broker/order、不修改 production。

TRADING-484 candidate v2 owner research review packet 是 TRADING-483 后的 owner 手工复核 packet artifact。`aits reports candidate-v2-owner-research-review-packet --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` 读取 v2 research gate 与 validation，生成 `candidate_v2_owner_research_review_packet`；`aits reports validate-candidate-v2-owner-research-review-packet --latest` 生成 validation artifact。Packet 只准备 continue research validation、revise hypothesis、hold for more data 和 reject v2 research candidate 四个 options，并披露 recommended option、source gate evidence 和 explicit safety statements。该 artifact 不 append owner decision、不修改 owner decision audit log、不创建 paper-shadow、不批准 extended/live、不写 official target weights、不触发 broker/order、不修改 production。

TRADING-485 candidate v2 research-cycle snapshot 是 TRADING-471～484 evidence repair and candidate revision batch 的最终只读 snapshot artifact。`aits reports candidate-v2-research-cycle-snapshot --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` 收集 v2 hypotheses、spec、executable binding、mini/full backfill、stress/cost/benchmark attribution、research gate 和 owner packet，生成 `candidate_v2_research_cycle_snapshot`；`aits reports validate-candidate-v2-research-cycle-snapshot --latest` 生成 validation artifact。Snapshot 只允许 `V2_RESEARCH_CYCLE_PROMISING`、`V2_RESEARCH_CYCLE_NEEDS_MORE_EVIDENCE` 或 `V2_RESEARCH_CYCLE_RETURN_TO_BACKLOG`，并保留 source artifact summary、blocking/positive evidence 和 final interpretation。该 artifact 不 append owner decision、不创建 paper-shadow、不批准 extended/live、不写 official target weights、不触发 broker/order、不修改 production。

TRADING-075 data quality governance policy 是 source configuration，位于 `config/etf_portfolio/data_quality.yaml`。该文件定义 required / optional assets、price freshness lag、explicit market holiday baseline、calendar coverage lookback、missing bar limits、return outlier thresholds、corporate-action sanity、config/model drift report set、evidence completeness rules、validation gate freshness、report staleness、Reader Brief link checks 和固定 `observe_only=true`、`candidate_only=true`、`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`、`manual_review_required=true`。`aits etf data-quality report --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` 只读读取 price cache、当前 ETF config hash/model version、report registry 和既有 artifacts，生成 `reports/etf_portfolio/data_quality/governance/data_quality_report_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md`；report 暴露 `etf_data_quality_report_v1` schema、safety banner、run metadata、price freshness、calendar coverage/missing bars、return outliers/corporate-action sanity、config/model drift、evidence completeness、validation gate freshness、report staleness、Reader Brief links、blocking failures、warnings、manual review items 和 source links。Critical required data/artifact/gate/link failures 用于阻断 dependent research interpretation；optional missing artifacts 只 warning；report 不运行上游命令、不写 production weights、不触发 broker。`aits etf data-quality validate` 生成 `reports/etf_portfolio/data_quality/validation/data_quality_validation_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md`，使用 deterministic probes 校验 policy、checker availability、report generator、Reader Brief/report registry integration 和 safety boundary，固定 `commands_executed=false`、`production_state_mutated=false`。Reader Brief 的 `ETF Data Quality` 区块只读 latest governance report，展示 overall status、blockers、warnings、section status、detail link 和 safety posture；缺失时只显示 `MISSING`，不得补跑 data-quality CLI 或补造质量结论。

TRADING-076 strategy evidence dashboard registry 是 source configuration，位于 `config/etf_portfolio/evidence_dashboard.yaml`。该文件把 ETF baseline、weight calibration、forward simulation、AI confirmation / attribution、satellite replacement / attribution、parameter review、weekly review、decision journal、data quality、operations health 和 validation gates 映射到 evidence categories、freshness requirements、quality requirements、manual-review priority rules 和固定安全边界。`aits etf evidence-dashboard aggregate --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` 只读 report index 和 registry，生成 aggregation JSON；当 latest artifact 是 Markdown / HTML 且同名 JSON sidecar 存在时，aggregation 会读取 sidecar payload 的内部 `status` / `overall_status` 等状态，防止 blocked report 被误读为 artifact available。`aits etf evidence-dashboard report --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` 生成统一 strategy evidence dashboard JSON / Markdown；`aits etf evidence-dashboard validate --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` 生成 final validation gate。每个 evidence card 必须保留 source module、source report path、source metric、as-of date、freshness、data quality、validation status 和 sample count；缺失、stale、blocked 和 optional missing evidence 不得被隐藏或补造。所有输出固定 `observe_only=true`、`candidate_only=true`、`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`、`manual_review_required=true`、`commands_executed=false`、`production_state_mutated=false`。

TRADING-077 baseline review policy 是 source configuration，位于 `config/etf_portfolio/baseline_review.yaml`。该文件定义 ETF allocation candidate 进入 owner baseline review 前的 eligibility thresholds、required evidence matrix、blocking conditions、review checklist、decision capture policy、proposal draft policy、outcome tracking policy 和固定安全边界。`aits etf baseline-review eligibility/matrix/package --candidate <id>` 只读 report index、strategy evidence dashboard 和既有 ETF artifacts，生成 candidate review readiness、evidence matrix 和 manual review package；当 latest artifact path 指向 Markdown / HTML wrapper 时读取同名 JSON sidecar，weight calibration proposal action type 只作为证据状态归一，不作为 unsupported candidate type；`capture-decision` 只捕获人工决定并可链接 decision journal；`proposal-draft` 仅在 explicit owner approval 和 journal link 后生成 proposal-only draft；`outcome` 追踪 review cycle 状态；`validate` 是 TRADING-077 final safety gate。所有 baseline review artifacts 都固定 `observe_only=true`、`candidate_only=true`、`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`、`manual_review_required=true`，且 `production_state_mutated=false` / `baseline_config_mutated=false`；这些 artifacts 不能被解读为 baseline change、production promotion 或 broker action。

TRADING-080 weight calibration cache policy 是 source configuration，位于 `config/etf_portfolio/cache_policy.yaml`。该文件定义 diagnostics cache root、enabled layers、allowed cache modes、TTL、schema versions、parallel worker bounds、locking/pruning policy 和固定 safety boundary。`aits etf weight-calibration diagnostics --cache read-write/read-only --no-cache --force-refresh --workers auto --resume --run-id <run_id> --include-performance-report` 先通过 ETF price quality gate，再按 deterministic cache key 读取或写入 price/returns matrix、candidate backtest、regime robustness 和 diagnostics aggregation cache；cache entry manifest 校验 schema、safety、source config hash、data hash 和 engine version。Cache miss 的 per-candidate backtest / robustness 计算可通过 worker pool 并行执行，worker 只返回 validated payload，由 coordinator 写入 cache；cache-hit resume 会用指定 run id 写入新的 run manifest。Runtime cache 位于 ignored `data/cache/weight_calibration/`；run manifest 位于同一 cache root 的 `runs/<run_id>/run_manifest.json`；performance report 输出到 `reports/etf_portfolio/weight_calibration/performance/`。`aits etf weight-calibration performance-validate` 生成 cache / parallel validation gate，fail closed 校验 cache policy、key/manifest、price/returns payload、candidate/regime/aggregation cache behavior、parallel runner、resume manifest、performance report 和 safety boundary。TRADING-080 artifacts 只提高 repeatability 和 diagnostics runtime visibility，不注册 candidate、不 enroll shadow、不修改 production weights、不触发 broker。
