dashboard、trace、calculation、score change、research governance、report index、artifact lineage、report quality gate 或 documentation contract artifact 只能显示 `LIMITED_READER_CONTEXT` / `PASS_WITH_WARNINGS` / `MISSING` / `LIMITED` 和 impact level，不能补造投资结论；Artifact Lineage Graph 和 Report Quality Gate 区块只读 report index latest pointer，不运行 `aits reports artifact-lineage` 或 `aits reports quality-gate`；HTML visual styling 只改变阅读优先级，不改变 JSON 决策语义；Report Navigation 同一 group 内同一 `artifact_id` 只显示一次，runtime report index 与 direct input 合并审计来源；`--latest` 只选择最新 decision snapshot，不运行上游任务；HTML 不是实盘交易指令 |
| `reports/etf_portfolio/*_portfolio_brief.md` | `aits etf report daily --date YYYY-MM-DD` / `aits etf run daily --date latest` | ETF price cache、ETF data quality gate、features、signals、regime、target weights、previous target weights、constraint diagnostics、simulation ledger summary | Safety Banner（`observe_only=true`、`production_effect=none`、manual-review-only、no broker action）、Market Regime Window、Requested Date、Data Quality status、Model Version、Config Hash、ETF Signal Dashboard、Target Weights、Previous Target、Weight Delta、Weight Change Explanation、Top Positive/Negative Drivers、Risk Constraints、Constraint Diagnostics、Benchmark Context、Simulation Performance、P2/live candidate-only note、Actionability Note、Action Checklist | `config/report_registry.yaml` 的 `etf_portfolio_brief` 条目、`aits reports index` freshness、Reader Brief report navigation、人工 ETF allocation 复核 | 否，decision-support only | ETF brief 不是主 daily score 的替代品，也不是自动下单指令；它只解释 ETF 主仓目标权重及变动原因，必须和 ETF data quality status、config hash、regime date range、constraint diagnostics 和 benchmark context 一起阅读；decision sections 不得引用 delayed evaluation-only 字段，Simulation Performance 只用于人工复核模拟舱状态 |
| `data/etf_portfolio/target_weights.csv` | `aits etf portfolio allocate --date YYYY-MM-DD` / `aits etf run daily --date latest` / ETF backtest 内部同源 allocation logic | ETF data quality gate、features、signals、regime、`config/etf_portfolio/assets.yaml`、`strategy.yaml`、`risk.yaml`、可选 previous weights | date、symbol、target_weight、previous_weight、trade_delta、composite_score、regime、reason_codes、`constraints_applied`、`constraint_diagnostics`、model_version、config_hash、data_quality_status | ETF daily brief、simulation ledger record、P1 attribution、P2 observe-only risk reports、人工 ETF allocation 复核 | 否，decision-support target only | `constraint_diagnostics` 是 JSON list，记录 asset/sleeve/equity/cash/rebalance/turnover 约束的 before/after、reason 和 severity；drawdown/volatility penalty 已在 signal score 层体现，不是 allocation 输出里的后验收益解释；target weights 不是实盘订单，也不触发 broker |
| `data/simulation/etf_ledger.csv` | `aits etf simulation record --date YYYY-MM-DD` / `aits etf simulation evaluate --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` | ETF target weights、ETF price cache、ETF data quality gate、model version/config hash | `record_type=decision/evaluation`、decision_date、model_version、config_hash、feature_snapshot_hash、signal_snapshot_hash、asset_scores、target_weights、previous_target_weights、weight_deltas、observe_only、production_effect、evaluation_as_of_date、future/forward_return_1d/5d/20d/60d、max_drawdown_next_20d/60d、relative_return_vs_spy_20d、relative_return_vs_qqq_20d、weight_contribution_20d、portfolio_return_20d、portfolio_relative_return_vs_spy_20d、portfolio_relative_return_vs_qqq_20d | `aits etf simulation report`、ETF daily brief Simulation Performance、manual model-version review | 否，simulation evidence only | decision rows 固定 `evaluation_only=false` 且不承载 future outcome；evaluation rows 固定 `evaluation_only=true` 并按 `evaluation_as_of_date` deterministic upsert；forward window 不足或 benchmark 缺失时相关 outcome 字段必须保持 null，不得填 0；ledger 是后验观察记录，不是自动调仓、promotion 或实盘交易授权 |
| `reports/etf_portfolio/data_quality_*.md` | `aits etf data validate` / ETF data-dependent commands | `data/raw/prices_daily.csv` 或显式 ETF price path、ETF asset/strategy config、CASH synthetic series | data quality status、schema/duplicate/price/volume/freshness issues、covered symbols、quality report date、ETF-specific validation scope | ETF features、signals、allocation、backtest、daily brief 的前置质量证据；`config/report_registry.yaml` 的 `etf_data_quality` 条目 | 否，质量报告本身不生成交易动作 | PASS 只表示 ETF 缓存数据可用于后续 ETF pipeline，不等于投资结论可靠；FAIL 时 ETF data-dependent workflow 必须停止 |
| `reports/etf_portfolio/backtests/*/daily.csv/weights.csv/trades.csv/summary.md/summary.json/metrics.json/stability_diagnostics.json/stability_diagnostics.md` | `aits etf backtest run`；stability artifacts 也可由 `aits etf backtest diagnostics --latest` / `--run-id ...` 从既有 run 重新生成 | ETF signals、regimes、target weight rules、ETF price cache、backtest config、transaction cost policy、`primary_benchmark_id`、B000-B008 benchmark registry、daily/weights history | Market Regime、Requested Date Range、Effective Signal Range、Data Quality status、Model Version、Config Hash、daily strategy return、asset_returns_json、asset_contributions_json、weight history、trade delta/turnover/cost、Total Return、CAGR、Max Drawdown、Sharpe、Sortino、Calmar、Turnover、`standardized_metrics`、`monthly_returns`、`metric_null_reasons`、extended metrics、`allocation_stability_diagnostics`、`benchmark_metrics`、`benchmark_comparisons` common schema、correctness notes | `config/report_registry.yaml` 的 `etf_backtest_summary` 条目、Reader Brief report navigation 和 ETF Backtest Summary 摘要、P2 walk-forward readiness、experiment registry metrics lookup、未来 weight governance、人工 strategy/config/stability 复核、Weight Research Program v1 B0 control result | 否，backtest evidence only | 历史回测不是未来收益承诺；`standardized_metrics` 是跨策略/参数比较 schema，`monthly_returns` 用 primary benchmark 口径输出 strategy / benchmark / excess return 和月内回撤；无法计算的 Sharpe、Sortino、Calmar、monthly 或 benchmark 字段必须为 null 并在 `metric_null_reasons` 说明，不能补 0；stability diagnostics 用配置化 `max_daily_turnover` / `max_rebalance_trade_weight` 作为 policy reference，首日全现金建仓与后续 rebalance policy check 分开披露；B000 是 research-only `static_default_portfolio` 控制组，权重来自 `assets.yaml` 的 `default_weight`，不改变 `primary_benchmark_id`；B001-B008 包括 buy-and-hold SPY/QQQ/SMH/SOXX、static_growth_balanced、static_ai_growth、ma_50_200_qqq 和 risk_off_cash_switch；2022-12-01 前数据只作为 warm-up 或对照，不能替代 `ai_after_chatgpt` 结论窗口；`weights.csv` 和 `trades.csv` 是审计历史，不是实盘订单 |
| `reports/etf_portfolio/experiments/<run_id>/run_manifest.json/experiment_results.json/benchmark_results.json/metrics_summary.json/diagnostics_summary.json/comparison_report.json/comparison_report.md/candidate_selection_report.json/candidate_selection_report.md` | `aits etf experiments run --pack etf_calibration_v1 --start YYYY-MM-DD --end YYYY-MM-DD` 或 `--experiment <experiment_id>`；comparison 由 `aits etf experiments compare --run-id <run_id>` / `--latest` 生成；candidate selection 由 `aits etf experiments select-candidates --run-id <run_id>` / `--latest` 生成 | `config/etf_portfolio/experiments.yaml`、`config/etf_portfolio/experiment_packs.yaml`、ETF baseline config、ETF price cache、ETF data quality gate、ETF backtest engine、`risk_adjusted_v1` ranking policy、`shadow_only_manual_review` promotion policy | run manifest、experiment ids、requested date range、git commit、config/data hash、metric schema version、per-experiment PASS/FAILED、benchmark metrics、strategy/standardized metrics、allocation stability diagnostics、failed experiment ids、安全字段、comparison metrics table、risk/turnover/stability table、candidate score、component scores、hard rejection flags、ranking reasons、candidate selection status、rejected/blocked counts、manual review requirement、`production_promotion_allowed=false` | 后续 TRADING-064 shadow enrollment、weekly review、report index / Reader Brief 和人工校准复核 | 否，`observe_only=true`、`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none` | Batch experiment result 是受控校准证据，不是 production recommendation；ranking policy 不按 total return 单一排序，high-return candidate 仍可能因 turnover、drawdown、missing benchmark 或 unsafe safety flags 被 hard reject；candidate selection 只允许 shadow/manual-review 状态，不能输出 production approval；单个 experiment failure 必须在 diagnostics 中可见，unsafe experiment/pack 应在运行前 fail closed；runtime 输出在 `reports/` 下，不提交源码 |
| `data/simulation/etf_shadow_candidates.json` 和 `reports/etf_portfolio/experiments/weekly_reviews/weekly_review_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md` | `aits etf experiments enroll-shadow --run-id <run_id> --candidate <candidate_id>` / `--latest --top N`；weekly review 由 `aits etf experiments weekly-review --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` / `--latest` 生成 | `candidate_selection_report.json`、source experiment run metrics、`weekly_shadow_review_v1` review policy、ETF price cache 和 source comparison metrics | shadow candidate count、candidate/source run/model/config hash、start date、status、daily/weekly evaluation schedule、weekly candidate/baseline/QQQ forward return、drawdown、turnover、weight stability、constraint hits、recommended action、manual review notes、安全字段 | `config/report_registry.yaml` 的 `etf_shadow_candidates` / `etf_experiment_weekly_review` 条目、Reader Brief `ETF Calibration Experiments` 摘要、人工 shadow observation review | 否，`observe_only=true`、`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none` | Shadow registry 是 ignored runtime state，不是正式组合权重；weekly review 只建议 `continue_shadow`、`needs_more_data`、`reject_candidate` 或 `promote_to_longer_observation`，且 `production_promotion_allowed=false`；active shadow candidate 不等于 production candidate |
| `reports/etf_portfolio/experiments/validation/*_experiment_validation.json/md` | `aits etf experiments validate --pack etf_calibration_v1` | `config/etf_portfolio/experiments.yaml`、`config/etf_portfolio/experiment_packs.yaml`、`config/report_registry.yaml`、ETF P2/live safety config 和 TRADING-064 command/report functions | `schema_version=etf_experiment_validation_v1`、`task=TRADING-064J`、`status=PASS/FAIL`、per-check registry/pack/runner/comparison/ranking/candidate gate/shadow/weekly/report integration/safety/P2-live status、blockers、`safe_for_shadow_observation`、`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`、`manual_review_required=true` | `config/report_registry.yaml` 的 `etf_experiment_validation` 条目、`aits reports index` freshness、Reader Brief navigation、TRADING-064 baseline completion evidence | 否，final validation evidence only | PASS 只说明 TRADING-064 experiment infrastructure 安全完整，可进入后续 shadow observation/owner review；不是 production approval，不写 target weights、不登记 candidate、不运行 broker；FAIL 必须阻断 TRADING-064 完成声明 |

| `aits etf dynamic-v3-rescue sweep-config validate/preview`、`sweep run/status/validate/leaderboard/report`、`candidate report`、`walk-forward run/report`、`validate-walk-forward`、`robustness run/report`、`validate-robustness`、`shadow register/list/report`、`validate-shadow-registry`、`artifacts latest/validate/repair-latest/stale`、`schedule observe --as-of YYYY-MM-DD`、`promotion review/pack`、`validate-promotion-pack` | `config/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/parameter_sweep_v1.yaml`、`config/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/parameter_sweep_real_smoke.yaml`、TRADING-091 real evaluation policy、TRADING-092 review context、cached data quality gate、configured data manifest hash、tiny fixture proxy outputs or per-candidate real evaluation artifacts、latest pointer files | sweep manifest、normalized config、data manifest、candidate/result/error JSONL、checkpoint、gate summary、leaderboard JSON/Markdown、candidate report、walk-forward windows/results/leaderboard/report、sensitivity matrix、stress/regime bucket results、overfit diagnostics、shadow registry/report、scheduled observe due/skip/block audit、promotion manifest/decision/metric deltas/risk summary/linked artifacts/Reader Brief section、latest pointers、安全字段、`evaluator_mode`、`evaluator_version`、`real_evaluation_artifact_path`、`data_quality`、`metrics_source`、`not_for_investment_decision`、`production_candidate_generated=false` | `config/report_registry.yaml` 的 `etf_dynamic_v3_parameter_sweep_leaderboard`、`etf_dynamic_v3_walk_forward_report`、`etf_dynamic_v3_robustness_report`、`etf_dynamic_v3_shadow_report`、`etf_dynamic_v3_promotion_pack`、Reader Brief Dynamic Rescue Parameter Sweep 摘要、daily-run scheduler observe artifact、owner manual promotion review | 否，research / observe-only / manual review evidence | Parameter sweep 先 hard gate 再 soft ranking，score 不能覆盖 hard gate；`shadow register` 只消费已存在的 candidate report，不自动生成 source artifact；rejected candidate fail closed，walk-forward / robustness observation basis 按 candidate 匹配，缺失时记录 `incomplete_observation_basis`；`artifacts repair-latest` 只从 canonical dynamic-v3 report root 重建 latest pointers，不运行 research 或 promotion，`artifacts validate` 会拒绝测试临时目录或 canonical 根外 pointer；`schedule observe` 只做 due/skip/block、latest pointer validation、stale 检查和可选 observe-only shadow monitor，不自动运行 `run-profile`、real sweep 或 promotion pack；tiny fixture mode 只验证 artifact contract，必须标记 `not_for_investment_decision=true` 且 promotion pack 不得 `promote_candidate`；real mode metrics 必须来自 linked real evaluation artifact，`validate-sweep` 会检查 artifact path 存在，但 real leaderboard 仍最多进入 `promote_candidate + manual_review_required`，不得自动生成 `production_candidate`、owner approval、shadow enrollment、baseline mutation、official target weights 或 broker action |
| `reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/promotion/<candidate_id>/<promotion_id>/evidence_summary.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/promotion/<candidate_id>/<promotion_id>/promotion_manifest.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/promotion/<candidate_id>/<promotion_id>/promotion_decision.md` | `aits etf dynamic-v3-rescue promotion pack --candidate-id <candidate_id>`、`aits etf dynamic-v3-rescue validate-promotion-pack --candidate-id <candidate_id>` | candidate report、walk-forward、robustness、overfit、shadow monitor、latest window audit、candidate attribution、weight path metadata、data provenance report | `evidence_summary.json`、`promotion_blocking_flags`、`backtest_window_status`、`window_audit_id`、`weight_path_status`、`candidate_attribution_status`、`provenance_status`、`download_manifest_status`、linked artifacts、安全字段 | `config/report_registry.yaml` 的 `etf_dynamic_v3_promotion_pack`、Reader Brief Dynamic Rescue Parameter Sweep 证据状态、TRADING-111 到 TRADING-113 promotion evidence gate | 否，manual promotion review evidence only | 任一 window / weight path / attribution / data provenance 证据不完整，或 latest window audit 为 `FAIL` / `INCOMPLETE` 时，promotion pack 必须阻断 `promote_candidate`；Reader Brief 只读该 summary，不补跑审计 |
| `reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/evidence_summary/<summary_id>/evidence_summary_manifest.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/evidence_summary/<summary_id>/candidate_evidence_matrix.jsonl`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/evidence_summary/<summary_id>/evidence_summary_report.md` | `aits etf dynamic-v3-rescue evidence-summary run --sweep-id <sweep_id>`、`report --latest`、`validate-evidence-summary --summary-id <summary_id>` | medium_real / real sweep manifest、candidate results、data provenance、window audit、weight path metadata、candidate attribution、overfit and promotion evidence | `report_type=etf_dynamic_v3_evidence_summary_manifest`、summary_id、source_sweep_id、candidate_count、usable_for_research_count、complete/partial evidence counts、data/window/weight/attribution/overfit distributions、top_blocking_reasons、reader_brief_section、安全字段 | `config/report_registry.yaml` 的 `etf_dynamic_v3_evidence_summary`、Reader Brief Dynamic Rescue Parameter Sweep candidate evidence fields、observe-pool filter、research decision | 否，candidate evidence summary only | Evidence summary 不解除 promotion blockers；缺 data/window/weight/attribution/provenance/overfit evidence 的候选只能 `needs_review`、`not_usable` 或 blocked，不能被 observe pool 或 research decision 静默提升 |
| `reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/medium_real/<report_id>/medium_real_report.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/medium_real/<report_id>/medium_real_report.md` | `aits etf dynamic-v3-rescue medium-real report --sweep-id <sweep_id>`、`validate-medium-real --sweep-id <sweep_id>` | `medium_real` sweep manifest、leaderboard、candidate results/errors、real evaluation artifacts and artifact size inventory | `report_type=etf_dynamic_v3_medium_real_report`、medium_real_report_id、source_sweep_id、profile/evaluator_mode、completed/failed/rejected/observe/promote counts、average runtime、artifact size summary、reject distribution、recommended_next_action、安全字段 | `config/report_registry.yaml` 的 `etf_dynamic_v3_medium_real_report`、overnight readiness、research decision、manual search-space review | 否，medium_real run summary only | 300 candidate floor 未满足时必须有可审计 shortfall reason；medium_real report 不是 promotion decision，不能把 top score 直接解释为 production candidate |
| `reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/regime_coverage/<coverage_id>/regime_coverage_manifest.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/regime_coverage/<coverage_id>/regime_gap_report.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/regime_coverage/<coverage_id>/regime_coverage_report.md` | `aits etf dynamic-v3-rescue regime-coverage run --sweep-id <sweep_id>`、`report --latest`、`validate-regime-coverage --coverage-id <coverage_id>` | cached ETF prices, source sweep requested range, candidate results and linked real evaluation artifacts | `report_type=etf_dynamic_v3_regime_coverage_manifest`、coverage_id、market_regime、requested_range、coverage_status、tech_semiconductor_relevance、ai_bull_market_overfit_risk、regime_gap_report、candidate_regime_matrix、安全字段 | `config/report_registry.yaml` 的 `etf_dynamic_v3_regime_coverage`、candidate interpretation pack、research decision | 否，regime coverage audit only | 缺 drawdown、semiconductor stress、sideways/high-vol/recovery 覆盖时必须降低或阻断研究结论；单一 AI bull window 的高分不能被解释为跨 regime robustness |
| `reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/interpretation/<candidate_id>/<interpretation_id>/interpretation_manifest.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/interpretation/<candidate_id>/<interpretation_id>/candidate_interpretation_report.md` | `aits etf dynamic-v3-rescue candidate interpretation-pack --sweep-id <sweep_id> --candidate-id <candidate_id>`、`candidate interpretation-report --candidate-id <candidate_id>`、`validate-interpretation-pack --candidate-id <candidate_id>` | candidate result/report, evidence summary, regime coverage, weight path metadata, candidate attribution, overfit diagnostics | `report_type=etf_dynamic_v3_interpretation_pack_manifest`、candidate_id、rank、gate_status、parameters、evidence_status、turnover_source、drawdown_protection_behavior、tech_semiconductor_regime_behavior、major_weight_changes、recommendation、安全字段 | `config/report_registry.yaml` 的 `etf_dynamic_v3_interpretation_pack`、manual owner review、research decision source links | 否，human interpretation pack only | Interpretation pack 是人工阅读包，不是 candidate approval；weight path 缺失必须显示 incomplete，manual_review_required 不得被报告文案淡化 |
| `reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/observe_pool/<pool_id>/observe_pool_manifest.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/observe_pool/<pool_id>/observe_candidates.jsonl`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/observe_pool/<pool_id>/observe_pool_report.md` | `aits etf dynamic-v3-rescue observe-pool build --sweep-id <sweep_id>`、`report --latest`、`validate-observe-pool --pool-id <pool_id>` | medium_real sweep, evidence summary, regime coverage, parameter governance shadow policy | `report_type=etf_dynamic_v3_observe_pool_manifest`、pool_id、source_sweep_id、observe_candidate_count、manual_review_required_count、rejected_candidates、shadow_registry_sync_status、observe_candidates path、安全字段 | `config/report_registry.yaml` 的 `etf_dynamic_v3_observe_pool`、Reader Brief observe pool fields、research decision、manual shadow register workflow | 否，observe-only candidate pool only | Build 默认 `shadow_registry_sync_status=NOT_SYNCED_BY_DEFAULT`；observe pool 不写 shadow registry、不 enroll candidate，后续 shadow register 必须显式 owner review/command |
| `reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/overnight_readiness/<readiness_id>/overnight_readiness_manifest.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/overnight_readiness/<readiness_id>/overnight_readiness_report.md` | `aits etf dynamic-v3-rescue overnight-readiness run --sweep-id <sweep_id>`、`report --latest`、`validate-overnight-readiness --readiness-id <readiness_id>` | medium_real sweep manifest/results/errors/checkpoint, artifact size inventory, evidence completeness and overfit summary | `report_type=etf_dynamic_v3_overnight_readiness_manifest`、readiness_id、overnight_readiness、blocking_reasons、warnings、projected_overnight_runtime_hours、projected_artifact_size_gb、failure_rate、evidence_completeness_rate、top_candidate_stability、安全字段 | `config/report_registry.yaml` 的 `etf_dynamic_v3_overnight_readiness`、Reader Brief overnight readiness fields、research decision | 否，readiness gate only | Readiness report 不启动 `overnight_real`；READY/READY_WITH_WARNINGS 仍需要 owner 确认 runtime、disk budget 和 review need，不代表自动运行许可 |
| `reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/research_decision/<decision_id>/research_decision_manifest.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/research_decision/<decision_id>/next_action_recommendations.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/research_decision/<decision_id>/research_decision_report.md`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/research_decision/<decision_id>/reader_brief_section.md` | `aits etf dynamic-v3-rescue research-decision run --sweep-id <sweep_id>`、`report --latest`、`validate-research-decision --decision-id <decision_id>` | evidence summary, regime coverage, interpretation pack, observe pool and overnight readiness latest artifacts for the same sweep | `report_type=etf_dynamic_v3_research_decision_manifest`、decision_id、source_sweep_id、medium_real_success、research_value_candidate_found、evidence_quality_status、regime_coverage_status、observe_candidate_count、overnight_readiness、recommendation、priority、source_artifacts、安全字段 | `config/report_registry.yaml` 的 `etf_dynamic_v3_research_decision`、Reader Brief research decision fields、owner next Codex task selection | 否，research decision summary only | Research decision 给出下一步工程/研究建议，不是 investment action；推荐 `run_overnight_real` 也必须经 owner 显式确认，不得自动触发更大 sweep |
| `reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/evidence_diagnosis/<diagnosis_id>/diagnosis_manifest.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/evidence_diagnosis/<diagnosis_id>/candidate_blocking_matrix.jsonl`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/evidence_diagnosis/<diagnosis_id>/blocking_reason_summary.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/evidence_diagnosis/<diagnosis_id>/gate_category_summary.json` | `aits etf dynamic-v3-rescue evidence-diagnosis run --sweep-id <sweep_id>`、`report --latest`、`validate-evidence-diagnosis --diagnosis-id <diagnosis_id>` | medium_real source sweep, evidence summary, candidate evidence matrix, linked data/window/weight/attribution/provenance/overfit evidence | `report_type=etf_dynamic_v3_evidence_diagnosis_manifest`、diagnosis_id、source_sweep_id、candidate_count、usable_candidates、hard_blocked_candidates、soft_blocked_candidates、warning_candidates、blocking reason/category distributions、安全字段 | `config/report_registry.yaml` 的 `etf_dynamic_v3_evidence_diagnosis`、gate impact matrix、gate policy review、Reader Brief Dynamic Rescue Parameter Sweep fields | 否，evidence blocker diagnosis only | Diagnosis 只解释为什么 candidates 被 gate 阻断；hard/soft 分类不解除 promotion blocker，不修改 source sweep，不生成 observe pool、shadow registry、production candidate 或 broker action |
| `reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/gate_impact/<impact_id>/gate_impact_manifest.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/gate_impact/<impact_id>/gate_impact_matrix.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/gate_impact/<impact_id>/candidate_recovery_simulation.json` | `aits etf dynamic-v3-rescue gate-impact run --diagnosis-id <diagnosis_id>`、`report --latest`、`validate-gate-impact --impact-id <impact_id>` | evidence diagnosis manifest and candidate blocking matrix | `report_type=etf_dynamic_v3_gate_impact_manifest`、impact_id、source_diagnosis_id、scenario_count、baseline_usable_candidates、baseline_observe_candidates、best_scenario、best_observe_candidates、安全字段 | `config/report_registry.yaml` 的 `etf_dynamic_v3_gate_impact`、evidence gate policy selection、Reader Brief best-scenario fields | 否，scenario simulation only | Simulation 不修复 data 或 evidence artifacts；best scenario 只说明如果 owner 接受某类 policy，可能恢复多少 observe-only candidates，不代表 promotion eligibility 或 overnight approval |
| `config/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/evidence_gate_policy_v1.yaml`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/gate_policy/<policy_run_id>/gate_policy_manifest.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/gate_policy/<policy_run_id>/policy_effect_summary.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/gate_policy/<policy_run_id>/calibrated_candidate_status.jsonl` | `aits etf dynamic-v3-rescue gate-policy validate`、`gate-policy report`、`gate-policy apply --sweep-id <sweep_id>` | reviewed evidence gate policy config, source sweep, evidence summary and candidate blocker classifications | policy owner/version/status/rationale/intended effect/review condition、`report_type=etf_dynamic_v3_gate_policy_manifest`、policy_run_id、policy_version、observe_only_candidates、manual_review_required_candidates、hard/manual-review reason distributions、安全字段 | `config/report_registry.yaml` 的 `etf_dynamic_v3_gate_policy`、candidate recovery input、Reader Brief policy version/count fields | 否，policy-calibrated observe-only gate only | Policy may downgrade documented soft blockers to observe-only/manual-review, but true hard failures still fail closed；policy apply does not rewrite source candidates, approve promotion, write shadow registry, or create production candidates |
| `reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/candidate_recovery/<recovery_id>/recovery_manifest.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/candidate_recovery/<recovery_id>/recovered_candidates.jsonl`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/candidate_recovery/<recovery_id>/recovery_leaderboard.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/candidate_recovery/<recovery_id>/rejected_after_calibration.jsonl` | `aits etf dynamic-v3-rescue candidate-recovery run --sweep-id <sweep_id> --policy-run-id <policy_run_id>`、`report --latest`、`validate-candidate-recovery --recovery-id <recovery_id>` | source sweep, calibrated candidate status from gate policy, evidence summary | `report_type=etf_dynamic_v3_candidate_recovery_manifest`、recovery_id、source_policy_run_id、candidate_count、recovered_candidate_count、observe_only_candidate_count、manual_review_required_count、rejected_after_calibration_count、安全字段 | `config/report_registry.yaml` 的 `etf_dynamic_v3_candidate_recovery`、observe-pool rebuild input、research decision update、Reader Brief recovered count fields | 否，observe-only recovery artifact only | Recovered candidates are still manual-review-only and observe-only；recovery does not register shadow candidates, approve overnight_real, mutate baseline/production, or authorize broker action |
| `reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/research_decision_update/<decision_update_id>/decision_update_manifest.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/research_decision_update/<decision_update_id>/go_no_go_matrix.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/research_decision_update/<decision_update_id>/next_action_recommendations.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/research_decision_update/<decision_update_id>/reader_brief_section.md` | `aits etf dynamic-v3-rescue research-decision update --sweep-id <sweep_id> --diagnosis-id <diagnosis_id> --impact-id <impact_id> --recovery-id <recovery_id>`、`update-report --latest`、`validate-research-decision-update --decision-update-id <decision_update_id>` | evidence diagnosis, gate impact, candidate recovery, rebuilt observe pool and overnight readiness artifacts for the same sweep | `report_type=etf_dynamic_v3_research_decision_update_manifest`、decision_update_id、go_no_go、recommended_action、recovered_candidate_count、observe_candidate_count、go_no_go_matrix、warnings、required_owner_approval、安全字段 | `config/report_registry.yaml` 的 `etf_dynamic_v3_research_decision_update`、Reader Brief final Dynamic Rescue Parameter Sweep go/no-go fields、owner next-task selection | 否，go/no-go research update only | `GO_WITH_LIMITS` means limited owner-reviewed research may continue with manual review; it is not investment guidance, production promotion, shadow enrollment, official target weight mutation, baseline mutation, broker action, or automatic `overnight_real` trigger |

run/report`、`execution-guardrails check/report` 和 `manual-execution-review pack/report` 读取，相关 validate 命令校验安全边界 | TRADING-126 到 TRADING-135 owner-reviewed position advisory policy and optional manual portfolio snapshot format；TRADING-199 到 TRADING-203 strict manual snapshot schema, exposure policy, drift thresholds, and execution guardrails；TRADING-204 到 TRADING-208 real manual snapshot dry-run and owner decision loop；TRADING-209 到 TRADING-213 research model target and paper shadow account policy；TRADING-214 到 TRADING-218 historical paper shadow backfill and target method selection policy | owner/version/status/rationale/intended effect/review condition、agreement threshold、consensus drift thresholds、position delta limits、cash handling、review rules、target method list、static baseline weights、model target constraints、paper shadow base currency/equity/tracked methods、backfill date range、rebalance frequency、rolling window minimums、regime/stability/selection policy thresholds、snapshot holdings schema、source/currency/value/weight tolerances、redaction status、sensitive-field flags、exposure limits、execution cap/block rules、安全字段 | position advisory artifact、position review pack、daily evaluation、regime review、stability diagnostics、system target selection review | 否，source policy/manual snapshot/model target/backfill config only | `current_portfolio_snapshot.example.yaml` backfill configs 只生成 research/paper evidence；backfill 明确 `BACKTEST_SIMULATION` / `not_pit_safe=true`，不得解释为 broker import、真实账户同步、official target weights、order ticket、production approval 或 production candidate |

review 状态，不改变真实持仓；paper action 只写 paper tracking，不生成订单；weekly review 只汇总 latest dry-run/decision/paper action，不触发 broker、production candidate 或真实账户 mutation |

| `reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/shortlist/<shortlist_id>/shortlist_manifest.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/shortlist/<shortlist_id>/shortlist_candidates.jsonl`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/shortlist/<shortlist_id>/shortlist_score_breakdown.json` | `aits etf dynamic-v3-rescue shortlist build --observe-pool-id <pool_id>`、`shortlist report --latest`、`validate-shortlist --shortlist-id <shortlist_id>` | rebuilt observe pool candidates, linked real evaluation metrics, evidence statuses, regime coverage and weight path metadata | `report_type=etf_dynamic_v3_shadow_shortlist_manifest`、shortlist_id、source_observe_pool_id、shortlist_count、target/min/max sizes、hard rejected count、selection reasons、score breakdown、安全字段 | `config/report_registry.yaml` 的 `etf_dynamic_v3_shortlist`、candidate clustering、Reader Brief shortlist fields、owner shortlist review | 否，manual shortlist evidence only | Shortlist score cannot override hard failures；selected candidates remain observe-only/manual-review and do not become production candidates or approved shadow enrollments |

`PIT_UNSAFE` is excluded by default and cannot be reintroduced by `--include-pit-warning`; `ADVISORY_GENERATED_AFTER_AS_OF_DATE`, `MISSING_PRICE_DATA`, and missing target weights are hard PIT limitations; future prices are not decision inputs, backfilled returns cannot approve production, and calibration recommendations do not mutate config, target weights, real portfolio, broker state, or promotion status |
| `reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/replay_diagnosis/<diagnosis_id>/...`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/backfill_repair/<repair_id>/...`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/variant_comparison/<comparison_id>/...`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/rule_calibration/<calibration_id>/...`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/replay_forward_bridge/<bridge_id>/...` | `aits etf dynamic-v3-rescue replay-diagnosis/backfill-repair/variant-comparison/rule-calibration/replay-forward-bridge report --latest`；生成入口为对应 `run` 命令和 `validate-replay-diagnosis`、`validate-backfill-repair`、`validate-variant-comparison`、`validate-rule-calibration`、`validate-replay-forward-bridge` | TRADING-141 到 TRADING-145 的 inventory/replay/backfill/sim/review artifacts、current cached price/rate data quality gate、optional repaired backfill windows | manifest `schema_version` / `status`、coverage breakdown、pending reason summary、artifact health matrix、repair actions、repaired outcome windows、availability delta、variant window metrics、pairwise comparison、rank summary、rule diagnostics、manual-only proposed policy adjustments、calibration safety checks、forward tracking focus、weekly review updates、Reader Brief section、安全字段 | `config/report_registry.yaml` 的 `etf_dynamic_v3_replay_diagnosis`、`etf_dynamic_v3_backfill_repair`、`etf_dynamic_v3_variant_comparison`、`etf_dynamic_v3_rule_calibration`、`etf_dynamic_v3_replay_forward_bridge`；Reader Brief replay-forward bridge fields | 否，diagnosis/calibration/forward tracking evidence only | Backfill repair does not rewrite the source backfill and does not use future prices as replay decision input; variant ranking is a diagnostic comparison, not a policy score; rule calibration proposals require owner approval and keep `auto_apply=false`; replay-forward bridge is a watchlist, not production approval, broker authorization, baseline mutation, official target weight mutation, or portfolio mutation |

| `outputs/runs/daily/<executed_at>/as_of_YYYY-MM-DD__<run_id>/manifest.json` | `aits ops daily-run` | 本轮 daily-run artifacts | run id、checksum、legacy mirror、visibility cutoff；artifact 记录由 `ArtifactRef` 统一生成 | 复现、归档、审计 | 是，作为运行 bundle | `data/raw` / `data/processed` 仍是状态缓存，不会每轮完整复制；manifest 只记录产物引用和 checksum，不保存 stdout/stderr 原文 |

| `outputs/replays/windows/<run_id>/replay_window.md/json` | `aits ops replay-window` | 单日 replay bundle、交易日历 | day_runs status、bundle/report paths、diff status、skipped_dates、失败日 `failure_summary.errors`、`failed_step` 和 blocker artifacts | 窗口级复现验收、归档输入缺口审计 | 否，不改 production artifacts | 窗口整体 FAIL 可能来自少数归档输入缺口；必须看 `failure_summary` 判断是数据缺档、步骤失败还是周末跳过 |
| `outputs/replays/YYYY-MM-DD/<run_id>/input/config/expected_price_tickers.csv` | `replay-day --full-universe` | `config/universe.yaml`、replay 过滤后的 `prices_daily.csv` | ticker、included/excluded status、required_scope、visible_in_replay_price_cache、reason；同一记录登记到 `input_freeze_manifest.csv/json` | replay-scoped `score-daily --expected-price-tickers-path` 数据质量门禁 | 否，不改 production artifacts | 只冻结本次 replay expected ticker 集合；baseline/core/benchmark 缺价格仍 fail closed，full-universe 扩展 ticker 缺 replay 可见价格只进入 exclusion audit；不得补造价格或放宽 production `--full-universe` 校验 |
| `outputs/replays/YYYY-MM-DD/<run_id>/diff_vs_production.md` | `replay-day --compare-to-production` | replay bundle、production artifacts | checksum、row count、status diff | PIT 复核 | 否 | diff 说明产物不同，不自动说明哪个结论正确 |

注：Daily task dashboard 还会只读读取 latest
`outputs/sec_pit_evaluation/sec_pit_evaluation_summary_YYYY-MM-DD.json`
并展示 SEC PIT Evaluation Summary 轻量卡片；dashboard 不运行 `aits sec-pit evaluate`、
不重新读取 market data、不修改 production score 权重或 shadow weight artifact。
同时会只读读取 latest
`outputs/sec_pit_baseline_comparison/sec_pit_baseline_comparison_summary_YYYY-MM-DD.json`
并展示 SEC PIT Baseline Comparison 轻量卡片；dashboard 不运行 `aits sec-pit compare-baseline`、
不重新读取 market data、不修改 production weights 或 actions。
同时会只读读取 latest
`outputs/sec_pit_diagnostics/sec_pit_real_run_diagnostics_YYYY-MM-DD.json`
并展示 SEC PIT Real Run Diagnostics 轻量卡片；dashboard 不运行
`aits sec-pit diagnose-run`、不运行 evaluation/comparison、不修改 production 或 shadow 权重。
同时会只读读取 latest
`outputs/sec_pit_candidate_review/sec_pit_candidate_review_summary_YYYY-MM-DD.json`
并展示 SEC PIT Candidate Review 轻量卡片；dashboard 不运行
`aits sec-pit review-candidates`、不运行 evaluation/comparison/diagnostics、不修改 production
或 active shadow 权重。
同时会只读读取 latest
`outputs/sec_pit_baseline_coverage/sec_pit_baseline_coverage_summary_YYYY-MM-DD.json`
并展示 SEC PIT Baseline Coverage 轻量卡片；dashboard 不运行
`aits sec-pit audit-baseline-coverage`、不运行 backfill、不修改 baseline score artifact。
同时会只读读取 latest
`outputs/sec_pit_shadow_observe/sec_pit_shadow_observe_summary_YYYY-MM-DD.json`
并展示 SEC PIT Shadow Observe 轻量卡片，包括 baseline coverage ratio/status、
monitoring status reason、factor rollback triggered 和 data limitation triggered；dashboard 不运行
`aits sec-pit shadow-observe`、不修改 production 或 active shadow 权重。
同时会只读读取 latest
`outputs/sec_pit_shadow_monitor/sec_pit_shadow_monitor_summary_YYYY-MM-DD.json`
并展示 SEC PIT Shadow Monitor 轻量卡片，包括 latest monitor date、monitor status、candidate
feature、observe weight、rolling RankIC 20D/60D、sample count、elapsed/remaining days、warning
count、rollback recommended 和 production effect；dashboard 不运行 `aits sec-pit shadow-monitor`、
不运行 shadow-observe 或 baseline coverage audit。
同时会只读读取 latest
`outputs/reports/research_governance_summary_YYYY-MM-DD.json`
并展示 Research Governance Summary 轻量卡片，包括 card count、missing / limited / warning
counts、manual review required count 和 governance group counts；dashboard 不运行
`aits reports research-governance-summary` 或任何 backtest、SEC PIT、shadow、weight
governance 上游任务。
同时会只读读取 latest
`data/derived/weight_iterations/promotion/proposals/shadow_promotion_proposal_YYYY-MM-DD.json`
并展示 Shadow Promotion Proposal 轻量卡片；dashboard 不运行 TRADING-018D proposal
script，也不重跑 018B/018C/018C2、scoring、broker、paper runner 或 replay runner。

## Trading engine / paper trading 产物

| Artifact | 由谁生成 | 上游输入 | 关键字段或内容 | 下游使用 | 是否影响 production | 常见误解 |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `data/trading_engine/audit/{order_intent_log,risk_check_log,order_log,execution_report_log,fill_log,portfolio_snapshot}/YYYY-MM-DD.jsonl` | `ExecutionService` / `JsonlAuditLogger` | paper-only `OrderIntent`、risk result、paper order、execution report、portfolio snapshot | 每行包含 timestamp、run_id、strategy_id、schema_version、source_object_id、payload、`intent_id` 或 `related_intent_ids`；`replay_intent_audit_trace` 可按 intent 回放完整轨迹 | paper trading 审计和测试复现 | 否，paper trading MVP；真实交易仍未启用 | `execution_report_log` 和 `fill_log` 不等价；rejected intent 不应有 broker order 或 fill；portfolio snapshot 可通过 `related_intent_ids` 关联到 intent |
| `reports/trading_daily/YYYY-MM-DD.md` | `scripts/run_paper_trading_demo.py` / `scripts/run_paper_trading_from_candidates.py` / trading report writer | paper trading audit state、orders、fills、portfolio snapshot、ReconciliationResult | OrderIntent 数量、风控通过/拒绝、paper order、成交/未成交/取消、portfolio、realized/unrealized PnL、reconciliation status、`production_effect=none` | paper trading 执行复盘 | 否，`production_effect=none` | 不是实盘交易日报，不代表真实账户、券商状态或真实成交；reconciliation `PASS` 只说明 paper portfolio 与本地 audit/fill 重建一致 |
| `outputs/reports/paper_trading_summary_YYYY-MM-DD.json` | `scripts/run_paper_trading_from_candidates.py` / trading report writer | `order_intent_candidates_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、paper trading report、audit log、ReconciliationResult、可选 historical OHLC | status、candidate_count、blocked_candidates、generated_intents、approved/rejected、submitted、filled/open/cancelled、realized/unrealized PnL、reconciliation_status、market_snapshot_source / counts、audit_log_path、trading daily report path、`production_effect=none` | daily task dashboard 的 Paper Trading Summary 区块和 paper replay 汇总 | 否，`production_effect=none` | 该 JSON 只把模拟执行复盘带回每日主入口；market snapshot 优先 historical OHLC，其次 candidate metadata，最后才 synthetic limit price；`LIMITED` / `ERROR` 不阻断主报告，不代表实盘订单、账户状态或 broker 回报，也不会改变 production 仓位建议 |
| `outputs/reports/paper_trading_replay_START_END.json/md` | `scripts/run_paper_trading_replay.py --start YYYY-MM-DD --end YYYY-MM-DD --mode daily-independent` 或 `--mode continuous-portfolio` | 每日 `order_intent_candidates_YYYY-MM-DD.json`；缺失时由 candidate runner 生成 limited `daily_decision_summary` 和 `order_intent_candidates`；逐日 paper summary / trading daily report / audit log；可选 historical OHLC | `replay_mode`、`portfolio_carry_forward`、`production_effect=none`、`order_expiration_policy`、`unsupported_order_policy`、`continuous_metrics_available`、quality_flags、market_snapshot_source 分布、窗口状态、paper-only execution boundary、candidate / blocked / intent / risk / order / fill / PnL totals、reconciliation_status 分布、按 symbol / strategy_id / reason_code / blocked_by 聚合、每日结果和 limited upstream 标记；continuous 额外输出 `expired_day_orders`、`rejected_gtc_orders`、`carried_positions_count`、`final_cash`、`final_equity`、`final_positions`、`max_position_concentration`、`max_drawdown_pct`、equity curve、exposure peak 和 final portfolio summary | paper trading daily flow validation、复盘、dashboard latest replay 摘要和 paper signal quality 可选输入 | 否，`production_effect=none` | `daily-independent` 每天重新初始化组合，不是连续组合收益；`continuous-portfolio` 是 paper-only 连续组合模拟，不是真实账户收益、真实 broker 成交、完整税费/滑点模拟或实盘上线依据；DAY order 当日未成交即过期；GTC / non-DAY candidate 直接 rejected；replay 不读取 broker API key、不调用真实 broker；缺候选只生成 limited artifacts，不补造投资结论 |
| `outputs/reports/paper_signal_quality_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md` | `python scripts/run_paper_signal_quality.py --date YYYY-MM-DD` | 最近 7/14/30 日 `paper_trading_summary_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、`order_intent_candidates_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、`config/paper_signal_quality_policy.yaml`、可选既有 `paper_trading_replay_START_END.json` | 顶层 `policy_id`、`policy_version`、thresholds snapshot、`evaluation_status`、`evaluation_gate` checks / `blocked_by` / human-readable explanation / reason explanations、`PAPER_ONLY_SIMULATION` warning、daily-independent / no carry-forward 时的 `DAILY_INDEPENDENT_ONLY` warning、sample_count、candidate_count、generated_intents、filled_count、synthetic_snapshot_ratio、historical_ohlc_coverage、reconciliation_pass_ratio、按 strategy_id / symbol / reason_code / blocked_by / confidence bucket / market_snapshot_source 聚合的 sample_count、candidate_count、generated_intents、filled_count、avg_paper_pnl、synthetic_snapshot_ratio、quality_status、observe-only 安全边界、`production_effect=none` | daily task dashboard 的 Paper Signal Quality 轻量卡片、paper signal 质量复核 | 否，`production_effect=none` | 使用 `continuous-portfolio` replay 时不再输出 `DAILY_INDEPENDENT_ONLY`，但仍必须输出 `PAPER_ONLY_SIMULATION`；`evaluation_status` / `quality_status` 只允许 `INSUFFICIENT_DATA`、`OBSERVE_ONLY`、`PROMISING_BUT_LIMITED`、`LOW_DATA_QUALITY`、`UNRELIABLE`，禁止 live/trade/promotion/approval 语义；evaluation gate 只解释 paper signal quality，不影响 production 仓位建议、参数晋级、真实交易或 replay；脚本不读取 broker API key、不调用真实 broker、不触发 paper runner/replay；paper PnL 只作诊断字段，不是上线依据 |
| `outputs/reports/shadow_parameter_impact_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md` | `python scripts/run_shadow_parameter_impact.py --date YYYY-MM-DD` | 最近 7/14/30 日 `order_intent_candidates_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、`paper_trading_summary_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、`paper_signal_quality_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、`config/shadow_parameter_impact_policy.yaml`、可选既有 `paper_trading_replay_START_END.json` | `impact_status`（仅 `INSUFFICIENT_DATA` / `OBSERVE_ONLY` / `SHADOW_PROMISING_BUT_LIMITED` / `NO_CLEAR_IMPROVEMENT` / `SHADOW_UNRELIABLE` / `LOW_DATA_QUALITY`）、`policy_id`、`policy_version`、`thresholds_snapshot`、`impact_gate` checks / blocked_by / warnings / explanation / reason explanations、production / shadow / unknown source_profile 分类、candidate_count、generated_intents、approved/rejected、submitted/filled/open/cancelled、realized/unrealized paper PnL、synthetic_snapshot_ratio、historical_ohlc_coverage、reconciliation_pass_ratio、blocked_by / reason_code / confidence bucket performance、continuous replay availability、source artifact path / mode / date range、profile final_equity / max_drawdown（仅 continuous portfolio 可用时）、observe-only 安全边界、`production_effect=none` | daily task dashboard 的 Shadow Impact 轻量卡片、shadow 参数 paper/replay/signal quality 复核 | 否，`production_effect=none` | `SHADOW_PROMISING_BUT_LIMITED` 仍不是上线、实盘、交易或参数批准；短期 paper PnL 为正不能单独证明 shadow 更好；缺 shadow 样本、production baseline 或 continuous replay 时输出 `continuous_replay_missing` warning；daily-independent replay 不会被当作 continuous portfolio 结果；synthetic snapshot 或 OHLC 覆盖问题会输出 `LOW_DATA_QUALITY` 或 gate blocked；脚本不读取 broker API key、不调用真实 broker、不触发 paper runner/replay、不改变 production 参数、仓位建议、参数晋级或交易执行 |
| `outputs/reports/weight_adjustment_candidates_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md` | `python scripts/run_weight_adjustment_candidates.py --date YYYY-MM-DD` | 同日 `daily_decision_summary_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、`paper_signal_quality_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、`shadow_parameter_impact_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、可选已有 `paper_trading_replay_START_END.json`、`config/weight_adjustment_candidate_policy.yaml`、`config/parameter_governance.yaml`、`config/weights/weight_profile_current.yaml`、可选 `config/weights/shadow_weight_profiles.yaml` | 顶层 `mode=observe_only`、`production_effect=none`、`policy_id`、`policy_version`、thresholds snapshot、candidate gate、source artifacts、`candidate_count`、`top_candidate_id`；每个 candidate 包含 `candidate_id`、`generated_at`、`source_profile`、`target_profile`、`parameter_changes`、`reason_codes`、`expected_effect`、`risk_notes`、`blocked_by`、`required_validations` 和 `production_effect=none` | daily task dashboard 的 Weight Adjustment Candidate 轻量卡片、人工调权候选复核 | 否，`production_effect=none` | 第一版只允许向 existing shadow profile 小步靠近，单日最大变化受 policy 限制且总权重不失衡；candidate gate 必须阻断 insufficient sample、low data quality、synthetic snapshot ratio too high、continuous replay missing、shadow impact insufficient、paper signal quality unreliable 和 manual approval required；缺关键输入时输出 `LIMITED` / blocked candidate；脚本不修改 `weight_profile_current.yaml`、不写 approved overlay、不改变 dashboard 主结论、不触发 paper runner/replay/broker/交易，也不根据单日 paper PnL 调高权重 |
| `outputs/reports/weight_candidate_evaluation_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md` | `python scripts/run_weight_candidate_evaluation.py --date YYYY-MM-DD` | 同日 `weight_adjustment_candidates_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、`paper_signal_quality_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、`shadow_parameter_impact_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、可选已有 `paper_trading_replay_START_END.json` 或 continuous replay summary、`config/weight_candidate_evaluation_policy.yaml`、`config/parameter_governance.yaml`、`config/weights/weight_profile_current.yaml`、可选 `config/weights/shadow_weight_profiles.yaml` 和可选 `daily_decision_summary_YYYY-MM-DD.json` | 顶层 `evaluation_mode=observe_only`、`production_effect=none`、`evaluation_status`、policy id/version/thresholds snapshot、安全边界、source artifact checksums、7/14/30 日窗口（candidate_count、evaluable_candidate_count、blocked_candidate_count、insufficient_data_count、low_quality_data_count、continuous replay availability、synthetic_snapshot_ratio、historical_ohlc_coverage、reconciliation_pass_ratio、paper_signal_quality_status、shadow_impact_status、replay_mode、可用的 max_drawdown_delta / final_equity_delta / exposure_delta / concentration_delta）；每个 candidate 包含 `candidate_id`、source/target profile、parameter_changes、required_validations、evaluation_status、blocked_by、warnings、scorecard、recommendation 和 `production_effect=none` | daily task dashboard 的 Weight Candidate Evaluation 轻量卡片、manual review 前的候选权重复核 | 否，`production_effect=none` | 第一版只读取已有产物，不主动重跑历史任务；candidate 级 `evaluation_status` 只允许 `INSUFFICIENT_DATA`、`OBSERVE_ONLY`、`CANDIDATE_PROMISING_BUT_LIMITED`、`NO_CLEAR_IMPROVEMENT`、`CANDIDATE_UNRELIABLE`、`LOW_DATA_QUALITY`；candidate 本身 blocked、manual approval、样本不足、低数据质量、synthetic snapshot ratio 过高、continuous replay 缺失、shadow impact insufficient、paper signal quality unreliable、reconciliation unreliable、drawdown/exposure/concentration worse 都必须 blocked；即使 candidate 看起来更好，也只能进入 manual review；脚本不修改 production profile、不触发 IBKR / PaperBroker / replay runner / 交易，不影响 dashboard 主结论 |
| `outputs/reports/weight_promotion_gate_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md` | `python scripts/run_weight_promotion_gate.py --date YYYY-MM-DD` | 同日 `weight_adjustment_candidates_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、`weight_candidate_evaluation_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、`paper_signal_quality_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、`shadow_parameter_impact_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、可选已有 `paper_trading_replay_START_END.json`、可选 `daily_decision_summary_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、可选 `config/parameter_governance.yaml` 和可选 `config/weights/weight_profile_current.yaml` | 顶层 `gate_mode=manual_review_only`、`production_effect=none`、`promotion_gate_status`、policy id/version/thresholds snapshot、安全边界、source artifact checksums、candidate_count、ready_for_manual_review_count、blocked_count、top_candidate_id、main blocked_by；每个 candidate 包含 `candidate_id`、`candidate_evaluation_status`、`promotion_gate_status`、`blocked_by`、`warnings`、`improvement_summary`、`risk_delta_summary`、`data_quality_summary`、`required_manual_review_items`、`recommendation` 和 `production_effect=none` | daily task dashboard 的 Weight Promotion Gate 轻量卡片、manual review 前最后一层候选权重 gate | 否，`production_effect=none` | 第一版只读取已有产物，不主动重跑 candidate evaluation、paper runner、replay runner 或 broker；promotion gate status 只允许 `INSUFFICIENT_DATA`、`OBSERVE_ONLY`、`BLOCKED`、`NO_CLEAR_IMPROVEMENT`、`CANDIDATE_PROMISING_BUT_LIMITED`、`READY_FOR_MANUAL_REVIEW`；缺 candidate evaluation、candidate hard blocked、manual_approval_required 缺失、样本/filled 不足、数据质量差、synthetic snapshot ratio 高、OHLC coverage 低、reconciliation 低、continuous replay 缺失、drawdown/exposure/concentration 恶化、shadow/paper unreliable、data gate BLOCK 或重大 risk warning 都必须 blocked；`READY_FOR_MANUAL_REVIEW` 也不是自动晋级、不修改 production profile、不影响交易、不代表 live readiness |

或任何上游/发送/交易 pipeline |
| `outputs/notification_delivery_failure_classification/notification_delivery_failure_classification_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md/log` | `python scripts/run_notification_delivery_failure_classification.py [--audit-summary ...] [--output-dir ...] [--as-of-date YYYY-MM-DD] [--fail-on-critical]` | latest 或显式 TRADING-035 notification delivery audit summary；默认 source finder 支持 `data/derived/operator_briefs/notifications/delivery_audit/` 和 `outputs/notification_delivery_audit_summary/` | 顶层 `task_id=TRADING-036`、`report_type=notification_delivery_failure_classification`、`mode=read_only`、`production_effect=none`、`manual_review_only=true`、`source_audit`、`classification_summary.overall_status`、`total_failures`、`highest_severity`、`requires_manual_review`、`safe_to_retry`、`blocks_notification_chain`、`failure_categories`（`TRANSIENT_DELIVERY_FAILURE` / `CONFIGURATION_FAILURE` / `SAFETY_BLOCKED` / `CONTENT_MISMATCH` / `MISSING_ARTIFACT` / `UNKNOWN`）、`retry_readiness`、`recommended_actions`、`safety_invariants` 和 run log；固定 `notification_delivery_failure_classification_only=true`、`read_only=true`、全部 sent/webhook/retry/state mutation/upstream execution/data/apply/rollback/broker/replay/trading flags=false | daily task dashboard 的 Notification Delivery Failure Classification 只读卡片；人工复核失败类型和未来 TRADING-037 retry candidate queue 的输入候选 | 否，`production_effect=none` | 这是 failure classification / retry readiness 报告，不是真实发送、不创建 Gmail draft、不调用 webhook、不自动 retry、不修改 delivery state、不修改 production 参数、不运行 TRADING-035 或任何 notification 上游；dashboard 只读 TRADING-036 JSON，不运行 classifier 或任何发送/重试/交易 pipeline；`safe_to_retry` 不是自动发送授权 |
| `outputs/retry_candidate_queue/retry_candidate_queue_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md/log` | `python scripts/run_retry_candidate_queue.py [--classification-report ...] [--output-dir ...] [--as-of-date YYYY-MM-DD] [--fail-on-safety-blocked]` | latest 或显式 TRADING-036 notification delivery failure classification JSON | 顶层 `task_id=TRADING-037`、`report_type=retry_candidate_queue`、`mode=read_only`、`production_effect=none`、`manual_review_only=true`、`source_classification`、`queue_summary.queue_status`（`EMPTY` / `PENDING_APPROVAL` / `BLOCKED` / `SAFETY_BLOCKED` / `SOURCE_UNAVAILABLE`）、`candidate_queue`、`blocked_items`、`approval_gate`、`recommended_actions`、`safety_invariants` 和 run log；固定 `retry_candidate_queue_only=true`、`read_only=true`、全部 sent/webhook/retry/state mutation/approval state/upstream execution/data/apply/rollback/broker/replay/trading flags=false | daily task dashboard 的 Retry Candidate Queue 只读卡片；未来 manual approval record / retry dry-run layer 的输入候选 | 否，`production_effect=none` | TRADING-037 只生成只读 retry candidate queue 和 manual approval gate report；`PENDING_APPROVAL` 不是 retry 授权，`approval_gate.retry_execution_allowed=false`；不会发送 notification、执行 retry、修改 delivery state、修改 approval state、修改 TRADING-035/036 历史 artifact 或 production 参数；dashboard 只读 TRADING-037 JSON，不运行 queue generator、classifier 或任何发送/重试/交易 pipeline |

## Backtest / feedback 产物

| Artifact | 由谁生成 | 上游输入 | 关键字段或内容 | 下游使用 | 是否影响 production | 常见误解 |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `outputs/backtests/backtest_YYYY-MM-DD_YYYY-MM-DD.md` | `aits backtest` | validated data、PIT inputs、scoring rules | regime、date range、returns、drawdown、benchmark comparison、limitations | 投研复核、parameter replay | 否，回测不自动改规则 | 默认结论窗口应声明 `ai_after_chatgpt` |
| `outputs/backtests/backtest_daily_YYYY-MM-DD_YYYY-MM-DD.csv` | `aits backtest` | daily scoring context | signal date、score、target exposure、next return、costs、gates | robustness、gate attribution、parameter replay | 否 | 不是 production ledger |
| `outputs/backtests/backtest_robustness_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md` | `aits backtest --robustness-report` | 已完成的 backtest daily rows、robustness / validation policy、benchmark and cost assumptions | `schema_version`、robustness scenario status、coverage/source veto、OOS / random / signal-family baseline evidence、drawdown / turnover / bootstrap evidence、`production_effect=none` | parameter replay、research governance summary、manual promotion review | 否，`production_effect=none` | robustness 证据不是 production approval；scenario leading 或 robustness PASS 仍需 owner review、forward shadow 和 promotion contract，不自动改 scoring rules、weights 或 position gates |
| `outputs/backtests/backtest_input_coverage_*.csv` | `aits backtest` | PIT slices、quality reports | source coverage、missing inputs、warning status | audit、candidate veto | 否 | 高收益但覆盖不足不应直接晋级 |
| `outputs/reports/parameter_replay_YYYY-MM-DD.md/json` | `aits feedback build-parameter-replay` | robustness summary | scenario deltas、materiality、limitations | parameter candidate ledger | 否 | as-if replay 不是 approved overlay |
| `data/processed/parameter_candidates.json` | `aits feedback build-parameter-candidates` | parameter replay | candidate id、trial metrics、veto reasons、governance status | parameter governance、shadow runner | 否 | candidate ready 不等于 owner approval |
| `outputs/reports/parameter_governance_YYYY-MM-DD.md/json` | `aits feedback evaluate-parameter-governance` | `config/parameter_governance.yaml`、`data/processed/parameter_candidates.json`、owner quantitative input status | `schema_version=1`、`report_type=parameter_governance`、parameter surface status、candidate status、blocked reasons、owner input state、config checksum、recommended action、`production_effect=none` | Reader Brief、report index、research governance summary、daily task dashboard 和 manual parameter review | 否，`production_effect=none` | parameter governance 只给出参数面行动建议和阻断原因；缺 owner 输入时不能系统代填生产参数，validation-only shadow 也不等于 owner approval 或 production-ready |
| `outputs/reports/market_feedback_optimization_YYYY-MM-DD.md` | `aits feedback optimize-market-feedback` | outcomes、causal chains、candidates、overlays | readiness、sample floors、open gaps、next actions | 复盘、治理 | 否 | readiness 不是生产配置变更 |
| `data/processed/prediction_outcomes.csv` | `aits feedback calibrate-predictions` | prediction ledger、prices | horizon、available/pending/missing、benchmark excess | shadow maturity、promotion review | 否 | outcome 是后验观察，不能改写原 prediction |

## Shadow / validation-only 参数搜索产物

| Artifact | 由谁生成 | 上游输入 | 关键字段或内容 | 下游使用 | 是否影响 production | 常见误解 |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `config/weights/shadow_weight_profiles.yaml` | 人工维护 / 系统建议 | production weight profile | validation-only profile、weights、metadata | shadow observation | 否，`production_effect=none` | 不替换 `weight_profile_current.yaml` |
| `config/weight_adjustment_candidate_policy.yaml` | 人工维护 / 系统建议 | paper signal quality、shadow impact、continuous replay 和 production/shadow profile 复核要求 | max single-day weight delta、total weight tolerance、sample floors、synthetic snapshot cap、required validations 和 safety boundaries | `run_weight_adjustment_candidates.py` 的 candidate gate | 否，`production_effect=none` | policy 只约束 observe-only 候选生成，不批准修改 production profile |
| `config/weight_candidate_evaluation_policy.yaml` | 人工维护 / 系统建议 | weight adjustment candidates、paper signal quality、shadow impact、continuous replay 和 profile metadata 复核要求 | sample floors、synthetic snapshot cap、OHLC coverage、reconciliation PASS floor、max drawdown / exposure / concentration delta gate、required validations 和 safety boundaries | `run_weight_candidate_evaluation.py` 的 evaluation gate | 否，`production_effect=none` | policy 只约束 observe-only 候选评估，不批准 production promotion 或交易 |
| `config/weight_promotion_gate_policy.yaml` | 人工维护 / 系统建议 | weight candidate evaluation、paper signal quality、shadow impact、continuous replay、daily data gate 和 profile metadata 复核要求 | sample floors、filled floor、synthetic snapshot cap、OHLC coverage、reconciliation PASS floor、risk delta gate、stable improvement window floor、required validations 和 manual-review-only safety boundaries | `run_weight_promotion_gate.py` 的 promotion gate | 否，`production_effect=none` | policy 只决定 candidate 是否可进入人工复核，不批准生产修改、交易或 live readiness |
| `config/daily_shadow_weight_iteration_policy.yaml` | 人工维护 / 系统建议 | TRADING-015/016/017/018/018A artifacts 和 current shadow state | max abs/relative daily delta、minimum adjustment confidence、confidence defaults、conservative default weights、normalization target、min/max weight、required inputs 和 safety boundaries | `run_daily_shadow_weight_iteration.py` 的 shadow-only update gate | 否，`production_effect=none` | policy 只约束 shadow current state 的小步迭代，不批准 production promotion、production profile 修改或交易；policy 缺失时不得更新 shadow current |
| `config/weights/shadow_position_gate_profiles.yaml` | 人工维护 / 系统建议 | scoring/portfolio gate policy | validation-only gate cap overrides | shadow observation | 否 | relaxed gate 不是 production gate 放宽 |
| `config/weights/shadow_parameter_search_space.yaml` | 人工维护 | production weights/gates | weight grid、gate cap grid、bounds | parameter search | 否 | 搜索空间内最优不是无限连续空间最优 |
| `config/weights/shadow_parameter_objective.yaml` | 人工维护 | validation policy | objective、sample floor、regularization、eligibility | parameter search ranking | 否 | objective 排名不是 promotion contract |
| `outputs/parameter_search/<run_id>/manifest.json` | `aits feedback search-shadow-parameters` | snapshots、prices、search configs | input checksum、resolver version、git status、run params | reproducibility、promotion contract | 否 | manifest 不批准上线 |
| `outputs/parameter_search/<run_id>/trials.csv` | `search-shadow-parameters` | weight/gate candidates | trial id、metrics、objective、eligibility、regularization | analysis、Pareto front | 否 | trial 多不代表统计独立样本多 |
| `outputs/parameter_search/<run_id>/pareto_front.csv` | `search-shadow-parameters` | trials | non-dominated trials | review | 否 | Pareto front 不等于可上线名单 |
| `outputs/parameter_search/<run_id>/best_profiles.yaml` | `search-shadow-parameters` | eligible/diagnostic trials | candidate profile snapshot | review / forward shadow prep | 否 | 不应复制覆盖生产配置 |
| `outputs/parameter_search/<run_id>/search_report.md` | `search-shadow-parameters` | manifest、trials、attribution | eligible status、diagnostic-leading trial、factorial attribution、cap-level attribution、position changes | 人读参数搜索报告 | 否，`production_effect=none` | diagnostic-leading 只是当前样本解释，不是 production 建议 |
| `outputs/parameter_search/<run_id>/shadow_parameter_promotion_<run_id>.md/json` | `aits feedback evaluate-shadow-parameter-promotion` | search bundle、promotion contract | NOT_PROMOTABLE / READY_FOR_FORWARD_SHADOW / READY_FOR_OWNER_REVIEW、blockers | promotion review | 否，直到 owner approval 仍不改 production | `READY_FOR_FORWARD_SHADOW` 仍不是上线批准 |
| `artifacts/data_freshness/YYYY-MM-DD/market_data_freshness_summary.json/md` + `outputs/reports/market_data_freshness_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md` | `aits data freshness --latest` / `aits data validate-freshness --latest` / `aits reports data-freshness --latest` | `config/data/market_data_freshness.yaml`、`data/raw/prices_daily.csv`、latest valid `backtest_input_manifest.json`、`price_cache_registry.json`、U.S. market calendar | tracking date、expected/effective data date、latest raw/registry/manifest date、calendar status、asset coverage、freshness status（OK / ACCEPTABLE_LAG / NON_TRADING_DAY / STALE / MISSING / SOURCE_DELAYED / MARKET_CALENDAR_UNKNOWN / FAILED）、tracking readiness、suggested actions、safety fields | Portfolio Candidate Tracking readiness gate、Dashboard、Reader Brief、Shadow Parameter Backtest supporting artifact | 否，`production_effect=none` | 只读 freshness gate，不下载数据、不伪造价格、不刷新 manifest；STALE/MISSING 只能给出 repair/refresh 建议并阻断或降级 tracking，不能解除 promotion |
| `artifacts/data_refresh/YYYY-MM-DD/market_data_refresh_plan.json` + `market_data_refresh_summary.json/md` + `outputs/reports/market_data_refresh_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md` | `aits data refresh-market --latest` / `--dry-run` / `--plan-only` / `--date YYYY-MM-DD` / `--symbols ...`；`aits data validate-refresh --latest`；`aits data recover-freshness --latest`；alias 由 `aits reports data-refresh --latest` 读取 | `config/data/market_data_refresh.yaml`、latest `market_data_freshness_summary.json`、`data/raw/prices_daily.csv`、audited FMP raw cache、FMP/Yahoo provider、`price_cache_registry.json`、`backtest_input_manifest.json`、candidate tracking config | refresh status（NOT_NEEDED / PLANNED / OK / PARTIAL / SOURCE_DELAYED / FAILED / BLOCKED）、before/after freshness、target date、required/refreshed assets、source and symbol mapping、registry/manifest refresh、rerun freshness/tracking、remaining limitations、safety fields | Dashboard `Market Data Refresh` 卡片、Reader Brief refresh 摘要、Portfolio Candidate Tracking `refresh_report`、Shadow Parameter Backtest supporting artifact | 否，`production_effect=none` | 只在 stale/missing freshness recovery 中刷新 required asset price rows；source delayed 时不得生成假价格或 synthetic latest bar；即使 freshness 恢复 OK，也不启用 candidate profile、不解除 promotion 禁止、不修改 `config/parameters/production/current.yaml` |
| `artifacts/shadow_backtest/YYYY-MM-DD/shadow_backtest_summary.json/md` | `aits parameters shadow-backtest --latest` | `config/parameters/production/current.yaml`、`config/parameters/shadow/shadow_backtest.yaml`、`config/parameters/promotion/promotion_rules.yaml`、通过 `aits validate-data` 同路径校验的市场/宏观缓存、同日 backtest input diagnostics、可选 `signal_snapshot.json`、可选同日 `signal_ablation_summary.json`、可选 latest `signal_calibration_summary.json`、可选 latest `portfolio_sensitivity_summary.json` | baseline/candidate 参数版本、walk-forward 窗口、baseline vs candidate metrics、参数变化归因、data quality status、price_data_status、signal_snapshots_status、backtest_mode、score_calculation、score_attribution、parameter_contribution_summary、promotion_constraints、PIT 限制、promotion decision、可选 `supporting_artifacts.signal_ablation` / `supporting_artifacts.signal_calibration` / `supporting_artifacts.portfolio_sensitivity`、`production_effect=none` | Dashboard `Shadow Parameter Backtest` 只读卡片、Reader Brief `Parameter Shadow Review`、manual parameter review | 否，`production_effect=none` | 这是 observe-only 参数回测，不会修改 `config/parameters/production/current.yaml`、production weights、hard gates、broker 或交易动作；`signal_ablation`、`signal_calibration` 和 `portfolio_sensitivity` 只作为 supporting artifacts，不能解除 `full_signal_backtest_limited`、proxy/fallback 或 manual review 限制；best sensitivity profile 不是 production 参数建议；`price_only_shadow_backtest` 只能 rejected，`full_signal_backtest_limited` 最多 watch，只有 full-signal OK 才可进入 candidate 复核；数据不足时必须 `INSUFFICIENT_DATA` / rejected |
| `artifacts/shadow_parameters/YYYY-MM-DD/shadow_parameters.json/md` | `aits parameters shadow-backtest --latest` | Shadow Parameter Backtest summary | 本轮 bounded grid 选出的 shadow 参数快照、参数变化和人工复核边界 | 人工复核、candidate 参数记录 | 否，`production_effect=none` | shadow 参数不是 production 参数，也不是 approved overlay |
| `artifacts/candidate_parameters/YYYY-MM-DD/candidate_parameters.json/md` | `aits parameters shadow-backtest --latest` | Shadow Parameter Backtest summary、promotion rules | 达到或部分达到晋升复核条件的候选参数记录、promotion status、manual review checklist | 参数人工复核 | 否，除非未来独立 manual promotion workflow 明确批准 | 生成 candidate artifact 不等于允许写 production |
| `artifacts/parameter_promotion/YYYY-MM-DD/parameter_promotion_decision.json/md` | `aits parameters shadow-backtest --latest` / `aits reports parameter-promotion --latest` | Shadow Parameter Backtest summary、`promotion_rules.yaml` | `schema_version=1`、`report_type=parameter_promotion_decision`、promotion `status`（`rejected` / `watch` / `candidate` / `manual_review_required`）、hard rejections、criteria results、manual review items、`production_effect=none` | Dashboard、Reader Brief、人工 promotion review | 否，`production_effect=none` | promotion decision 只给建议；`candidate` 也仍需人工复核，不会自动晋升 |
| `data/processed/shadow_iteration_registry.csv` + `outputs/reports/shadow_iteration_YYYY-MM-DD.md/json` + `outputs/shadow_iterations/<run_id>/*` | `aits feedback run-shadow-iteration` / `aits feedback register-forward-shadow` | search bundle、promotion contract、既有 registry | `weight_only` / `gate_only` / `weight_gate_bundle` 分类、lifecycle status、Trial Card、blocked reasons、retirement evidence、P2 guardrails、attribution、position change 降级状态、lineage | dashboard 只读展示、forward shadow 候选管理 | 否，`production_effect=none` | iteration registry 只管理 shadow 观察状态；`register-forward-shadow` 只改 registry 状态；`gate_only` 和 bundle 不得被当作权重晋级候选 |
| `data/processed/prediction_ledger_flow_validation.csv` | `aits feedback run-parameter-shadow` | parameter candidates、production snapshot | validation-only challenger predictions | flow validation outcomes | 否 | 不应和正式 `prediction_ledger.csv` 混同 |

## production_effect 标签

| 标签 | 含义 | 典型位置 |
|---|---|---|
| `production` | 正式生产判断链路的一部分，会进入 canonical scoring / snapshot / ledger 语义 | production decision snapshot、production prediction ledger 行 |
| `advisory` | 投研辅助或趋势判断输出，不自动交易 | daily score report、execution advisory |
| `none` | 只读、诊断、shadow 或 validation-only，不改变生产评分、仓位 gate、正式 ledger 或 approved overlay | dashboard、shadow search、flow validation ledger |
| `validation-only` | 用于验证参数、规则或流程，不可当成生产候选批准 | parameter search、shadow gate / weight profiles |
| `blocked` | 被质量、治理、样本、owner approval 或 promotion contract 阻断 | promotion report、candidate governance |

运行时核心标签由 `ai_trading_system.core.production_effect.ProductionEffect` 表达。历史报告中较长的解释性 production effect 文本需要逐处确认语义后再迁移，不能自动归并。

当一个产物声明 `production_effect=none` 时，它仍然可以非常有价值，但价值是诊断、学习、复核或准备 forward shadow，而不是直接改变 production 结论。

| `outputs/reports/reader_brief_YYYY-MM-DD.html/json` Dynamic Rescue Risk-Capped Research Method Review excerpt | `aits reports reader-brief --date YYYY-MM-DD` / `--latest` | `report_index_YYYY-MM-DD.json` 中最新的 `etf_dynamic_v3_risk_capped_limited`、`etf_dynamic_v3_risk_capped_backfill`、`etf_dynamic_v3_risk_capped_comparison` 和 `etf_dynamic_v3_risk_capped_review` artifacts，并读取 sibling summary / metrics / decision files | `etf_dynamic_v3_system_target.risk_capped_id`、`risk_capped_backfill_id`、`risk_capped_comparison_id`、`risk_capped_review_id`、`risk_capped_decision`、`risk_capped_confidence`、`risk_capped_improvements_vs_limited`、`risk_capped_return_delta_vs_limited`、`risk_capped_drawdown_delta_vs_limited`、`risk_capped_semiconductor_exposure_delta`、`risk_capped_rolling_consistency_delta`、`risk_capped_backfill_cap_event_count`、`production_effect=none` | Reader Brief risk-capped review 摘要及 artifact 下钻入口 | 否，`production_effect=none` | Reader Brief 只读 report index 和 sibling artifacts，不运行 risk-capped generation/backfill/comparison/review CLIs；缺 artifact 时显示 `MISSING`，不能补造 approval、official target weights、order ticket 或 broker action。 |

| `outputs/validation_runtime/<run_id>/test_runtime_summary.json`<br/>`test_runtime_reader_brief.md` | `python scripts/run_validation_tier.py <suite> --write-runtime-artifact` | pytest suite selection from `fast-unit`、`contract-validation`、`report-validation`、`integration`、`reproducibility`、`slow-research-regression` 或 `full`；旧 alias `fast`、`reader-brief`、`artifact-reproduce`、`dynamic-v3`、`trading-engine` 会解析到正式 suite；后续 pytest 验证默认并行 `-n 16 --dist loadfile` | `schema_version=1`、`report_type=test_runtime_summary`、requested/resolved tier、suite_family、promotion_blocking、slow_suite_allowed、command、workers、dist、status、exit_code、elapsed_seconds、`can_support_promotion_evidence`、安全字段、`production_effect=none` | `test_runtime_summary` registry entry、TRADING-347 promotion validation evidence、交付说明 | 否，developer validation artifact only | Runtime artifact 只记录 pytest execution 和 suite contract；`PRINT_ONLY` 不能作为 passing evidence；slow research 未运行或 timeout 不能写成 PASS；focused one-off pytest 也应显式使用 `python -m pytest -n 16 --dist loadfile ...`；串行 pytest 仅用于复现或 parallelism-related failure 诊断，不能把并行失败静默改写成串行 PASS；不读取/修改 cached market data、不替代 `aits validate-data`、不改变 strategy logic、official target weights、portfolio、production state、order ticket 或 broker。 |

## TRADING-2046～2085 Free PIT Data Source Ingestion

|产物|生成命令|上游输入|Schema / 安全契约|用途|production 影响|常见误解|
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
|`config/data/free_data_source_registry.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/free_data_source_registry_review.md`<br/>`docs/research/free_pit_data_source_scope.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/free_pit_data_source_scope.yaml`|`aits data free-sources ingest --as-of YYYY-MM-DD`|Owner free PIT data source plan、first-layer channel closeout/reopen blockers、free feature policy|Schema contract：`schema_version=free_data_source_registry.v1` / `free_pit_data_source_scope.v1`；status exposes free-only scope, source contract fields, PIT status, allowed/blocked usage, `market_regime=ai_after_chatgpt` and safety fields|登记 FRED/ALFRED/Cboe/Fed/BLS/BEA/FRED release/NY Fed free-source contracts and research-only scope|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Registry ready 不是付费数据替代品，也不恢复 first-layer research；revision-sensitive macro without vintage remains blocked from model-ready use.|
|`data/processed/free_sources/fred_market_series.parquet`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/fred_series_ingestion_summary.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/fred_series_ingestion_review.md`|`aits data free-sources ingest --as-of YYYY-MM-DD`|Cached `data/raw/rates_daily.csv` after the same validation path as `aits validate-data`、free source registry、free feature policy|Schema contract：`schema_version=fred_series_ingestion_summary.v1`；status, row_count, available/missing series, data-quality status, PIT-approved market series and safety fields|生成 FRED rates/liquidity market series baseline for free feature families|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|DGS2/DGS10/DTWEXBGS coverage does not imply DGS3MO/FEDFUNDS/SOFR/VIXCLS or vintage macro coverage.|
|`data/processed/free_sources/vix_history.parquet`<br/>`docs/research/vix_free_source_crosscheck_review.md`|`aits data free-sources ingest --as-of YYYY-MM-DD`|Cached `data/raw/prices_daily.csv` `^VIX` rows after cached-data validation、free source registry|Schema contract：`schema_version=vix_free_source_crosscheck_review.v1`；status, VIX row count, FRED `VIXCLS` availability, primary source and safety fields|Generate VIX index history for `volatility_compression_free_v1` and risk-on veto diagnostics|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|This is VIX index-only evidence, not VIX futures term structure, skew, VVIX, option surface, or promotion evidence.|
|`data/processed/free_sources/macro_event_calendar.parquet`<br/>`docs/research/official_macro_calendar_ingestion_review.md`|`aits data free-sources ingest --as-of YYYY-MM-DD`|Optional official calendar input rows normalized by `OfficialMacroCalendarConnector`; otherwise empty local calendar cache with explicit diagnostic status|Schema contract：`schema_version=official_macro_calendar_ingestion_review.v1`；status, event count, PIT warning count, diagnostic-only flag and safety fields|Track official macro event calendar ingestion readiness for calendar-risk features|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Empty or PIT-warning calendar output is not proof of no macro events; missing `source_published_at` keeps rows diagnostic-only.|
|`inputs/research_reviews/calendar_event_pit_contract.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/calendar_event_pit_contract.md`|`aits data free-sources ingest --as-of YYYY-MM-DD`|Free calendar source contracts and PIT event timestamp requirements|Schema contract：`schema_version=calendar_event_pit_contract.v1`；required fields include `event_date`, `scheduled_release_time`, `source_published_at`, `known_at`, `available_at`, `timezone`, `revision_policy`; missing published-at becomes `PIT_WARNING` and `diagnostic_only`|Defines calendar event PIT boundary before macro calendar features can become model-ready|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Calendar date alone is not a PIT-known release artifact; unknown publish timestamp must not be treated as model-ready evidence.|
|`inputs/research_reviews/free_feature_pit_audit.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/free_feature_pit_audit.md`|`aits data free-sources ingest --as-of YYYY-MM-DD`|Generated free-source parquet artifacts, feature parquet artifacts, participation proxy registry|Schema contract：`schema_version=free_feature_pit_audit.v1`；status, feature-family PIT rows, allowed/blocked usage, `PIT_APPROVED` / `PIT_WARNING_DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY` / `PIT_BLOCKED` and safety fields|Audit whether free feature families are PIT-approved, diagnostic-only, or blocked|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|A PIT audit warning is not a waiver; `participation_proxy_free_v1` remains not true PIT breadth and cannot enter promotion evidence.|
|`inputs/research_reviews/free_feature_family_reopen_readiness.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/free_feature_family_reopen_readiness.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/free_pit_data_source_ingestion_final_matrix.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/free_pit_data_source_ingestion_closeout.md`|`aits research trends free-feature-readiness --as-of YYYY-MM-DD`|Free-source ingestion outputs, PIT audit, coverage matrix, feature policy and cached-data quality status|Schema contract：`schema_version=free_feature_family_reopen_readiness.v1` / `free_pit_data_source_ingestion_final_matrix.v1`；readiness rows, final status, blockers, `promotion_allowed=false`, `paper_shadow_allowed=false`, `production_allowed=false`, `broker_action=none`|Summarize which free feature families are ready for future research and which remain diagnostic or blocked|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Reopen readiness is not first-layer research restart, owner approval, paper-shadow readiness, production readiness, or trading advice.|
