|产物|生成命令|上游输入|Schema / 安全契约|用途|production 影响|常见误解|
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
|`outputs/research_trends/free_feature_reablation/ablation_dataset.parquet`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/free_feature_reablation/ablation_dataset_summary.json`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/free_feature_*_reablation.yaml`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/free_feature_family_reablation_final_matrix.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/free_feature_family_reablation_closeout.md`|`aits research trends free-feature-reablation --as-of YYYY-MM-DD`|2046～2085 free feature parquet、cached QQQ price cache through data-quality gate、PIT audit、coverage matrix、first-layer channel closeout|Schema contract：family-level dataset includes date/window/family/feature JSON/reference labels/future outcomes；final status uses `FREE_FEATURE_REABLATION_COMPLETE` with `DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY_EVIDENCE` / `NO_REOPEN_EVIDENCE` / `PARTICIPATION_PROXY_VALIDATION_RECOMMENDED`；all reports carry `market_regime=ai_after_chatgpt` and safety fields|验证 free feature families 是否有 family-level diagnostic increment before reopen gate|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Re-ablation evidence is not strategy training, first-layer reopen approval, weights, or trade advice.|
|`data/features/participation_proxy_etf_ratios_v1.parquet`<br/>`data/features/participation_proxy_free_v2.parquet`<br/>`data/processed/free_sources/alpha_vantage_listing_status_snapshots.parquet`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/participation_proxy_*`<br/>`docs/research/participation_proxy_validation_closeout.md`|`aits research trends participation-proxy-validation --as-of YYYY-MM-DD`|Cached ETF prices after data-quality gate、participation proxy registry、optional Alpha Vantage listing input/network trial|Schema contract：ETF ratios are `PIT_APPROVED_AS_PRICE_PROXY_NOT_TRUE_BREADTH`; Alpha/FMP rows remain diagnostic until date/known_at semantics are proven|Assess low-cost participation proxy value and whether paid breadth due diligence is worth review|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|ETF ratio proxy and listing status are not true PIT breadth or Nasdaq-100 historical membership.|
|`outputs/research_trends/first_layer_reopen_gate/evidence_aggregation.json`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/first_layer_reopen_gate_decision.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/first_layer_reopen_owner_approval_packet.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/first_layer_reopen_gate_final_matrix.yaml`|`aits research trends first-layer-reopen-gate`|Free re-ablation final matrix、participation proxy validation final matrix、channel closeout、PIT audit、coverage and dependency diagnostics|Schema contract：decision status is one of `FIRST_LAYER_REOPEN_DENIED` / `FREE_FEATURES_DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY` / `PARTICIPATION_PROXY_PROMISING_BUT_NOT_MODEL_READY` / `PAID_DATA_DUE_DILIGENCE_RECOMMENDED` / `REOPEN_ALLOWED_FOR_NARROW_CHANNEL_V4`; pre-registered gate denies target-path-only, 2023+ only, beta/TQQQ dependency, PIT warning-as-model-ready, and missing owner approval; safety fields remain disabled|Independent decision gate deciding whether first-layer channel research can reopen|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|A paid-data recommendation or diagnostic proxy value does not reopen first-layer research without gate pass and owner approval.|
|`config/research/channel_specific_first_layer_v4_freeze_contract.yaml`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/channel_specific_first_layer_v4_final_matrix.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/channel_specific_first_layer_v4_closeout.md`|`aits research trends channel-specific-v4`|First-layer reopen gate decision and v4 freeze contract|Schema contract：fails closed unless gate status is `REOPEN_ALLOWED_FOR_NARROW_CHANNEL_V4` and owner approval is recorded; no universal first-layer, no TQQQ allocation, no production weights|Conditional v4 guardrail / closeout path|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|The presence of a v4 contract does not mean v4 training or candidate selection has started.|
|`config/research/minimal_forward_diagnostic_policy.yaml`<br/>`config/research/minimal_forward_diagnostic_log_schema.yaml`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/minimal_forward_diagnostic_final_matrix.yaml`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/minimal_forward_diagnostic_outcome_backfill.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/minimal_forward_diagnostic_closeout.md`|`aits research trends minimal-forward-diagnostic`<br/>`aits research trends minimal-forward-diagnostic outcome-backfill`|Minimal forward diagnostic policy/schema and owner approval state|Schema contract：default status=`MINIMAL_FORWARD_DIAGNOSTIC_DISABLED_READY` and `enabled=false`; outcome-backfill returns `MINIMAL_FORWARD_DIAGNOSTIC_REQUIRES_OWNER_APPROVAL` while disabled；allowed fields exclude target weights/trade action/allocation/broker/paper-shadow position|Prepare disabled forward diagnostic governance and prove outcome backfill is owner-gated|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|A disabled forward diagnostic schema is not a forward watch, paper-shadow, or trading signal.|

## TRADING-2246～2265 Paid Data Due Diligence for True Breadth

|产物|生成命令|上游输入|Schema / 安全契约|用途|production 影响|常见误解|
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
|`docs/research/paid_data_due_diligence_scope.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/paid_data_due_diligence_scope.yaml`|manual paid data due diligence packet|Post-2085 participation proxy validation、first-layer reopen denied closeout、owner 2246～2265 attachment|Schema contract：`schema_version=paid_data_due_diligence_scope.v1`、status=`PAID_DATA_DUE_DILIGENCE_SCOPE_READY`、purchase / provider upgrade / first-layer reopen / model training / promotion all disabled|固定本批 paid data due-diligence-only 范围和禁止购买/晋升边界|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Scope ready 不是 trial approval，也不是恢复 first-layer、v4、minimal forward diagnostic、paper-shadow、production 或 broker。|
|`config/research/true_breadth_data_contract.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/true_breadth_data_contract.md`|manual paid data due diligence packet|Post-2085 participation proxy PIT blocker、historical constituents / daily membership 需求|Schema contract：`schema_version=true_breadth_data_contract.v1`；requires historical constituents、daily membership、delisted securities、survivorship-free universe、primary window coverage from `2021-02-22`、Python/CLI access、local cache；current constituents backfill forbidden；PIT warning downgrades to diagnostic-only|定义任何 paid source 进入 model-ready breadth 前必须满足的硬契约|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Contract active 不是已有 true breadth data；price-only 或 PIT-warning holdings 仍不能成为 model-ready breadth。|
|`config/data/paid_breadth_data_vendor_registry.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/paid_breadth_data_vendor_registry_review.md`|manual paid data due diligence packet|True breadth contract、公开 vendor 文档、FMP 脱敏 capability check、post-2085 proxy blocker|Schema contract：`schema_version=paid_breadth_data_vendor_registry.v1`；vendor rows record tier、role、contract fit、allowed use、model-ready allowed before trial=false、auto_purchase_allowed=false、owner manual approval required|登记 Norgate、FMP、EODHD、QuantConnect / AlgoSeek 和 price-only sources 的 due diligence 状态|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Vendor registry 不是 vendor subscription，也不是 PIT proof；公开文档不能替代 trial sample 和 license review。|
|`docs/research/norgate_due_diligence_checklist.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/norgate_due_diligence_checklist.yaml`|manual paid data due diligence packet|Paid breadth vendor registry、true breadth contract、Norgate public documentation due-diligence notes|Schema contract：`schema_version=norgate_due_diligence_checklist.v1`、status=`NORGATE_TRIAL_RECOMMENDED_OWNER_APPROVAL_REQUIRED`、purchase_allowed=false、model_ready_breadth_allowed_before_trial=false|列出 Norgate trial 前必须验证的 historical constituents、delisted、daily membership、Python access、local cache、license、cost 和 coverage checks|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Norgate trial recommended 不等于购买；没有 owner approval 不得注册 trial、下载样本或缓存 paid data。|
|`docs/research/fmp_holdings_due_diligence.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/fmp_holdings_due_diligence.yaml`|manual paid data due diligence packet|FMP_API_KEY presence、脱敏 QQQ holdings endpoint probe、true breadth known-at contract|Schema contract：`schema_version=fmp_holdings_due_diligence.v1`、status=`FMP_NOT_SUITABLE`、sanitized_result=`HTTP_402_PAYMENT_REQUIRED`、model_ready_breadth_allowed=false|记录 FMP holdings 当前 entitlement blocker 和 PIT fields 未验证状态|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|HTTP 402 不是自动升级理由；即使升级也必须证明 holding_date / reported_date / known_at 和 delisted membership。|
|`docs/research/eodhd_breadth_due_diligence.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/eodhd_breadth_due_diligence.yaml`|manual paid data due diligence packet|Paid breadth vendor registry、true breadth contract、EODHD public documentation due-diligence notes|Schema contract：`schema_version=eodhd_breadth_due_diligence.v1`、status=`EODHD_CONDITIONAL_TRIAL_CANDIDATE`、model_ready_breadth_allowed_before_trial=false|记录 EODHD 作为 conditional low-cost alternative 的未验证 membership / known-at / cost blocker|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Conditional trial candidate 不是 model-ready source；不能替代 Norgate trial 或 current true breadth contract。|
|`docs/research/quantconnect_algoseek_due_diligence.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/quantconnect_algoseek_due_diligence.yaml`|manual paid data due diligence packet|Paid breadth vendor registry、true breadth contract、QuantConnect / AlgoSeek ecosystem review|Schema contract：`schema_version=quantconnect_algoseek_due_diligence.v1`、status=`QUANTCONNECT_DEFERRED`、local download and membership availability not verified|记录 QuantConnect / AlgoSeek survivorship-free equities 和 local export / LEAN integration blockers|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Ecosystem feasibility 不是 repo-native integration；不得把 LEAN-only availability 直接当成本地 model-ready breadth。|
|`docs/research/price_only_sources_breadth_limitations.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/price_only_sources_breadth_limitations.yaml`|manual paid data due diligence packet|Paid breadth vendor registry、true breadth data contract、price-source role review|Schema contract：`schema_version=price_only_sources_breadth_limitations.v1`、status=`PRICE_ONLY_NOT_TRUE_BREADTH`、can_solve_historical_constituents=false、promotion_allowed=false|明确 Tiingo / Marketstack / Yahoo / FMP price / EODHD price 只能做 price cross-check 和 data quality validation|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Price coverage 不是 membership coverage；price-only source 不能构建 daily constituent snapshot。|
|`outputs/research_trends/paid_data_due_diligence/vendor_scoring_matrix.csv`<br/>`docs/research/paid_data_vendor_scoring_review.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/paid_data_vendor_scoring.yaml`|manual paid data due diligence packet|Paid vendor registry、true breadth contract、FMP capability check、trial gate policy|Schema contract：`schema_version=paid_data_vendor_scoring.v1`、status=`PAID_DATA_VENDOR_SCORING_READY`；CSV fields include vendor、coverage_score、pit_safety_score、engineering_score、cost_score、research_value_score、total_score、recommendation、key_blockers|把 vendor coverage / PIT / engineering / cost / research value 归一评分并支持 owner trial decision|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Norgate score >=80 只代表 trial review 推荐，不代表购买、订阅或 strategy reopen。|
|`docs/research/true_breadth_value_of_information_estimate.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/true_breadth_value_of_information_estimate.yaml`|manual paid data due diligence packet|Participation proxy validation final matrix、first-layer reopen gate denial、vendor scoring matrix|Schema contract：`schema_version=true_breadth_value_of_information_estimate.v1`、status=`TRUE_BREADTH_VALUE_OF_INFORMATION_READY`、model_ready_breadth_allowed=false、promotion_allowed=false|解释 true breadth 相比 proxy 可能补足的 membership、survivorship、concentration 和 sector participation 信息增量|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Value-of-information 不是 trial approval；如果 true breadth trial 失败，first-layer 应继续暂停。|
|`docs/research/true_breadth_prototype_design_without_purchase.md`|manual paid data due diligence packet|True breadth contract、target feature family design、paid vendor due diligence closeout|Schema contract：design-only status implied by no data purchase；covers daily membership snapshot builder、price joiner、breadth/concentration builders、PIT audit、coverage matrix and family ablation boundaries|描述 owner-approved trial 通过后如何实现 prototype，不购买或下载任何 paid data|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Prototype design 不是 implementation start，也不允许绕过 owner approval 或 data quality gates。|
|`config/research/paid_data_trial_gate_policy.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/paid_data_trial_decision_gate.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/paid_data_trial_decision_gate.yaml`|manual paid data due diligence packet|Vendor scoring matrix、true breadth contract、owner approval policy|Schema contract：`schema_version=paid_data_trial_gate_policy.v1` / `paid_data_trial_decision_gate.v1`、status=`NORGATE_TRIAL_RECOMMENDED`、owner approval before trial/purchase required、auto_purchase_allowed=false|把 vendor score 转为 owner-gated trial decision，当前建议先审 Norgate trial|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Trial recommended 不等于 trial allowed now；没有 owner manual approval 不得升级、购买、下载样本或写入 pipeline。|
|`docs/research/paid_data_due_diligence_owner_packet.md`|manual paid data due diligence packet|Scope、contract、vendor registry、scoring、VOI estimate、trial gate|Schema contract：owner packet status=`OWNER_PACKET_READY` by content；answers why due diligence now、why not directly buy Norgate、vendor pros/cons、trial/no-trial reasons、true breadth blocker and safety fields|给 owner 中文决策包，说明是否进入 paid data trial review|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Owner packet 是人工复核输入，不是 owner approval record，也不是 paid source activation。|
|`docs/research/paid_data_due_diligence_closeout.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/paid_data_due_diligence_final_matrix.yaml`|manual paid data due diligence packet|All TRADING-2246～2265 due diligence artifacts、trial gate policy、vendor scoring matrix|Schema contract：`schema_version=paid_data_due_diligence_final_matrix.v1`、status=`NORGATE_TRIAL_RECOMMENDED`、final_statuses include `PAID_DATA_DUE_DILIGENCE_COMPLETE` and `TRUE_BREADTH_DATA_REQUIRED_FOR_REOPEN`、candidate_count=0、promotion/paper-shadow/production=false、broker_action=none|收口 paid data due diligence，并固定 true breadth 仍是 first-layer reopen 前置 blocker|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Closeout 完成不代表 true breadth data 已获得；first-layer、v4、minimal forward diagnostic、promotion 和 broker 仍全部禁用。|

## TRADING-2266～2295 Norgate Trial Integration Spike

|产物|生成命令|上游输入|Schema / 安全契约|用途|production 影响|常见误解|
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
|`docs/research/norgate_trial_integration_scope.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/norgate_trial_integration_scope.yaml`|`aits data norgate trial-pack`|Owner Norgate trial attachment、paid data due diligence closeout|Schema contract：`schema_version=norgate_trial_integration_scope.v1`、status=`NORGATE_TRIAL_INTEGRATION_SCOPE_READY`、price_history_limit=`2 years`、first_layer/promotion/paper_shadow/production disabled|定义 Norgate trial engineering/data capability spike 的范围和禁止边界|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Trial scope ready 不是正式订阅 approval，也不是 first-layer reopen。|
|`config/data/norgate_trial_environment_contract.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/norgate_trial_environment_contract.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/norgate_trial_environment_probe.yaml`|`aits data norgate trial-smoke-test`|Optional local `norgatedata` package、Norgate local database、credential env presence only|Schema contract：`schema_version=norgate_trial_environment_contract.v1` / `norgate_trial_smoke_test_summary.v1`；allowed statuses include `NORGATE_ENV_READY` and fail-closed missing package/local DB statuses；credential values never recorded|检查 Windows Python package、本地 DB、credential handling 和 raw data boundary|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|缺包 fail-closed 不是系统失败；也不得把 env var presence 当作 auth proof。|
|`outputs/research_trends/norgate_trial/smoke_test_summary.json`<br/>`docs/research/norgate_trial_smoke_test_review.md`|`aits data norgate trial-smoke-test`|Environment contract and local optional Norgate install|Schema contract：status=`NORGATE_ENV_*`、package_present、local_database_available、database_names_hash、credentials_values_recorded=false、raw_vendor_data_committed=false|记录 Norgate access smoke result，当前可在无 package 环境中 fail-closed|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Smoke pass 也不是 membership/pass 或 paid purchase approval。|
|`config/data/norgate_source_contract.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/norgate_source_contract.md`|`aits data norgate trial-pack`|Norgate trial package terms and adapter alias mapping|Schema contract：`schema_version=norgate_source_contract.v1`、source_id=`norgate_us_stocks_platinum_trial`、trial_length=`3 weeks`、price_history_limit=`2 years`、raw/local cache commit disallowed|固定 Norgate trial source identity、index alias and 2Y limitation|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Source contract 不是 vendor data cache，也不证明 historical membership 已可查询。|
|`outputs/research_trends/norgate_trial/membership_probe.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/norgate_trial/membership_probe_summary.json`<br/>`docs/research/norgate_membership_query_probe_review.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/norgate_membership_query_probe.yaml`|`aits data norgate membership-probe --index nasdaq100`|Safe Norgate connector、anchor dates、optional live `index_constituent_timeseries` query|Schema contract：`schema_version=norgate_membership_query_probe.v1`、requested/resolved date、member_count、member_symbols_hash、query_success、raw_member_symbols_committed=false|验证或 fail-close Nasdaq-100 / NDX membership query capability using summary only|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Member count/hash 不是完整 member list；membership query success 也不代表 price join coverage。|
|`docs/research/norgate_delisted_visibility_probe_review.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/norgate_delisted_visibility_probe.yaml`|`aits data norgate trial-pack`|Safe Norgate connector and local optional delisted symbol database aliases|Schema contract：`schema_version=norgate_delisted_visibility_probe.v1`、status in `DELISTED_VISIBILITY_*`、delisted_symbol_count、sample_hash、raw_symbol_list_committed=false|验证或 fail-close delisted securities visibility without committing raw list|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Delisted visibility confirmed still needs license/cache review and PIT audit before model-ready use。|
|`outputs/research_trends/norgate_trial/price_coverage_summary.json`<br/>`docs/research/norgate_trial_price_coverage_review.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/norgate_trial_price_coverage.yaml`|`aits data norgate trial-pack`|Safe Norgate connector and trial price symbols `QQQ/AAPL/MSFT/NVDA/TSLA`|Schema contract：`schema_version=norgate_trial_price_coverage_summary.v1`、trial_price_history_limited_to_2y=true、primary_window_price_coverage=false unless live coverage proves otherwise|记录 trial price coverage and explicitly block primary-window model-ready interpretation|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|2Y price coverage cannot validate 2021 primary window or 2022 stress slice。|
|`outputs/research_trends/norgate_trial/daily_membership_snapshot_summary.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/norgate_trial/nasdaq100_breadth_prototype_2y.csv`<br/>`docs/research/norgate_breadth_prototype_2y_review.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/norgate_breadth_prototype_2y.yaml`|`aits data norgate trial-pack`|Membership probe summary、price coverage summary、summary-only snapshot/prototype builders|Schema contract：`schema_version=norgate_breadth_prototype_2y.v1`、status=`NORGATE_BREADTH_PROTOTYPE_2Y_ONLY` or blocked、not_model_ready_for_2021_primary_window=true、not_promotion_evidence=true|生成 daily membership snapshot summary 和 2Y-only breadth prototype schema/summary|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|2Y prototype 是 engineering evidence，不是 first-layer training dataset 或 trade signal。|
|`docs/research/norgate_trial_pit_leakage_audit.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/norgate_trial_pit_leakage_audit.yaml`|`aits data norgate trial-pack`|Membership probe、price coverage、source contract and raw data governance|Schema contract：`schema_version=norgate_trial_pit_leakage_audit.v1`、uses_current_constituents_backfill=false、raw_vendor_data_committed=false、trial_limit_blocks_primary_window_model_ready=true|审计 current constituent backfill、date-aware membership、price as-of join and raw data leakage boundary|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|PIT audit ready 不是 PIT pass for primary window；trial limits still block model-ready breadth。|
|`docs/research/norgate_trial_cache_artifact_governance.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/norgate_trial_cache_artifact_governance.yaml`|`aits data norgate trial-pack`|`.gitignore`、environment/source contract、Norgate local DB policy|Schema contract：`schema_version=norgate_trial_cache_artifact_governance.v1`、raw_vendor_data_outside_repo=true、gitignore_verified、derived_summaries_allowed=true、member_symbol_list_committed=false|证明 raw Norgate data/cache paths are excluded and only derived summaries are committed|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Gitignore pass 不等于 license permits sharing raw data；raw data remains out of repo。|
|`docs/research/norgate_trial_value_of_information_review.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/norgate_trial_value_of_information.yaml`|`aits data norgate trial-pack`|Smoke、membership、delisted、price、breadth、cache governance summaries|Schema contract：`schema_version=norgate_trial_value_of_information.v1`、status=`NORGATE_TRIAL_VOI_READY`、expected_research_value_greater_than_cost boolean、safety fields disabled|回答 trial 是否足以支持 paid Platinum owner decision|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|VOI positive would still require owner manual purchase approval and primary-window validation。|
|`config/research/norgate_paid_platinum_decision_gate.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/norgate_paid_platinum_decision_gate.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/norgate_paid_platinum_decision_gate.yaml`|`aits data norgate trial-pack`|Trial summaries、decision policy and owner approval boundary|Schema contract：`schema_version=norgate_paid_platinum_decision_gate.v1` / policy v1、allowed statuses include recommended/deferred/not suitable/inconclusive、owner_manual_approval_required_before_purchase=true|将 trial evidence 收口为 paid Platinum decision gate|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|`NORGATE_PAID_PLATINUM_RECOMMENDED` 也不是自动购买；owner approval remains required。|
|`docs/research/norgate_trial_owner_brief.md`<br/>`docs/research/norgate_trial_integration_closeout.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/norgate_trial_integration_final_matrix.yaml`|`aits data norgate trial-pack`|All Norgate trial spike artifacts and decision gate|Schema contract：`schema_version=norgate_trial_integration_final_matrix.v1`、status in Norgate trial final statuses、research_audit_metadata modified_channel=`norgate_trial_integration`、candidate_count=0 and all safety fields disabled|给 owner 中文 brief / closeout，说明 trial 验证与限制、paid decision and remaining blockers|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Closeout 不代表 Norgate data 已 model-ready；primary-window validation still requires paid Platinum and owner approval。|

## TRADING-2267 Norgate Trial 2Y Partial Effectiveness Validation

|产物|生成命令|上游输入|Schema / 安全契约|用途|production 影响|常见误解|
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
|`config/research/norgate_trial_partial_effectiveness_policy.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/norgate_trial_partial_effectiveness_policy.md`|`aits data norgate partial-effectiveness`|TRADING-2266 trial access evidence and owner request for 2Y partial effectiveness|Schema contract：`schema_version=norgate_trial_partial_effectiveness_policy.v1`、status=`active`、policy id `norgate_trial_partial_effectiveness_policy_v1`；bucket、deterioration、baseline proxy and false-signal rules are diagnostic-only；primary_window_validated=false and all safety fields disabled|固定 2Y trial 局部有效性诊断口径，避免把 trial bucket / baseline proxy 误当 production threshold|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Policy active 不是 promotion gate，也不是正式第一层验收标准。|
|`outputs/research_trends/norgate_trial/norgate_trial_partial_effectiveness_coverage_report.json`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/norgate_trial/norgate_trial_partial_effectiveness_coverage_by_date.csv`<br/>`docs/research/norgate_trial_partial_effectiveness_coverage_report.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/norgate_trial_partial_effectiveness_coverage_report.yaml`|`aits data norgate partial-effectiveness`|Norgate local DB、`$NDX` date-aware membership、trial price history|Schema contract：`schema_version=norgate_trial_partial_effectiveness_coverage.v1`；includes earliest/latest price date、member-day coverage ratio、missing price ratio、failed join count、historical_member_symbols_hash；raw member list and raw prices not committed|验证 2Y trial 窗口内 membership × price join coverage 是否足够支持数值 feature 诊断|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Coverage pass 只覆盖 2024-06-28～2026-06-26，不覆盖 2021 primary window。|
|`outputs/research_trends/norgate_trial/norgate_trial_breadth_feature_report_2y.json`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/norgate_trial/norgate_trial_breadth_feature_report_2y.csv`<br/>`docs/research/norgate_trial_breadth_feature_report_2y.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/norgate_trial_breadth_feature_report_2y.yaml`|`aits data norgate partial-effectiveness`|Coverage report、member daily prices、QQQ trial price history|Schema contract：`schema_version=norgate_trial_breadth_feature_report_2y.v1`；feature columns include `pct_above_ma20/50/200`、`equal_weight_return`、`cap_weight_proxy_return`、`advance_decline_proxy`、`breadth_momentum`；raw prices and member list not committed|生成 2Y Norgate breadth / participation feature numeric report，判断 feature 是否可计算|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Feature numeric validated 不是 local signal edge，也不是 model-ready。|
|`outputs/research_trends/norgate_trial/norgate_trial_local_signal_report_2y.json`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/norgate_trial/norgate_trial_local_signal_bucket_report_2y.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/norgate_trial/norgate_trial_local_signal_deterioration_report_2y.csv`<br/>`docs/research/norgate_trial_local_signal_report_2y.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/norgate_trial_local_signal_report_2y.yaml`|`aits data norgate partial-effectiveness`|Breadth feature report、QQQ forward returns、diagnostic policy|Schema contract：`schema_version=norgate_trial_local_signal_report_2y.v1`；bucket vs 5D/10D/20D QQQ returns、deterioration vs future drawdown、baseline proxy vs baseline + breadth、false risk-off/risk-on comparison；primary_window_validated=false|评估 2Y 局部 signal evidence，作为 paid Platinum purchase evidence 的一部分|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Local signal evidence 即使为正，也不能恢复 first-layer 或 paper-shadow。|
|`outputs/research_trends/norgate_trial/norgate_trial_partial_effectiveness_conclusion_matrix.json`<br/>`docs/research/norgate_trial_partial_effectiveness_conclusion_matrix.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/norgate_trial_partial_effectiveness_conclusion_matrix.yaml`|`aits data norgate partial-effectiveness`|Coverage、feature、local signal reports and policy|Schema contract：`schema_version=norgate_trial_partial_effectiveness_conclusion_matrix.v1`；outputs `source_engineering_useful`、`source_feature_useful_2y`、`purchase_platinum_evidence_strength`、`model_ready_for_2021_primary_window=false`、`reopen_gate_allowed=false` and all safety fields disabled|回答 2Y trial 是否支持继续购买正式历史，而不是回答第一层是否正式验收|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|`purchase_platinum_evidence_strength` 不是 purchase approval；owner manual approval and full-history validation remain required。|

|`docs/research/norgate_platinum_decision_memo.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/norgate_platinum_decision_memo.yaml`|`aits data norgate partial-evidence-review`|Norgate 2Y partial evidence review and conclusion matrix|Schema contract：`schema_version=norgate_platinum_decision_memo.v1`；records `trial_based_purchase_recommendation=no`、`stress_window_paid_experiment_recommendation=conditional_yes`、owner decision requirement、`purchase_allowed=false` and all gates false|给 owner 决定是否接受 paid stress-window experiment 的 memo；不建议基于 trial 直接购买|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|`conditional_yes` 不是自动购买；`purchase_allowed=false`、`purchase_allowed_without_owner_approval=false`。|
|`outputs/research_trends/norgate_trial/norgate_2y_partial_evidence_conclusion_matrix.json`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/norgate_2y_partial_evidence_conclusion_matrix.yaml`|`aits data norgate partial-evidence-review`|Evidence review, prior 2267 conclusion and policy|Schema contract：`schema_version=norgate_2y_partial_evidence_conclusion_matrix.v1`；outputs `local_signal_evidence_reason`、`trial_2y_feature_value`、`full_history_needed_for_final_answer`、split purchase fields and disabled gate fields|更新 Norgate 2Y partial conclusion matrix，区分 trial-based purchase answer、paid experiment owner review 和 primary-window validation|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Full-history needed 不等于 first-layer ready；2021 primary window 仍未验证。|

有效，不生成 target weight、rebalance instruction、buy/sell signal、paper-shadow-ready、production-ready 或 broker-ready；static ETF baseline 只是 2326 第一轮 dry-run baseline，不是 owner approval 或真实仓位建议。|

## TRADING-2311 Liquidity / Rates Pressure Data Feasibility Audit

|产物|生成命令|上游输入|Schema / 安全契约|用途|production 影响|常见误解|
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
|`docs/research/liquidity_rates_data_feasibility_audit.md`<br/>`docs/requirements/TRADING-2311_Liquidity_Rates_Pressure_Data_Feasibility_Audit.md`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/liquidity_rates_data_feasibility_audit/liquidity_rates_data_feasibility_summary.json`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/liquidity_rates_data_feasibility_audit/rates_proxy_inventory.json`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/liquidity_rates_data_feasibility_audit/rates_proxy_inventory.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/liquidity_rates_data_feasibility_audit/liquidity_rates_price_proxy_coverage_matrix.json`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/liquidity_rates_data_feasibility_audit/liquidity_rates_price_proxy_coverage_matrix.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/liquidity_rates_data_feasibility_audit/macro_rates_coverage_matrix.json`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/liquidity_rates_data_feasibility_audit/macro_rates_coverage_matrix.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/liquidity_rates_data_feasibility_audit/liquidity_pressure_candidate_design_sketch.json`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/liquidity_rates_data_feasibility_audit/liquidity_rates_validation_route.json`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/liquidity_rates_data_feasibility_audit/liquidity_rates_safety_boundary.json`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/liquidity_rates_data_feasibility_audit/data_quality_2026-06-29.md`|`aits research trends liquidity-rates-pressure-feasibility-audit --prices-path data/raw/prices_daily.csv --rates-path data/raw/rates_daily.csv --target-assets QQQ,SMH --horizons 10d,20d,1m --mode feasibility_audit`|Owner post-2302 roadmap、TRADING-2301 first-layer new candidate family backlog、本地 price cache 中 `QQQ` / `SMH` / `TLT` / `SHY` required anchors、FRED/local rates cache 中 configured rate series data-quality gate|Schema contract：status=`LIQUIDITY_RATES_FEASIBILITY_AUDIT_READY_PARTIAL_PROXY`；artifact_role=`liquidity_rates_feasibility_audit`；命令先调用 `validate_data_cache` 同源 data-quality gate，当前真实 run data quality status=`PASS_WITH_WARNINGS`；`IEF`、`UUP`、`HYG`、`LQD`、`DFII10`、`T10YIE`、`SOFR` 必须保留 source gap；输出固定 `generator_implemented=false`、`candidate_artifact_generated=false`、`actual_path_validation_executed=false`、`scope_review_executed=false`、promotion/paper-shadow/production/broker false/none|审计 liquidity / rates pressure 输入可行性，生成 price proxy coverage、macro rates coverage、rates proxy inventory、candidate design sketch、validation route 和 safety boundary；真实 run 只支持 partial rates/duration proxy route，`partial_poc_possible=true` 且 `full_liquidity_pressure_poc_ready=false`|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Feasibility ready 不是 generator POC、不是 actual-path validation、不是 scope review、不是 promotion evidence，也不是 paper-shadow/production/broker readiness；full_liquidity_pressure_poc_ready=false 表示完整 liquidity/credit/real-rate 方向仍被 source gaps 阻断。|

|产物|生成命令|上游输入|Schema / 安全契约|用途|production 影响|常见误解|
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
|`config/research/event_calendar_feasibility_policy.yaml`<br/>`config/research/event_calendar_definitions.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/event_calendar_data_feasibility_audit.md`<br/>`docs/requirements/TRADING-2318_Event_Calendar_Data_Feasibility_Audit.md`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/event_calendar_data_feasibility_audit/event_calendar_data_feasibility_summary.json`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/event_calendar_data_feasibility_audit/event_calendar_source_inventory.json`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/event_calendar_data_feasibility_audit/event_calendar_source_inventory.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/event_calendar_data_feasibility_audit/event_calendar_known_at_requirement_matrix.json`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/event_calendar_data_feasibility_audit/event_calendar_known_at_requirement_matrix.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/event_calendar_data_feasibility_audit/event_calendar_gating_use_case_matrix.json`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/event_calendar_data_feasibility_audit/event_calendar_gating_use_case_matrix.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/event_calendar_data_feasibility_audit/event_calendar_manual_review_trigger_contract.json`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/event_calendar_data_feasibility_audit/event_calendar_validation_route.json`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/event_calendar_data_feasibility_audit/event_calendar_validation_route.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/event_calendar_data_feasibility_audit/event_calendar_safety_boundary.json`|`aits research trends event-calendar-data-feasibility-audit --mode feasibility_audit`|Owner post-2302 roadmap、TRADING-2301 backlog context、`config/research/event_calendar_feasibility_policy.yaml` 和 baseline `event_calendar_definitions.yaml`|Schema contract：status=`EVENT_CALENDAR_FEASIBILITY_AUDIT_READY_SOURCE_AUDIT_ONLY`；artifact_role=`event_calendar_feasibility_audit`；data quality status=`NOT_APPLICABLE_STATIC_FEASIBILITY_AUDIT`，因为命令不读取 cached market/macro data、不下载 event rows、不写 event cache；输出固定 `static_feasibility_audit=true`、`event_rows_downloaded=false`、`gating_signal_generated=false`、`event_outcome_prediction_allowed=false`、`candidate_artifact_generated=false`、`actual_path_validation_executed=false`、promotion/paper-shadow/production/broker false/none|审计 FOMC、CPI、PCE、NFP、NVDA earnings、AI mega-cap earnings、TSM monthly revenue 和 semiconductor earnings window 的 source manifest / known-at requirement；真实 run event_source_count=8、source_audit_required_count=8、pit_ready_source_count=0、source_blocked_count=4、gating_use_case_count=4|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Event feasibility audit 不是 event calendar ingestion、不是 gating generator、不是 no-add rule、不是 manual-review runtime、不是 post-event confirmation signal、不是 event outcome predictor，也不是 promotion / paper-shadow / production / broker readiness；PIT-ready source count 为 0 表示 TRADING-2319 前仍需 provider-specific source manifest 和 row-level known-at validation。|

## TRADING-2319 Event Calendar Gating Generator POC

|产物|生成命令|上游输入|Schema / 安全契约|用途|production 影响|常见误解|
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
|`config/research/event_calendar_gating_generator_policy.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/event_calendar_gating_generator_poc.md`<br/>`docs/requirements/TRADING-2319_Event_Calendar_Gating_Generator_POC.md`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/event_calendar_gating_generator_poc/event_calendar_gating_generator_summary.json`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/event_calendar_gating_generator_poc/event_gating_signal_spec.json`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/event_calendar_gating_generator_poc/event_gating_use_case_readiness_matrix.json`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/event_calendar_gating_generator_poc/event_gating_use_case_readiness_matrix.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/event_calendar_gating_generator_poc/event_gating_source_blocker_report.json`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/event_calendar_gating_generator_poc/event_gating_source_blocker_report.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/event_calendar_gating_generator_poc/event_gating_manual_review_trigger_contract.json`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/event_calendar_gating_generator_poc/event_gating_generator_validation_summary.json`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/event_calendar_gating_generator_poc/event_gating_generator_safety_boundary.json`|`aits research trends event-calendar-gating-generator-poc --mode generator_poc`|TRADING-2318 feasibility summary、source inventory、gating use-case matrix、manual review trigger contract 和 `config/research/event_calendar_gating_generator_policy.yaml`|Schema contract：status=`EVENT_CALENDAR_GATING_GENERATOR_POC_SOURCE_BLOCKED_NO_SIGNAL`；artifact_role=`event_calendar_gating_generator_poc_source_blocked`；data quality status=`NOT_APPLICABLE_SOURCE_BLOCKED_STATIC_GENERATOR`，因为命令只读取 TRADING-2318 artifacts、不读取 cached market data、不读取或下载 event rows；输出固定 `source_blocked_no_generation=true`、`event_rows_consumed=false`、`event_rows_downloaded=false`、`gating_signal_generated=false`、`event_gating_signal_series_generated=false`、`event_outcome_prediction_allowed=false`、`trading_direction_prediction_allowed=false`、promotion/paper-shadow/production/broker false/none|把 TRADING-2318 的 source blocker 转成 generator POC 边界包：真实 run source_pit_ready_source_count=0，source_blocker_count=8，use_case_readiness_count=4，blocked_use_case_count=4；`pre_event_no_add`、`post_event_confirmation_window`、`manual_review_trigger` 和 `earnings_cluster_risk` 全部为 `SOURCE_BLOCKED_NO_GENERATOR`；inactive spec 仅记录解除 blocker 后需要的 event row / output fields|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Source-blocked generator POC 不是 executable event gating generator、不是 event rows ingestion、不是 no-add rule、不是 manual-review runtime、不是 post-event confirmation signal、不是交易方向预测，也不是 promotion / paper-shadow / production / broker readiness；`event_gating_signal_spec.json` 是 inactive spec，不得接入任何 runtime。|

## TRADING-2320 Event Gating Validation

|产物|生成命令|上游输入|Schema / 安全契约|用途|production 影响|常见误解|
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
|`config/research/event_gating_validation_policy.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/event_gating_validation.md`<br/>`docs/requirements/TRADING-2320_Event_Gating_Validation.md`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/event_gating_validation/event_gating_validation_summary.json`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/event_gating_validation/event_gating_validation_metric_contract.json`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/event_gating_validation/event_gating_validation_readiness_matrix.json`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/event_gating_validation/event_gating_validation_readiness_matrix.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/event_gating_validation/event_gating_validation_blocker_report.json`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/event_gating_validation/event_gating_validation_blocker_report.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/event_gating_validation/event_gating_validation_data_requirement_matrix.json`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/event_gating_validation/event_gating_validation_data_requirement_matrix.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/event_gating_validation/event_gating_validation_safety_boundary.json`|`aits research trends event-gating-validation --mode validation_readiness`|TRADING-2319 generator summary、inactive signal spec、use-case readiness matrix、source blocker report、manual review trigger contract 和 `config/research/event_gating_validation_policy.yaml`|Schema contract：status=`EVENT_GATING_VALIDATION_SOURCE_BLOCKED_NOT_EXECUTED`；artifact_role=`event_gating_validation_source_blocked`；data quality status=`NOT_APPLICABLE_SOURCE_BLOCKED_STATIC_VALIDATION`，因为命令只读取 TRADING-2319 artifacts、不读取 cached market data、不读取 event rows、turnover records 或 exposure records；输出固定 `source_blocked_no_validation=true`、`event_rows_consumed=false`、`gating_signal_consumed=false`、`event_gating_signal_series_consumed=false`、`market_data_consumed=false`、`event_gating_validation_executed=false`、`validation_result_generated=false`、promotion/paper-shadow/production/broker false/none|把 TRADING-2319 no-signal source-blocked generator POC 转成 validation readiness package：真实 run validation_objective_count=3、blocked_objective_count=3、data_requirement_count=15、blocker_count=18；`pre_event_false_risk_on`、`event_window_overtrading` 和 `earnings_cluster_exposure_risk` 全部为 `SOURCE_BLOCKED_VALIDATION_NOT_EXECUTED`|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Source-blocked validation package 不是 event gating 有效性验证、不是 validation result、不是 no-add / manual-review runtime、不是 post-event confirmation validation、不是 event outcome / trading direction predictor，也不是 promotion / paper-shadow / production / broker readiness；metric contract 只能说明未来验证需要的数据和字段。|
